name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhd21dafkg8thm5d1m3q0g0kut01eimhgkbkai68_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z57954to521c5d02ruif2bn1hd2tn6rfhj1f6720_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmi8iejo87s299dfo569kdahq69rrebk3mdb4lj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm8nr4qqifogrdco4bse7oqv2hc4vphbpnr7bcg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhqcrn4itbghvus7vvivumr0qh3rsobd6leu6a20_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze37eg9dt9mvj4mo0tnln495dlgb1cnpgd99ip40_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhf9gfgotpor46ekgv9qdg1opcdll8965ipil9i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv7vt1kr838es0l72thp4avsn68i7e1618u4bglg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0o37clh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# **[TikTok Fined $600M By European Union](http://trk.libertyledger.-i8w1EwtQ)**
---
A European Union privacy watchdog fined TikTok 530 million euros ($600 million) Friday after a four-year investigation found that the video sharing app’s data transfers to China put users at risk of spying, in breach of strict EU data privacy rules. Ireland’s Data Protection Commission also sanctioned TikTok for not being transparent with users about [...]...Click to read more

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqc0knpu29aa71cneitkqenb2cu2g0ui9f585fr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0p72c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkid2snct5o08lgq9n16v5jhtda1lqqm4b6rp4j0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0p72c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z285pg8noee147p9k480m6ohro6aurd8rih3d2tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0p72c9h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc4ab1fscuh3tu7bviifqu7fpvhhs4at80ck97d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm0p72c9h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zflogq38cuovlkn4trmoqg2g5ujcbftpo7o0k420_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjni21pktmubrbtf3908t19g7f0fr21k4nm0ukdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7aap70upk1pfeg25t6bd2rhqbk7jq70k4l00p0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlf2r4sr7pcvn8qbv5fmuj0rj4nn3idu70047518_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0oelkdalq9olpgprkqpjenf0e9n362vbiahrbe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0g30urf7uek5t01ops18ddg0s7be2eknlmvv570_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znabgpuc9adfhrja78u99ee0q53ovmup10mbvnm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3fq511e6qm31nh5rgha1kl2uvukp3od7dabhedo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3c9jm8o71chh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

---

| |
# 2025 Legislative Session Wrap Up
This year's legislative session came to a close in the early hours of April 25 as the Senate joined the House in adjourning _sine die (_**a fancy way to say that the budget is through and the work of drafting and voting on policy is finished until the next legislative session**).

First and foremost, I am eternally grateful for the trust and support of District 46 as I continue to work for you and your families in our Statehouse. It is the honor of a lifetime to represent our shared community, and no reflection of this past year would be complete without first acknowledging the immense gratitude I hold for Indianapolis and the people who make it home.

When I think about this past session, I think first of the ways we have worked together to improve the lives of our families, our community and our state.

Whether that be through working together to advance legislation that [protects the genetic privacy of every person in this state](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b96556ed5a8875006044c472c53adb445d53348c7277f4e56caf58dbc48025889b5f3e36b7744178b2e561100b7431a533cbc3 "protects the genetic privacy of every person in this state"), [supporting legislation that guarantees foster children can open their own bank accounts](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b96556d4956341e4bb2cb615275ab247373adbc1f7141b55b33f3d9c9dee99e89261269ed17c42bab7caa2090e47d34839b40d "supporting legislation that guarantees foster children can open their own bank accounts ") or [finally ensuring the decriminalization of fentanyl testing strips](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b96556e9c9d82fd708232c6788be034964b0781394648c776f40416be0999b03f55bfffae13961dcbeb275981c9063c83353cf "finally ensuring the decriminalization of fentanyl testing strips"), there is substantive proof that your advocacy was felt through the Statehouse this session.

And, as we enter the interim and prepare for next session, please remember that**the legislative process only works with the active participation of those who are represented**. I am grateful to every member of my caucus who spent this session, and months leading up to it, listening, delivering results and never forgetting that we work for the people of Indiana first and foremost. Unfortunately, despite our shared wins, this is something that was too often forgotten in other places of the legislature. We ultimately [passed a budget](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b96556468df35a604d4e2b349b9a111c16953a07e750555407c49e3820bebb7270069b82665fc15a5d07f70b6a2c5caa462b91 "passed a budget") that disregards working-class Hoosiers by cutting relief for special education in our state, creating restrictions on child care assistance, eliminating funding for services for our aging parents and grandparents, and much more. **See My Full Response to Our Budget[Here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b965564be37e3384f18cdf3f50b4352c21d402f9ac8e78f9e1f1983471f577e185a75e2cee2603dbafa4992a0176da545ea0d1 "Here")** Despite these cuts, we still found the funds, while facing a $2.4 billion shortfall, to expand school choice vouchers for our wealthiest families. This disregard for the working-class is compounded by the Senate's priority bill, [SB 1](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b965569a37dc947c2ec3f5e5741a726ad026134e874b396039ab31d20aba98aac2153fb979d3cd2f9439bb2e8a4a2268e6c259 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=87ac265b31330b533a291ab8a91e202ade2b0b02635e42e394963f843e557f0e1d3302c12d3230540c6becd3f429b2ef0d4714aafd375f86__;!!FlTQaCg!gw1rpSG-qMmZ6DdH5eD7uO-ZmYsAa43qnWJIpVt7J2OglsyJC6EyQgUZYD9y-Fk8fE85BofMUWOiy0vwcnAeACr1CFXwUy8JkO0$"), that was promised to deliver meaningful property tax relief for Hoosiers. Instead of fulfilling that promise, it sets up a framework where our poorest Hoosiers, those with a property value under $150,000, will end up paying more in property taxes while our state's wealthiest reap the real benefit. I stand alongside my colleagues in the Indiana Senate Democratic Caucus in unequivocal support for the futures, families and freedoms of every person who calls this state home. I will never cease in my advocacy to create an Indiana that my daughters, and the generations that come after them will be proud of. We aren't there yet, but trust that we are already working in the interim, preparing for the 2026 Legislative Session and striving to get one step closer.
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
# May Coffee Chat: Calvin Fletcher's Coffee Company
---
| | |
---
Thank you to everyone who came out for this month's coffee chat where we discussed how public schools will be impacted by property tax legislation, the erosion of higher education, how to stay involved during the interim (_more on that below!_), and more.

Seeing the continued engagement of our community, even after session has ended, leaves me with boundless hope for what we will continue to achieve together.

I am so appreciative of Calvin Fletcher's Coffee Company, and every Indy coffee shop who has hosted us this session.

---
#
* * *
---
# **How __YOU__ Can Stay Involved in the Interim**
Though the 2025 Legislative Session is officially over, there are still many opportunities for you to connect with legislators and advocate on behalf of yourself and your communities.
## **Interim Study Committees & Boards and Commissions**
A lot of the research and planning that goes into the legislation we hear during session comes from the work done in interim study committees. These committees, comprised of legislators, area experts and other community members, are tasked with studying topics that affect our state and to discover areas where we can improve through legislation. Past topics include: Pension Management Oversight, Education, Child Services, Fiscal Policy, and more. **_These committees often take public testimony_. ** If there is a subject area you are especially knowledgeable, passionate about or want to make sure all perspectives are being considered, this is a wonderful opportunity to make your voice heard. **We Are Still Waiting on the 2025 Study Committees. The Full List of Interim Study Committees Will be Published[ Here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b965567d55b185cb8b3d15bcd2ffc517c6b6db8883979abbb7d44e24a6e94abeca18310586422cac6da2ff8f415f0f14e86fe9)** In addition to the study committees, different boards and commissions meet throughout the year. These meetings are open to the public and are often posted well in advance. Some of these boards and commissions include: the Indiana Alcohol and Tobacco Commission, the Indiana Commission on the Social Status of Black Males and the Indiana Native American Indian Affairs Commission. **A More Extensive List of State Boards and Commissions Can be Found [Here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b96556b02111f2e9a3b73e7ce686c8f45d455ba219e76dd61a08468e766279bffbc1fef5d2baed604d1c9a76b30c0875fa0228)**
## **Ways You Can Connect One-on-One With Legislators During the Interim**
The moment session ends legislators are thinking of bill ideas for the next one. This is why it is so important to connect not only with the legislators who directly represent you, but legislators who could positively, or negatively, impact your communities. **Invite Legislators for a Site Visit** Legislators are always trying to better understand the real-world implications of legislation, and that comes from first-hand, real-world experiences. For instance, as a teacher and school administrator, my background is education. In my role as a State Senator, however, I have found a passion for legislation surrounding utilities and now serve as the Ranking Minority Member of the Utilities Committee. To get more firsthand experience, I was able to tour the D.C. Cook Nuclear Power Plant in Michigan, which served as a vital experience with the burgeoning conversation surrounding nuclear in our state. So, if you work in agriculture, find the members of the Agriculture Committee are and invite them for a visit. Do you work in the medical field? Find the members of the Health and Provider Services Committee and invite them for a visit. Do you share my passion for educating our kiddos and work in a school? Find the members of Education and Career Development and invite them for a site visit. These are perfect opportunities to connect with legislators who will be reviewing and passing legislation that will directly impact you and your industry. Reach out today! **The Full List of Committees and Members Can be Found[ Here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b965567a5d64e87a2813856442bd3256fa83f129854f68def7fde5e88c2c6910c715367e437e2e3dcc22f591c3735c4c8e9724)** **Schedule Individual Meetings and Don't Forget the Power of a Handwritten Letter** During the interim, you can also schedule individual meetings with legislators, either in person or virtually. This is an opportunity to bring forth bill ideas, talk about a problem in your community or to give feedback. **[Click Here To See Members of the Indiana Senate Democrats](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b96556a189cc018c38f81931538577e0a019ce8c8ad075ae8d7a7befc90732ae4e0f5a35177951f6b9978a6fbda1065f1bb192)** **[Click Here To See Members of the Indiana House Democrats](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b965560265cbfa4890ac25c30f1e74897faef253fefc97ab7eef04173435bc45ad48486b1a508d200457bd920a3ca08a52a4ae)** **[Click Here To See Members of the Indiana Senate Republicans](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b9655647935d8d71009d033b4f3c2de8ff19d62430db1f892dc0606787c2b11e1337c9e82d6472c4aeb696f984a98e8b85227e)** **[Click Here To See Members of the Indiana House Republicans](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=bdf5c919d8b96556f995a59448eb3acef0adb9e045e5b3d4b5c3760c848ffbf2750c7f148e6a8ef16ae9f89d83b74c40573fe21c921bc40a)** Lastly, never forget the power of a handwritten letter. The intentionality and thoughtfulness of a handwritten letter carry a lot of weight and is a perfect way to communicate your thoughts and feelings to a legislator during the interim and during session. **To send a letter to a legislator, use the following template: ** _Legislator Name Here_ _200 W. Washington St. _ _Indianapolis, IN 46204_
## **Thank You For Your Continued Participation in Your Government **
Thank you to every one of you who has reached out to me wanting to know how you can continue to be involved at the conclusion of our long session. The continued passion and participation of our community never ceases to amaze me, and I am endlessly grateful to work for **__you__**.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | | | | | 2025 Legislative Session Wrap Up This year's legislative session came to a close in the early hours of April 25 as the Senate joined the House in adjourning sine die (a fancy way to say that the budget is through and the work of drafting and voting on policy is finished until the next legislative session). First and foremost, I am eternally grateful for the trust and support of District 46 as I continue to work for you and your families in our Statehouse. It is the honor of a lifetime to represent our shared community, and no reflection of this past year would be complete without first acknowledging the immense gratitude I hold for Indianapolis and the people who make it home. When I think about this past session, I think first of the ways we have worked together to improve the lives of our families, our community and our state. Whether that be through working together to advance legislation that "protects the genetic privacy of every person in this state", "supporting legislation that guarantees foster children can open their own bank accounts " or "finally ensuring the decriminalization of fentanyl testing strips", there is substantive proof that your advocacy was felt through the Statehouse this session. And, as we enter the interim and prepare for next session, please remember thatthe legislative process only works with the active participation of those who are represented. I am grateful to every member of my caucus who spent this session, and months leading up to it, listening, delivering results and never forgetting that we work for the people of Indiana first and foremost. Unfortunately, despite our shared wins, this is something that was too often forgotten in other places of the legislature. We ultimately "passed a budget" that disregards working-class Hoosiers by cutting relief for special education in our state, creating restrictions on child care assistance, eliminating funding for services for our aging parents and grandparents, and much more. See My Full Response to Our Budget "Here" Despite these cuts, we still found the funds, while facing a $2.4 billion shortfall, to expand school choice vouchers for our wealthiest families. This disregard for the working-class is compounded by the Senate's priority bill, "$", that was promised to deliver meaningful property tax relief for Hoosiers. Instead of fulfilling that promise, it sets up a framework where our poorest Hoosiers, those with a property value under $150,000, will end up paying more in property taxes while our state's wealthiest reap the real benefit. I stand alongside my colleagues in the Indiana Senate Democratic Caucus in unequivocal support for the futures, families and freedoms of every person who calls this state home. I will never cease in my advocacy to create an Indiana that my daughters, and the generations that come after them will be proud of. We aren't there yet, but trust that we are already working in the interim, preparing for the 2026 Legislative Session and striving to get one step closer. | | | May Coffee Chat: Calvin Fletcher's Coffee Company | | | Thank you to everyone who came out for this month's coffee chat where we discussed how public schools will be impacted by property tax legislation, the erosion of higher education, how to stay involved during the interim (more on that below!), and more. Seeing the continued engagement of our community, even after session has ended, leaves me with boundless hope for what we will continue to achieve together. I am so appreciative of Calvin Fletcher's Coffee Company, and every Indy coffee shop who has hosted us this session. How YOU Can Stay Involved in the Interim Though the 2025 Legislative Session is officially over, there are still many opportunities for you to connect with legislators and advocate on behalf of yourself and your communities. Interim Study Committees & Boards and Commissions A lot of the research and planning that goes into the legislation we hear during session comes from the work done in interim study committees. These committees, comprised of legislators, area experts and other community members, are tasked with studying topics that affect our state and to discover areas where we can improve through legislation. Past topics include: Pension Management Oversight, Education, Child Services, Fiscal Policy, and more. These committees often take public testimony. If there is a subject area you are especially knowledgeable, passionate about or want to make sure all perspectives are being considered, this is a wonderful opportunity to make your voice heard. We Are Still Waiting on the 2025 Study Committees. The Full List of Interim Study Committees Will be Published In addition to the study committees, different boards and commissions meet throughout the year. These meetings are open to the public and are often posted well in advance. Some of these boards and commissions include: the Indiana Alcohol and Tobacco Commission, the Indiana Commission on the Social Status of Black Males and the Indiana Native American Indian Affairs Commission. A More Extensive List of State Boards and Commissions Can be Found Ways You Can Connect One-on-One With Legislators During the Interim The moment session ends legislators are thinking of bill ideas for the next one. This is why it is so important to connect not only with the legislators who directly represent you, but legislators who could positively, or negatively, impact your communities. Invite Legislators for a Site Visit Legislators are always trying to better understand the real-world implications of legislation, and that comes from first-hand, real-world experiences. For instance, as a teacher and school administrator, my background is education. In my role as a State Senator, however, I have found a passion for legislation surrounding utilities and now serve as the Ranking Minority Member of the Utilities Committee. To get more firsthand experience, I was able to tour the D.C. Cook Nuclear Power Plant in Michigan, which served as a vital experience with the burgeoning conversation surrounding nuclear in our state. So, if you work in agriculture, find the members of the Agriculture Committee are and invite them for a visit. Do you work in the medical field? Find the members of the Health and Provider Services Committee and invite them for a visit. Do you share my passion for educating our kiddos and work in a school? Find the members of Education and Career Development and invite them for a site visit. These are perfect opportunities to connect with legislators who will be reviewing and passing legislation that will directly impact you and your industry. Reach out today! The Full List of Committees and Members Can be Found Schedule Individual Meetings and Don't Forget the Power of a Handwritten Letter During the interim, you can also schedule individual meetings with legislators, either in person or virtually. This is an opportunity to bring forth bill ideas, talk about a problem in your community or to give feedback. Lastly, never forget the power of a handwritten letter. The intentionality and thoughtfulness of a handwritten letter carry a lot of weight and is a perfect way to communicate your thoughts and feelings to a legislator during the interim and during session. To send a letter to a legislator, use the following template: Legislator Name Here 200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46204 Thank You For Your Continued Participation in Your Government Thank you to every one of you who has reached out to me wanting to know how you can continue to be involved at the conclusion of our long session. The continued passion and participation of our community never ceases to amaze me, and I am endlessly grateful to work for you. | | | | | News Around Our State | | "Emotions run high as controversial education bill heads to conference committee " "" "" COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. " | | | | | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications office mailto:Nancy.Singh@iga.in.gov mailto:Chester.Bryant@iga.in.gov mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- | This email was sent by: Indiana General Assembly 200 W. | | Hey folks, Dennis Quaid here.

Here’s the thing: life doesn’t come with guarantees. The economy shifts, markets stumble, and years of hard work could slip through your fingers like sand.

Should it happen again—what’s your plan?

Think back just a few years. Inflation wasn’t the monster it feels like today. Prices made sense. The future felt steady.

But today? It’s a different story. Groceries cost more. Gas went up. And rising costs chip away at the value of your retirement savings every day.

But you don’t have to sit on the sidelines:
You’ve seen what happens when folks don’t prepare. It gets ugly. Savings accounts drain faster than expected, plans get downgraded, and peace of mind turns to heart-racing anxiety.

But it doesn’t have to be that way for you.

clean_body: | | | | | Hey folks, Dennis Quaid here. Here’s the thing: life doesn’t come with guarantees. The economy shifts, markets stumble, and years of hard work could slip through your fingers like sand. Should it happen again—what’s your plan? Think back just a few years. Inflation wasn’t the monster it feels like today. Prices made sense. The future felt steady. But today? It’s a different story. Groceries cost more. Gas went up. And rising costs chip away at the value of your retirement savings every day. But you don’t have to sit on the sidelines: You’ve seen what happens when folks don’t prepare. It gets ugly. Savings accounts drain faster than expected, plans get downgraded, and peace of mind turns to heart-racing anxiety. But it doesn’t have to be that way for you. | | | | So request a that will arrive right to your doorstep when you act now. | | So request a that will arrive right to your doorstep when you act now. | | You’ll find simple, actionable strategies to help safeguard your savings, help protect against inflation, and help build a more secure retirement—boiled down into a few powerful steps you can act on immediately. No fluff, no gimmicks—just the insights you need to make a confident decision for you and your family’s future. The choice is simple: take action now, or you may risk looking back wishing you had. | | It’s free, it’s easy, and it could make all the difference. God bless you, and here’s to your future. Each year, the Massachusetts Republican Party bestows its highest honor - the Lincoln-Reagan Award - upon a Republican who exemplifies the values, vision, and tireless dedication of our Party's greatest icons: Abraham Lincoln and Ronald Reagan.
Do you know a standout Republican who has made a powerful impact in your community or across our state? It could be an elected official who's led with integrity, a grassroots warrior who never backs down, or an activist whose passion has inspired the next generation. Whether they're in the trenches or behind the scenes, we want to hear about them.
---
| | [NOMINATE A REPUBLICAN FOR THIS YEAR'S AWARD](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YFX9wamWT9cGjLfFx2liGC6BSBqSvlDjveDaknWCsXMsOXsQ34wd62HhCD8ACmzeKUTEe7KMBjP23Pe0XzOryHh3xd2fmomBuAqZVAujkAkRjJ_IQ3yckSd8CaxFsPICMlPF-a7oFumwttfA0R-RMwdHkScTuRNKfp4eWsHw69cZ1ULLZdcylOi2bTFk78wsCitZH-c2RGk=&c=FjfWFuktNta_oRjBepIFYdmeFQ_M5_nAyRxxYL2Si87tFN8vikyPcQ==&ch=VDLraCK_Y19W75XZE4O-lKLUVEaG2KCQbQlUx535ferXMD4UIPLxFA==)

## Markets Rebound Strongly
The U.S. economy added 177,000 jobs in April, [beating expectations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GOwyg4FhQbGM3225pnvAcmUUx8GaMf79xfmG7m9zk3pzzcx_vEGLYHt-woqU5jRseJSIR5nGF_ItUMk7ptXlwgU4HMaIflVCaC81FM3oI8RzbytsZUWFToZVda5QxN9lXiwVUndMgsAUjpMZeOu3RT970Nyl6UwV7rQktGimE0V3dzNjcABBxkmA6xVqBPlDK9TOFjRac45nemGuX1irahWgvrPliamBqOI6jdlO5KK6eqeGKTA3PNBWecU-ZOCUPJ4c9h8g_KOjSltaTE-Qwz4VTfq07U0OVrd-PEGMopmOteKwQ4ueX_iXrbdVfAAAA__-LZ3_I), while the unemployment rate remained at 4.2% amid uncertainty over Trump administration trade policies. The stock [market rose](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdCCzNgYKF39Dl7-9EjneJfiy4Ag2Qbz9KblHuGaakb7RfF-X8RISp_X2PyzkZcrjSsfOJELbuITtTrJvdM3PFUNMcsbATDiChqbUTanNiCHxOdoC_UQEZArydWsdONfVfTH71tqm0a3p68lR11nobRctIqFFB11fJP-m6UabWmvXtJWZyHQhENG1Dq4FZTVhkrxV3zmtMtPEZ37RVsW8FOxnkceuzD8Fg4LhOI4qrtf4LhUMb7SCQX-iVjDskuO9_H1WSsZwlpxeVD4fGIT2apaFi83j40jMaXetsvq2hMSfNfmTopeHnwAAAP__kGx5aQ) on the upbeat jobs report, with the S&P 500 jumping 1.47% and recovering all losses since April 2. The Dow also rose 564.47 points, and the Nasdaq gained 1.51%. President Trump [praised the strong economic news](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCnMZ2RWWOTFC6uocu1V6IFr4NzBiN7E5S3_5W8wt9MM9I30vy7TTeMKe73v7iR45Cnnc6aiJnKtGH5T1wLzfm5e1wivxdMifwECoxURio9eYzpPfWNd4EISDfkuqG3YO2luzarW0x3NcGDV2qYLcJFW7DBdH4IvSVlm-g-mjJKd0pZM7Q6kL4gEtHcoR1A9Ip85FzaR447rxTSO7-otEvemuRW5qMK_UfAKGA8z7Nd9nn5lALGDy1gVN8AASOX53ZIPEpM8pHnKgsdubAM5GXcmQpVlgWZarvylpri_HHGlGK1g-jVfcOYvsP8q7deDn4CAAD__0xsfe0) on social media, calling it part of his economic plan’s transition stage and urging the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates. Another piece of positive economic news arrived Friday as [China’s Commerce Ministry](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O2zAQhJ-G6mhQpET7ChUOEnWXJsWVwlpcWpvjj0Cuj9DbB0oeIdUUA3yY-T7el3egQOn5EyJO7POSsNWAzFiWCOUTuRZ85FdysBIfK4SAbtFKj1KNUpnFAYVjGTo3eUSNpsOpvw5WW3vr37ptGld3s8N66xU-VuV6b3XvHWpjcRjewHY0nTQ1KtMrZcfrxXg0NwBEfPRgr1oMCh1xLpffmRJv6MORv7Bc1hy7MG3MexXmLvQs9Nxau8Sazk7oGZN8VaHnmBMeZ_57JPS8bpRA5h2T5CwZwmeVjXiTXF5xl-AiJZmTDLlhofSUDIW8rzJSosrlkBWOEwRF3u_9D6M-HsLMeSUnzPdvp1Fs9ReWvSuT2xuFQNVexaCeESj83c7_Jfxr0n8CAAD__4ZCl7Y) said officials were reviewing a U.S. offer to hold tariff talks.
## Crash Near Yellowstone Kills Seven
Authorities confirmed seven people were killed in [a fiery crash](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MGOpCAYBOCnwRsGfxD1wGGTjbfey2YyR_O3_LaMCAbo7vj2E-cV5lxJ5av6vE03dN6Fxz_cyZQlToHe2VMplKYd00YlJ7rHZ7A4u3LO6D3ZCQS0XLRcyMmi8-ekKmsWIiBZkWk6pUHrvhmq1fSDtMvQqQE0thoBe7n00CiQ2IIiqJy52kQrZCOEbrtaLiR7RCK6N6g7YEqQdSWm-iu6UFZa_BlflOo57pU3aylHZvIPg5HBiPf5WlA_4hUzGD_-Mxg7vrkLzueEeeUvDPxw8_Y8eEnPeeMneR_fucRAPGBxMaBnMOYS08nk6CyTfxtolFCtUlUy9ng7713WHVPisaPzP5jyqwdfBr4DAAD__4urhKQ) between a tour van and a pickup truck Thursday night on an eastern Idaho highway near Yellowstone National Park. It remains unclear how a Mercedes van carrying [14 tour group members](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OhCAUhZ8GOyZ4_cEpKLaxm223NFe4jOwgGEAnvv3GeYVtTnOSL-d8P4_pgc678PzGlVSxcQr0zp5KoTStmF5UcqI57sGgduXU6D2ZCQR0XHRcNJNB58-prYyyREBNRaqWbQ99P9T3alHYmHs_SNnV2lpZm7YdZmvBzmboEGZbOXXRRCeaWoi-k7fGUjMgEtFcYy-BtYKMKzHdfqMLZSHrz3hQuum4Vl4tpWyZNV8MRgZjOLeYy1UxGC8wg1F8AhiMe-bXPwajdZROfpL38Z1LDMR1wrxwT3hQ5pIbQsPRFkp8c_q1b7ykXb84BsNL3BM_MHAdvXeGGIxVUmZ7O-9d7iVrxXNF5z8Ly7-0Hgr-AgAA__-_IY1v) collided with a Dodge Ram pickup, killing six van passengers and the truck driver. The eight surviving passengers were transported to nearby hospitals. The crash is[ under investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAUhJ_GdEb-hxQubkOX226JTuxDOBuDkXGCePsV-wrbjTSjGc33dR_vQInW539Y0Ncpjysee8JasYwLlBfWveAjv9cIgeoZICWMoxLKcmG50GMESudomugnRIW6QS8745Rzvbw1szdSm5uN2Ekz9f1Nxj46a4U0GAR2ZmrIX23CCi2FcLZr9YS6B0DEhwTXKWYERqq5tN-Z1jrjlM78wdKGvDTJz7VuO9P_mBqYGo7jaMNjv15cPlPDJZkaKMKceSiwz7zmd-EfWPlG4fXeeMgpUUQeEep8hZvi43ZQSrS7jhnxXIDS7179E6SPVz8BAAD__wDWfIc) and officials are withholding further details until families are notified.

The stock on the upbeat jobs report, with the S&P 500 jumping 1.47% and recovering all losses since April 2. The Dow also rose 564.47 points, and the Nasdaq gained 1.51%. President Trump on social media, calling it part of his economic plan’s transition stage and urging the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates. Another piece of positive economic news arrived Friday as said officials were reviewing a U.S. offer to hold tariff talks. Crash Near Yellowstone Kills Seven Authorities confirmed seven people were killed in between a tour van and a pickup truck Thursday night on an eastern Idaho highway near Yellowstone National Park. It remains unclear how a Mercedes van carrying collided with a Dodge Ram pickup, killing six van passengers and the truck driver. The eight surviving passengers were transported to nearby hospitals. The crash is and officials are withholding further details until families are notified. List: Safest Cars for Teens A new list of the names over 140 recommended models across three price points: under $10,000, under $20,000, and new vehicles. Minicars, sports cars, large SUVs, pickups and EVs were not considered. Volvo, Mazda, and Subaru models appear frequently in the under $10,000 category, while cars by Honda, Toyota, and Ford can be found on the under $20,000 list. Mazda, Subaru, and Honda also appear on the list of recommended new vehicles for teen drivers. . | ➤ **The White House released an early version of its budget proposal Friday morning, proposing a $163 billion cut in spending levels while calling for a 13% increase in defense spending. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: History Facts
subject: Before coins, this common object was used as money
body:
Long before the gold standard came and went, seashells were a hot commodity — so much so that they were the preferred currency in various civilizations around the world.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69ojpr9we0zj0pe3d3t8cggzfi9stsy3tvz0io0xcevwmwvkm7r7cd3yq3e1x3tngyo5km5rhx1i33dl67dhktass1lngi2x0w7bn17meukhxksv20ddgfa7niq0hprk5qblpl6rvnp7qr710&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Seashells used to be used as currency.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| L ong before the gold standard came and went, seashells were a hot commodity — so much so that they were the preferred currency in various civilizations around the world. Cowrie shells, which come from small sea snails, were particularly widespread. While there’s some disagreement among historians about when cowries evolved from valuable items to functional currency, it’s likely that it happened during the Zhou dynasty in China (around 1046 to 256 BCE). The shells declined in use in the 19th century, but were still [used as money](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in Bengal and some parts of West Africa up until the early 20th century.
---
Unlike most shell money, [cowrie shells](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) were used whole and unaltered. In addition to their intrinsic value as an adornment, cowries are durable, portable, and hard to counterfeit. They were also exceedingly difficult to harvest — except in the Maldives, a remote archipelago in the Indian Ocean that, until relatively recently, was extremely difficult to visit.
Shell money was used all over the world, although the specific type of shell varied greatly. Usually, shells would be crafted into money before going into circulation — such as [_wampum_](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), which were beads made from clam and whelk shells by Indigenous peoples in the northeastern U.S. Rings made from sea snail shells called [_Tabu_](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) are still used in Papua New Guinea today.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## An ancient pigment was worth three times its weight in gold.
In ancient times, there was no color more luxurious than [Tyrian purple](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svokto&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), and some Roman emperors even threatened punishment by death to any nonroyals caught wearing the color. Not that anyone else could afford it, anyway: The deep reddish-purple shade was made from snail mucus, and it took around 10,000 snails to make a single gram of dye. The process for turning the snails into pigment was a closely guarded secret, and around the 15th century, that knowledge was lost, despite modern archaeologists trying to piece it back together.

| _Welcome to Evergreen’s_** _Power Surge_** _! We made this bulletin because we believe you shouldn’t have to choose between keeping up with the news and your well-being. Here’s our latest round-up of the climate and clean energy news we're following—including short summaries and why we think they matter—and positive stories to keep us all hopeful in this fight._
_(⚡Today’s voltage: 462 words)_ |
---
|
* * *
### 🔌 News We’re Plugged Into
**State Building Codes: A Key to Cutting Pollution, Lowering Bills**

In the absence of federal climate leadership, states have the unique power to take action to cut pollution, save families hundreds of dollars on their energy bills, and support cleaner, more affordable, and more resilient homes. The solution? The straightforward, state-specific process of updating building codes.
On the surface, it might not sound like much, but these codes are crucial, as they set the bar for energy efficiency standards in new buildings, covering everything from air leakage to heating/cooling systems to lighting.
But for residents to benefit, states need to adopt these standards first—and many states are decades behind.
Michigan is the latest savvy state to take advantage of this tool. Thanks to updated codes, new homes will be 32 percent more energy efficient in the first year alone, households will save an estimated $7.2 million in energy costs, and nearly 45K metric tons of carbon dioxide will no longer be pumped into our atmosphere. |
---
| **_Why this matters_** —Families are facing high energy costs, and updating building codes is a commonsense, ready-to-go solution for states to deliver for their residents. Many states have yet to take advantage of this low-hanging opportunity, and states that haven’t kept up stand to gain the most from upgrading, potentially ushering in a windfall of cost savings and pollution reductions.

**_Amp up your knowledge:_**
* Evergreen Action: [Why Are Several States Leaving Energy and Housing Savings on the Table?](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3553548/87SdQ4wZ)

clean_body: Read our round-up of climate and clean energy news we're following | | | | Welcome to Evergreen’s Power Surge ! We made this bulletin because we believe you shouldn’t have to choose between keeping up with the news and your well-being. Here’s our latest round-up of the climate and clean energy news we're following—including short summaries and why we think they matter—and positive stories to keep us all hopeful in this fight. (⚡Today’s voltage: 462 words) | | 🔌 News We’re Plugged Into State Building Codes: A Key to Cutting Pollution, Lowering Bills In the absence of federal climate leadership, states have the unique power to take action to cut pollution, save families hundreds of dollars on their energy bills, and support cleaner, more affordable, and more resilient homes. The solution? The straightforward, state-specific process of updating building codes. On the surface, it might not sound like much, but these codes are crucial, as they set the bar for energy efficiency standards in new buildings, covering everything from air leakage to heating/cooling systems to lighting. But for residents to benefit, states need to adopt these standards first—and many states are decades behind. Michigan is the latest savvy state to take advantage of this tool. Thanks to updated codes, new homes will be 32 percent more energy efficient in the first year alone, households will save an estimated $7.2 million in energy costs, and nearly 45K metric tons of carbon dioxide will no longer be pumped into our atmosphere. | | Why this matters —Families are facing high energy costs, and updating building codes is a commonsense, ready-to-go solution for states to deliver for their residents. Many states have yet to take advantage of this low-hanging opportunity, and states that haven’t kept up stand to gain the most from upgrading, potentially ushering in a windfall of cost savings and pollution reductions. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Pop Leaves Bench, Presidential Jet Shift, and a Rare Anemone Found
body:
San Antonio Spurs’ head coach Gregg Popovich announced Friday that he is [stepping down](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb8GOwwcUa8FxTR2b5pXTGlAjnoSFAIn-u7fT-78wtQ72Vlr_flavhxFuvbf7kTLP1taLnxqRGYsS045oruxerzWIxesFPBicgso6KXqpeqW4Ci-F9ME61WYdINWj2aAUYHpm8MGvYZtmF6bB3DaBDWZcez9pH2A8ArQkP2cqV51WiujunbVvt9ATYPrVv2CIIzCQJxKywcy_ri6xXe6sbRrOptoD-ZcRfdLwCxgdn79GLR7-swC5u-cClcB80MFvzmVt4B5L7jvMqecbloPeXlXJdOJ8qGryoguYJEFmQpW6TbGIjVoo7rBTE2xIT8UI9VhFEbtp6P4j4X_r-Bt4W8AAAD__xDihoo) from the position he had held for 29 years and will remain with the organization as team president.

## “Pop” Steps Down
San Antonio Spurs coach Gregg Popovich announced Friday he is [stepping down](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAURb8GOwwcUa8FxTR2b5pXTGlAjnoSFAIn-u7fT-78wtQ72Vlr_flavhxFuvbf7kTLP1taLnxqRGYsS045oruxerzWIxesFPBicgso6KXqpeqW4Ci-F9ME61WYdINWj2aAUYHpm8MGvYZtmF6bB3DaBDWZcez9pH2A8ArQkP2cqV51WiujunbVvt9ATYPrVv2CIIzCQJxKywcy_ri6xXe6sbRrOptoD-ZcRfdLwCxgdn79GLR7-swC5u-cClcB80MFvzmVt4B5L7jvMqecbloPeXlXJdOJ8qGryoguYJEFmQpW6TbGIjVoo7rBTE2xIT8UI9VhFEbtp6P4j4X_r-Bt4W8AAAD__xDihoo) after 29 years and will stay with the organization as the team president. Popovich, a Hall of Famer, suffered a stroke in early November, causing him to step aside from his coaching duties. Affectionately known as “Pop,” Popovich has amassed an [extraordinary resume](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupSAYBOCnwQ4Dv4DHgmIbu7vtlgbh50jCAQJcvb79xn2FLSdfMpnMn6_ty4QY0vu3-aDuPz5vCa8WsXesW8klojmx7ZjsUSq24DD1YDZgICmTlE2bMyHemxic3plb-ICaz0LBzEDI4dCTxBf34KzYGfdy2lG9JLJlN44py-ch6KeMSTZxzgSbRst36YEtykyWv8ARwdCFnuvYD-z4Y5qPdz6xjjZ_hqiP3ksj0y8CK4H1uq4RW0kPEljTbgisred6E1g3AmtwBFYhFjULpR7L39VioyWXfAZ7UJcTUpuNPUJ601a-a6Otm_tJvubUafY-WByqduUKMYamZiLY-2NC_Lep_9-Tp4a_AQAA__9g7IjA) in his time with the Spurs, securing the most regular-season wins in league history, winning five NBA titles, and adding an Olympic gold medal in 2020. The Spurs officially named [Mitch Johnson](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupSAYBOCnwQ4Dv4DHgmIbu7vtlgbh50jCAQJcvb79xn2FLSdfMpnMn6_ty4QY0vu3-aDuPz5vCa8WsXesW8klojmx7ZjsUSq24DD1YDZgICmTlE2bMyHemxic3plb-ICaz0LBzEDI4dCTxBf34KzYGfdy2lG9JLJlN44py-ch6KeMSTZxzgSbRst36YEtykyWv8ARwdCFnuvYD-z4Y5qPdz6xjjZ_hqiP3ksj0y8CK4H1uq4RW0kPEljTbgisred6E1g3AmtwBFYhFjULpR7L39VioyWXfAZ7UJcTUpuNPUJ601a-a6Otm_tJvubUafY-WByqduUKMYamZiLY-2NC_Lep_9-Tp4a_AQAA__9g7IjA), acting head coach since Popovich’s stroke, as the new head coach after the announcement.
## Texas Military Zone Beefs Up Border Security
The Defense Department announced Thursday it will establish [a second military zone](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u5CAQhE9jZx41GIwJCDaZ7G26oQV0e9wSGAuj-bn9ynOFF5ZK-lT1_ftZfjwn3h9_fSbX3mtZdnqdiVqjuhzlSOSfdAba43ZUOhlpb-wXCVIPoAcYF_ScPovq0QVAK3pywqhJGpBK95sTCjDOYtaRyGhBckQIEbWaApgw2Z7dBQMNoxCgYLxFEfQqwU5-jGKW2Ckg5FbqrW3U6O3PNX3Kk-otltwnt7V2nN34p5P3Tt79cR24qivUxjFRJ--ZEzdfP0MoFakOnDM_qm9c9uHLHDK9OZYBDQq9yjGg0TpYHdFCDMH62eI6rb6vDo8Xp8TnZDoFj-w5fZe03_l7Ovk_AAD__5-rhUU) along the Mexican border, based in Texas and attached to Fort Bliss. Personnel in the new military zone are authorized to detain people for illegally crossing the border from Mexico. The first military zone, set up in New Mexico, has already detained illegal immigrants, charging more than two dozen this week with trespassing into a national defense area. The zone in Texas stretches approximately [53 miles](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb8Gd1gPDPZO4SKNu02b0sLwPH4SBgQv43G-PtpV_iD91b33nF-f66ejSOn5050483vPa8KrRWTGupZcIroXtg2TP0rFRgETk1s1aCvBShjW4Cjeq-nCvEF4qA5nNZlRT6CN7Y7ZW79PwwOsgUltU5iGj9Ea--F2PW7K6Y7mrzKwMCgFBobeq83uGh6jG7z60EEYwECca88HMr5d2-OdX1h7n88uzgdzaWL4IfQi9HJdV78xndhyipTwKyT04iqTj9iEXtRkwIDQy79dLfRSMLF75iTxXVwKTW65BqzS_eYjV-JbNvQ5BXlSJHb1ln9yQhnQR1cxSEry-5l0TRoJAJJrzqXJgCXmG0N_8NnVOZSLYqQ2TsLA83QUvyH4_9S_Zv03AAD__3KWmaA), considerably less than the 170-mile strip in New Mexico.
## List: Elon Musk, Wealthiest in Texas
Elon Musk is the [richest person in Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQhZ_GdEbjsb1A4eI2dHvblMjAsFjyYmSPYPftI5IoL5B2vjk_Oh_34e5DDNvjv3-S49eSho3OEomZ8rCnPZI_qIy0TeueqYSZNg5-QEArwUrQw-xDfA-mmt0Ic6cqcqoxN2wAja1W1_gRWqu0sdR0S2OURgToLECLaqG2Cu4yAwtaKTCg60mNdkHobl5PqsVZGKA5cMo1r8T08mWJ73RQrqf0rKJbmfci9D-BvcD-PM96SXmkcmGBfQlMRWD_fTzJR16Z_IWuYIE9GIG9ht8fmcO0UmG5Uy5pk2GTdFB-y8KeSf6oquzm_QwxhnJrhIHH04f4VYn_NuTh8DMAAP__CxKFnw), according to a newly released Forbes list naming the wealthiest resident in each U.S. state. Musk’s placement atop Texas is no surprise, given his $388 billion net worth makes him the wealthiest person in the world. The wealthiest Texas residents behind Musk are Walmart mogul Alice Walton and Dell CEO Michael Dell, both of whom have around $100 billion in net worth and rank in the top 20 worldwide. You can see the wealthiest resident in [every state here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQhZ_GdEbjsb1A4eI2dHvblMjAsFjyYmSPYPftI5IoL5B2vjk_Oh_34e5DDNvjv3-S49eSho3OEomZ8rCnPZI_qIy0TeueqYSZNg5-QEArwUrQw-xDfA-mmt0Ic6cqcqoxN2wAja1W1_gRWqu0sdR0S2OURgToLECLaqG2Cu4yAwtaKTCg60mNdkHobl5PqsVZGKA5cMo1r8T08mWJ73RQrqf0rKJbmfci9D-BvcD-PM96SXmkcmGBfQlMRWD_fTzJR16Z_IWuYIE9GIG9ht8fmcO0UmG5Uy5pk2GTdFB-y8KeSf6oquzm_QwxhnJrhIHH04f4VYn_NuTh8DMAAP__CxKFnw).

On this day in 1968, surgeon Denton Cooley and his associates at Houston's St. Luke's Hospital performed the in the United States. The patient, Everett Thomas, lived for 204 days following the procedure. Have you listened to The Flyover podcast yet? If you haven't--you are really missing out. New episodes drop daily--watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | “Pop” Steps Down San Antonio Spurs coach Gregg Popovich announced Friday he is after 29 years and will stay with the organization as the team president. Popovich, a Hall of Famer, suffered a stroke in early November, causing him to step aside from his coaching duties. Affectionately known as “Pop,” Popovich has amassed an in his time with the Spurs, securing the most regular-season wins in league history, winning five NBA titles, and adding an Olympic gold medal in 2020. The Spurs officially named , acting head coach since Popovich’s stroke, as the new head coach after the announcement. Texas Military Zone Beefs Up Border Security The Defense Department announced Thursday it will establish along the Mexican border, based in Texas and attached to Fort Bliss. Personnel in the new military zone are authorized to detain people for illegally crossing the border from Mexico. The first military zone, set up in New Mexico, has already detained illegal immigrants, charging more than two dozen this week with trespassing into a national defense area. The zone in Texas stretches approximately , considerably less than the 170-mile strip in New Mexico. List: Elon Musk, Wealthiest in Texas Elon Musk is the , according to a newly released Forbes list naming the wealthiest resident in each U.S. state. Musk’s placement atop Texas is no surprise, given his $388 billion net worth makes him the wealthiest person in the world. The wealthiest Texas residents behind Musk are Walmart mogul Alice Walton and Dell CEO Michael Dell, both of whom have around $100 billion in net worth and rank in the top 20 worldwide. You can see the wealthiest resident in . Another shocking report reveals there have already been more than 70 attacks on America's power grid in a single year. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? While the media downplays his record and the Left pretends nothing good is happening, here’s the truth. President Trump has:

* Signed the Laken Riley Act to stop violent illegal criminals

* Lowered energy prices

The results speak for themselves. But the Left will stop at nothing to bury these wins, distort the record, and try to steal the momentum.
We can’t let that happen.
That’s why I’m asking you to weigh in.
**[Please take my First 100 Day Survey to let me know what you think President Trump’s biggest accomplishment has been and what else you want to see in the coming months.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQx_0CGIy40AggpqVHomvgcc_yUfvATGRN40sOmYliFxLAylFtaHEFroEP3Ds)**

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Tariffs – Why You Should Fear Them
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=5703353baa&u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=64804f2adf)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **A month ago, President Trump signed Executive Order 14257, establishing a baseline 10 percent tariff on nearly all imports.** Additionally, the White House announced plans for reciprocal tariffs on 57 countries.

A week later, on April 9, the administration then paused these reciprocal tariffs for 90 days.
---
|
---
| We don’t know if the reciprocal tariffs will take effect after July 9. What is certain, however, is the current tariff landscape: a 10% baseline tariff applies to nearly all imports, a 25% tariff targets car imports and most goods from Canada and Mexico, and a staggering 125% tariff is in place on most Chinese imports.

**Some of my conservative friends like to imply that tariffs are part of a cunning plan to eliminate the federal income tax.** They point out that until 1913 America did not have a federal income tax and the federal government was largely funded by tariffs.

Now I’m all in favor of eliminating income taxes, and I spent much of the last legislative session in Mississippi advocating for the repeal of our state income tax. **But the numbers don’t add up for replacing the federal income tax with tariffs. **

To generate the $2.6 trillion annually that the income tax provides, tariffs would need to average 127% on all imports (even accounting for an estimated 20% drop in import volume). Do that and only rich folk will be able to shop at Walmart.

**Others have told me that we need these tariffs to protect American industry against offshoring and the loss of American jobs overseas. Really? **

Here’s a graph showing US industrial production over the past few decades. **US output today is close to three times higher than it was when LBJ was President.** US factories make almost twice as much stuff as they did when Ronald Reagan left the White House.
---
|
---
_Industrial output went up as tariffs came down ...._
| The growth in US industrial output happened while tariffs declined from 6-8 percent in 1969 to about 2 percent by 2010 (with a slight increase by 2020 due to higher tariffs on China).

**It is true that the number of __manufacturing_ _jobs in America has fallen, as manufacturing output has risen. But that is because fewer workers in industry are able to make more.** The same thing happened in farming a century before.

The loss of farming or manufacturing jobs has not made Americans poorer. It means Americans went and found work in better paying jobs.

That’s why the total number of jobs in America has risen despite the fact that the proportion of Americans working in manufacturing has fallen. **There were 70 million jobs in 1969 and there are 160 million jobs today. So much for free trade taking away our jobs. **
---
|
---
_There are more jobs in America than ever ..._
| “But what about China?” some of my conservative friends then say. “See what happened when China was allowed to join the World Trade Organization, reducing the tariffs on imports to America?”
---
|
---
_Has China impacted US industrial output?_
| Tariffs on Chinese imports to the U.S. actually rose between 2010 and 2020. If anything, historical data suggests that periods with lower tariffs coincided with the strongest growth in U.S. industrial output.

**If China is your primary concern, why impose tariffs on China’s emerging rivals?** China faces significant challenges with debt and demographics. If the goal is to counter its industrial dominance, why burden countries like Vietnam, South Korea, and India—potential competitors to China—with crippling tariffs?

**Americans are rightly worried about China’s industrial might.** It’s alarming that China’s Jiangnan Shipyard builds more ships in a single year than all U.S. shipyards combined. It’s concerning that China produces more drones in a day than the U.S. does in a year.

However, tariffs aren’t the solution. Instead, adopting Senator Roger Wicker’s “Peace Through Strength” proposal would better address these challenges by strengthening America’s defense industrial base.

**Tariffs won’t eliminate the federal income tax, reverse a supposed industrial decline, or solve the question of how to deal with an aggressive China. What they will do is make you poorer and America less competitive.**

Consider your cell phone. Apple has already stated that tariffs will increase its costs by nearly $1 billion this quarter alone. That extra cost? It’s coming out of your pocket when you buy your next iPhone.

**To dodge new tariffs on Chinese goods, Apple is shifting much of its manufacturing from China to India. Don’t expect new iPhone factories in Mississippi or Michigan—think Madras instead.**

The result? Tariffs will make iPhones pricier without bringing Apple’s assembly lines to America. Ironically, the high-value work—design, software, and chips—is already done in the U.S. **Tariffs will simply move low-value assembly from one Asian nation to another, leaving you to foot the bill.**

I fear that tariffs won’t just be seen as having triggered an economic downturn. By doing so they will overshadow all those other conservative wins. If GDP is falling, who’s going to be focused on DEI?

**During my recent trip to Washington, several administration insiders suggested that the current tariff strategy is part of a broader plan.** They claim tariffs are being used as leverage to dismantle restrictions on U.S. exports to other countries.

Whether or not this was the original intent, I hope it becomes the retrospective rationale. For instance, if a close ally like the UK, which runs a trade deficit with the U.S., agreed to eliminate all its tariffs and allow any product sold in America to be sold in the UK, the U.S. could respond in kind.

Such a trade agreement with the UK could set a precedent, encouraging other allies—Japan, India, Australia—to follow suit. The result might be the complete removal of trade barriers between the U.S. and its allies. That’s the optimistic scenario. The alternative is higher costs for everyone, leaving us all poorer.

**Let me close with my favorite graph of all time.** It shows how Mississippi’s economic output rose more in the past five years that it did over the previous fifteen. **What’s the single biggest risk to this growth story? Tariffs.**
---
|
---
_Mississippi is on the up. Don’t let tariffs ruin it ....._
| Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=12b6faff04&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=64804f2adf) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=64804f2adf).

clean_body: Peter, President Trump just delivered the most consequential first 100 days of an American presidency in a generation. But while the media ignores his wins and the Left tries to rewrite the narrative, we want to hear directly from YOU. Here’s just a few accomplishments from President Trump’s first 100 days: ✅ Signed the Laken Riley Act to stop violent illegal criminals ✅ Cut DEI mandates and brought merit back to government ✅ Created over 340,000 jobs ✅ Lowered energy prices and unleashed American energy The results are real — but the fight isn’t over. We need your voice to help push back against the spin and help us pave the way forward as we continue fighting against the Left to help President Trump keep his promises to the American people. Thank you, Team Crenshaw No longer want to receive these emails? . Team Crenshaw, 12645 Memorial Drive, STE F1, Box 211, Houston, TX 77024

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Thank you.
body:
|
#
Hi there, I wanted to take a moment to say **thank you**. Because of your support, we hit our April fundraising goal – and I’m so grateful to have you in this fight with me. I know that in our current political environment, a lot of folks are feeling overwhelmed, frustrated, and worried about where things are headed. You’re not alone, folks. But look at mid-Michigan, and you’ll see that our coalition is having success. Since starting this term, we have: 💰 Returned**$4,569,512** to mid-Michigan families and seniors by helping them navigate federal agencies. ✅**Saved the Saginaw Social Security Office** , after the Trump Administration threatened its closure. 🛣️ Hosted and attended over **110 events** across mid-Michigan. 📜 **Sponsored or co-sponsored 51 bills** to lower the costs of prescription drugs and groceries, protect Social Security, cut taxes for working families, strengthen unions, and much more. I ran for Congress to deliver real results for mid-Michigan families – and that’s exactly what we’re doing, no matter the headwinds we might face. Thank you for being in this fight. I couldn’t ask for a better team to stand with. \- Kristen

subject: White House pushes to strip federal funding from public media

body:
Use your voice to reject Trump’s agenda! >>

| **BREAKING:** President Donald Trump signed an executive order yesterday to end public funding of NPR and PBS to stop what he called "biased and partisan news coverage." [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107000914/543308278/-583442086?refcode=NDCAF_20250503_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVkNWE4Ni0xZTI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymGwyGzllC52zIw7Hfy0uPd3psOFSTm26pRkkvohU_U=&emci=7152dcd6-6f27-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=735d5a86-1e28-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=48524772) If grassroots Democrats don't push back aggressively _now_ ,**MAGA Republicans could wipe out all federal funding for trusted public outlets like NPR and PBS.**
