subject: Always with the people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Have you seen Donavan McKinney’s campaign launch video,
Peter?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250503-1-dm?refcode=em20250503-36637&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36637_1203867_9nfsgX&akid=36637%2E1203867%2E9nfsgX ]Watch it now to hear Donavan’s story and why he’s running to give
Michigan’s 13th district the representation it deserves in Congress →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250503-1-dm?refcode=em20250503-36637&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36637_1203867_9nfsgX&akid=36637%2E1203867%2E9nfsgX ]Screenshot of Donavan McKinney’s launch video that reads Fighting for
the Mighty 13th from Detroit to Downriver

The Mighty 13th is one of the most working-class districts in the country,
and it's being ignored by a multimillionaire Congressman.

Right now, this district is represented by Do-Nothing Democrat &
self-funded millionaire Rep. Shri Thanedar, who bought his seat in
Congress using his personal fortune. Politicians like Thanedar are the
problem: he has more in common with Donald Trump and Elon Musk than people
like us.

But Donavan knows what it’s like. He was raised near smokestacks and
developed a lifelong cough that his mother and grandmother also suffer
from. Growing up, his family moved from apartments to family members’
houses and even lived in their car. Now he has a wife and two young sons,
and is committed to giving them and the rest of his community the
representation and resources they deserve from Washington.

We deserve a Democratic Party that leads the fight against billionaires
robbing us blind and stands up to corporate PACs keeping us down. We
shouldn’t settle for less.

Donavan has never forgotten his roots or the purpose of why he serves:
unlike Thanedar, he’s always with the people, putting them first. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250503-1-dm?refcode=em20250503-36637&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36637_1203867_9nfsgX&akid=36637%2E1203867%2E9nfsgX ]Help
us build the grassroots resources needed to defeat his millionaire
opponent in 2026: pitch in $5 or whatever you can now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250503-1-dm?refcode=em20250503-36637&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36637_1203867_9nfsgX&akid=36637%2E1203867%2E9nfsgX ]Contribute $5

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250503-36637-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36637_1203867_9nfsgX&akid=36637%2E1203867%2E9nfsgX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36637%2E1203867%2E9nfsgX

Government makes most things worse. Lyndon Johnson launched a War on Poverty; Richard Nixon a War on Drugs. Both had good intentions, but their "wars" do more harm than good. name: Gary Sinise
subject: 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
These heroes are counting on you
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlG0Mhyo9JkiOkavVCXfx7yefV_pC2YX-inV7-taMHRwZYGvi_tlhjKcc154xaSmNqAN4XJY6j4y0pgRY3MxvhcNJad4WI4-9X_VmdwqDym3qihSF22s1adYGA57z7VhE2253FUi7ZyZK2Gow1D_e4yCTRCBOpUPqJdMjtka7tMAs1z6NEtNQFDKggxl_ok6rx2Jph82cveExwOwhLEfY47802bYPKcEeU4Hem5l05TPpAv_4OkhNRd3VlaT_m3_Aue)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlG0Mhyo9JkiOkavVCXfx7yefV_pC2YX-inV7-taMHRwZYGvi_tlhjKcc154xaSmNqAN4XJY6j4y0pgRY3MxvhcNJad4WI4-9X_VmdwqDym3qguceXMzYvJmQZsYiARRd8wPtKWITzryHG7ZdaRJ68hNfTUEFetOwxRjBKUrGk6JEA6HgDnErd60W79t6xl6NstorhqueMNEvGbLr-rzJ2itJG7FZfwH9CDmVlwpuFTy23tKOoS3js72sGmaK1RneeO)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlG0Mhyo9JkiOkavVCXfx7yefV_pC2YX-inV7-taMHRwZYGvi_tlhjKcc154xaSmNqAN4XJY6j4y0pgRY3MxvhcNJad4WI4-9X_VmdwqDym3qjfBOzv7r2WiwjBnR4lDe5p8vNTEvV0ZRMSfII8jnJGkdbkgeytP6SE4tPwvjXKd1zcKIRn1tQseTPie5PFAYayJpsaKeez0QMKhdGJ4FwAtL85c0e0jW6OWhseQGadaE3lxjGjT98MIsiuJ9CEF86I)
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlG0Mhyo9JkiOkavVCXfx7yefV_pC2YX-inV7-taMHRwZYGvi_tlhjKcc154xaSmNqAN4XJY6j4y0pgRY3MxvhcNJad4WI4-9X_VmdwqDym3qiD3XNarZlabNVG0fPmlb3bwcEOoN9gxwxy6iT4vXY1y0TeBZYGaEuMABR47mh0J9ICCRIukTMcn3OPa8TnI78QiGF0L-xSZz63QfWY5he3SSEZ8nzugwMWedTW3ozs3N63QLZK1ROGuyP0o_FZp-6R)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlGAksNtEQ4_hzVoDesVGQij0Ngmw7yUWAgCoAj6l1KzjRaEIsT-ixiljmwrjGbjFH2q1U6oz5TLfGD9LmamU1470aSk44Ev7pTAdwgxc3IT7iwiwmEBFY80SF_3B_Fn0j90t8WyQo7HD4Fb-FFKJX6ynzdkxo-wePw00HpltNJY_vKk3mLjLkOyNbY9sKw7LFHGaeNteaG2BzECnoDub4eIL8xm0y7tJqSkDERAet2kf0%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlG0Mhyo9JkiOkavVCXfx7yefV_pC2YX-inV7-taMHRwZYGvi_tlhjKcc154xaSmNqAN4XJY6j4y0pgRY3MxvhcNJad4WI4-9X_VmdwqDym3qgfFFUmIZfkOpY8v1iVpbdwhnwY_WttGFjwlUuOD-MnY9ViMMbCseGWEDe3Ecn3GMxqmRPP1Bo2Uy2kGPAp56RxEHqIXv59szHFFsFi8H2oUHf1CsUJxjBdOrS01O5AkaO1n40hfxH_NfO8Xl7jmOSI) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlG0Mhyo9JkiOkavVCXfx7yefV_pC2YX-inV7-taMHRwZYGvi_tlhjKcc154xaSmNqAN4XJY6j4y0pgRY3MxvhcNJad4WI4-9X_VmdwqDym3qjHbIIe15xqknqkZBV-oCBIEj1FTZw4H0dbUJQrZ5lesFPNZqMiOOXa_zCoauDLFeSHUvCNeuNz4ev716riItxo7jHgQLq1nvgBRKnrkCR7eH9kfpk62yFIitQhBbcNWIuFa7jd_9f7rhomCreBxjWd)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=f9c18314e74e4021aa0a82fdd1c53c28&_e=RgHGp2GpPRvGQqYAVi7tyrytCaRJwsr9015dDNJ655jTX_rS6bfQV54q9YgQ9VlG0Mhyo9JkiOkavVCXfx7yefV_pC2YX-inV7-taMHRwZYGvi_tlhjKcc154xaSmNqAN4XJY6j4y0pgRY3MxvhcNJad4WI4-9X_VmdwqDym3qigGXf5vtXwLViGZFtyGrdLeutuypJEeHiLDjsw4U2mCFYa5CVBvgrF2EiLSF2vswHca7DUz_9OM-3i4DsPeJ4MgIvz9UxaFvDsm3DGUm1He7gKtO_YmYYGpMlrPQ1wHnxVY-rHe9MhjP6nrt7O5ujD)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005974/543323134/-1015631679?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535)**
[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005975/543323135/-1015631679?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) As the legislature concluded its budget session last week, Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith found time to give a bizarre history lesson defending the Three-Fifths Compromise, an historical anomaly that entrenched slavery and was repealed entirely by the 14th Amendment after the Civil War. Make no mistake, Beckwith is promoting these outrageous, racist ideas to distract Hoosiers from his constant corruption. Just this week, [IndyStar uncovered even more](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005976/543323147/-1564005810?utm_source=indystar-hoosierpolitics-strada&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=narrative&utm_term=narrative&utm_content=pind-indianapolis-nletter16&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) about his $90K taxpayer-funded luxury vehicle purchase and the $150K no-bid contract he awarded to his own church’s law firm. Hoosiers deserve so much better than Micah Beckwith’s embarrassing antics. ****_Rokita Ethics Complaint Will Continue_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005977/543323163/-1180371234?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005978/543323236/-1180371234?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) The State Supreme Court Disciplinary Commission upheld the latest ethics complaint against Republican Attorney General Todd Rokita last Friday afternoon. Rokita attempted to have the complaint dismissed, but the Court’s commission rebuked him in a 47-page document. Rokita thinks he’s above the law, but now the Disciplinary Commission could reprimand him _**again**_ like it did over his public [comments about Dr. Caitlin Bernard.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005979/543323282/-1682497401?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005982/543323297/-1494239723?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535)**
[Share Indiana House Democrats](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107005988/543323307/-1494239723?s=46&t=Dj7-Y210GYDWXG21xFaxCQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlkZDVkOS0yMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dh8OMo1oGp6MdE8BzMlZmnWav5LYWmNLnQulAcY003M=&emci=b39cae32-8427-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c19dd5d9-2028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4925535) House Democrats successfully passed 14 bills this session, working across the aisle in the superminority to be the pragmatic problem solvers for Hoosiers. These bills include Rep. Chris Campbell’s HEA 1441, which will allow foster and emancipated youth aged 16 or older to open their own bank accounts without an adult co-signer. In addition, Rep. Mitch Gore’s HEA 1518 prevents state officials from buying luxury vehicles like the ones bought by Diego Morales and Micah Beckwith. Hoosier Democrats will keep working in the months ahead to put important issues on the table for Hoosier families. _**People’s Town Hall Series**_ There are two upcoming People’s Town Hall events yet to come! clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Beckwith’s Three-Fifths Compromise Comments Stir National Firestorm As the legislature concluded its budget session last week, Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith found time to give a bizarre history lesson defending the Three-Fifths Compromise, an historical anomaly that entrenched slavery and was repealed entirely by the 14th Amendment after the Civil War. Make no mistake, Beckwith is promoting these outrageous, racist ideas to distract Hoosiers from his constant corruption. Just this week, about his $90K taxpayer-funded luxury vehicle purchase and the $150K no-bid contract he awarded to his own church’s law firm. Hoosiers deserve so much better than Micah Beckwith’s embarrassing antics. Rokita Ethics Complaint Will Continue The State Supreme Court Disciplinary Commission upheld the latest ethics complaint against Republican Attorney General Todd Rokita last Friday afternoon. Rokita attempted to have the complaint dismissed, but the Court’s commission rebuked him in a 47-page document. Rokita thinks he’s above the law, but now the Disciplinary Commission could reprimand him again like it did over his public Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. House Democrats successfully passed 14 bills this session, working across the aisle in the superminority to be the pragmatic problem solvers for Hoosiers. These bills include Rep. Chris Campbell’s HEA 1441, which will allow foster and emancipated youth aged 16 or older to open their own bank accounts without an adult co-signer. In addition, Rep. Mitch Gore’s HEA 1518 prevents state officials from buying luxury vehicles like the ones bought by Diego Morales and Micah Beckwith. Hoosier Democrats will keep working in the months ahead to put important issues on the table for Hoosier families. People’s Town Hall Series There are two upcoming People’s Town Hall events yet to come! Sign up for our events on May 2 in Lafayette and on May 13 in Culver. We hope to see you there if you’re in the area! Lafayette – Friday, May 2, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET IBEW Local 668, 2535 S 30th St, Lafayette, IN 47909. Terre Haute – Friday, May 9, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Vigo County Public Library, 680 Poplar St, Terre Haute, IN 47807 Culver – Tuesday, May 13, 2025 at 6:00-7:30 PM ET Culver-Union Township Library, 107 N Main St, Culver, IN 46511 Greenwood – Friday, May 16, 2025 at 6:30-8:00 PM ET Greenwood Fieldhouse, 411 S Madison Ave, Greenwood, IN 46142 Muncie – Saturday, May 17, 2025 at 10:00-11:30 AM ET Patterson Block Building, 3rd Floor Ballroom, 108 S Walnut St, Muncie, IN 47305 Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects DUBOIS AND MARTIN COUNTIES – INDOT is taking public comment on the Mid-States Corridor project. Comments may also be shared by calling or visiting the project office. The project team requests comments be submitted by May 12, 2025. FRANKLIN TOWNSHIP, INDIANAPOLIS – Residents in Franklin Township in Southern Indianapolis are invited to provide comments for an upcoming data center project. There is a City Rezoning Hearing May 15th. SOUTH SHORE LINE RATE INCREASE – NITCD is taking public comment until June 12 on a potential 10% rate increase for riders on their line. Public hearings will be on May 8 and June 12. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Tuesday, May 6 from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Building Your Initial Donor List. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Stephen Miller just attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down.
| Recently, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer.

That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care.

**Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89708?t=6&akid=19730%2E878179%2E9VDa6u) **Notice what Stephen is doing here.** He doesn’t _actually_ care about women — men, or anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans.

The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it.

**I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers.**

[Friend, will you stand with me by splitting an urgent donation of $10 between me and the Voter Protection Project right now? Every dollar helps us fight back — and stay laser-focused on what matters.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89708?t=7&akid=19730%2E878179%2E9VDa6u) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89709?t=8&akid=19730%2E878179%2E9VDa6u)

Thank you. Your support means so much to me.

Sarah

Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: We are doing something unlike anything Democrats have done in modern times
body:
Learn more:
---
Derek, I’ll do my best to keep this brief: I’m reaching out with an exciting update on our work here at the DNC. Just the other day, we announced a historic agreement to send $1 million every month into our Democratic state parties. That means your local Democratic party — where you live — is going to start getting new resources to win races that affect your life. This is a huge deal. Here’s how it will work:
* Each state party will now receive a baseline of $17,500 a month, a $5,000 per month increase over the last agreement.
* Republican-controlled states will receive an additional investment of $5,000 a month through the DNC’s Red State Fund, putting their total at $22,500 every month.
* The combined investments total a monthly transfer of more than $1 million from the DNC to state parties — _the committee’s largest investment into Democratic state parties in history._

This is an investment unlike anything Democrats have done in modern times. **Elections are won in states — and that’s exactly where we’ll be investing our resources.** When I ran for DNC chair, I said two things over and over. First, we have to get the DNC out of D.C. We don’t win races in Washington. We win them by pounding pavement, building relationships with voters, and showing folks that we’re on their side. Second, we have to organize everywhere — because when we organize everywhere, we compete everywhere, which means we can win anywhere. Our latest investment is how we start turning that philosophy into reality. We’re putting our money where our mouth is to equip state parties with what they need to reach voters, build long-term success all across the ballot, and gain electoral ground for years to come. So when you get messages like this one asking you for $5 or $10, that’s how your donation will be put to work: Investing in state parties all over the country, and helping elect Democrats to as many offices as we can — this year, next year, and beyond. As always, I’m so grateful for your support. Thank you, Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250503_3326_fr&refcode2=3326_22930333_OLgBjm&akid=3326%2E22930333%2EOLgBjm)
---

**You might be surprised to hear this, but most of our grassroots donations come from emails just like this one.**
**[We're hoping you'll join thousands of Democrats making their first or next donation to the DNC to help fund work like our historic investment in state parties. You can use this link to pitch in:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250503_3326_fr&refcode2=3326_22930333_OLgBjm&akid=3326%2E22930333%2EOLgBjm)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250503_3326_fr&refcode2=3326_22930333_OLgBjm&akid=3326%2E22930333%2EOLgBjm)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250503_3326_fr&refcode2=3326_22930333_OLgBjm&akid=3326%2E22930333%2EOLgBjm)**
---
****

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: I’m running to fight for you in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the BS
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta29ed2ac-8d30-4c1c-ab21-72c2f1b448ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c9c641c-41d4-453f-a01c-9ec6e516fd4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the bullshit. [I’m going to share more about why I’m running. But before I do, if you’re like me and are done with the BS coming from Washington, please split a gift between our campaign and Blue Amp Action now. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T799c7c31-77ee-464f-a2f9-e012008848b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Now I want to tell you a story. I never thought I’d be in politics. But after the 2016 election, like a lot of us, I was fed up. Politics should be about service, not self-interest. And not building up your own power by tearing others down. So I googled “how to run for office.” Seriously. I took on a state Senate race in Michigan no one thought we could win. I took on an incumbent state Senator who refused to do anything about the epidemic of gun violence, who sided with corporate polluters over protecting our clean water, and who didn’t represent us. Democrats and Republicans counted me out because I was young. Because I had never run for office before. Because it “wasn’t my turn.” But with the help of over 500(!) local volunteers, I swung a Republican-held state Senate seat 20 points and flipped a district that included Mitt Romney’s hometown. That victory sent me to the Michigan State Senate. _My approach in the Michigan State Senate is the same approach I’ll take in the U.S. Senate: no bullshit._ Voters know BS. I’ve called BS out in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do as U.S. Senator. Right now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to overwhelm us. That’s their plan; they want us to feel powerless. But we are not powerless. The reality is there’s a lot in common between this moment today and that moment in 2016 when I googled how to run for office. But what that means is that we know exactly how to rise to this moment. This is not a moment for weakness. This is the time to put our heads down and get to work. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. This moment, and what happens next, is on all of us. I will never try to convince you that I have all the answers. Just voting for the right person isn’t going to fix everything. But together, I know we can show Michigan — and the rest of the country — how powerful we really are. Let’s create the future we want to see, together. [So please join me in building that future: make a contribution of whatever you can, split between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to support my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7b264bf-9622-4a9d-ad3c-d7624ce198ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58942cf9-3d36-42c3-9aa2-96964aa83afa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Thank you, Mallory
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250503_mcmorrowlaunch_b2_f1_s2_c2_92op_rs-t1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2c308b1-a0e2-46a8-af85-63dee3668d66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: President Trump just ordered the investigation of ActBlue. Here's what that means and how we're responding.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’ve seen this playbook before. He tried to subvert our elections before. We can't let him do it again.
Peter,
President Trump just ordered the investigation of ActBlue – the fundraising platform used by my campaign and nearly every Democratic candidate across the country.
**Let’s be clear:** Trump is trying to sabotage the engine that powers Democratic campaigns.
We know this isn’t just about ActBlue. This is about consolidating power and going after his opposition. He’s seen our momentum. He’s seen the strength of our small-dollar donations. He’s seen the power of YOU.
Now, he’s going after Democratic infrastructure – trying to dismantle it ahead of our election this November, the midterms, and beyond.
We’ve seen this playbook before. He tried to subvert our elections before. _We can't let him do it again._
**[Now, I'm asking you to donate $10 to our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help send a strong message to this White House. Our election is just months away, and we need to raise every last resource to flip Virginia blue and take on Donald Trump's extremism across the country.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88295?refcode=em20250503-8913&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8913%2E614464%2Eng4f8t)**

Let's keep pushing forward together.

clean_body: We’ve seen this playbook before. He tried to subvert our elections before. We can't let him do it again. Peter, President Trump just ordered the investigation of ActBlue – the fundraising platform used by my campaign and nearly every Democratic candidate across the country. Let’s be clear: Trump is trying to sabotage the engine that powers Democratic campaigns. We know this isn’t just about ActBlue. This is about consolidating power and going after his opposition. He’s seen our momentum. He’s seen the strength of our small-dollar donations. He’s seen the power of YOU. Now, he’s going after Democratic infrastructure – trying to dismantle it ahead of our election this November, the midterms, and beyond. We’ve seen this playbook before. He tried to subvert our elections before. We can't let him do it again. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Even as Trump and his MAGA allies try to rig the system in their favor, we’re standing strong. We’ll adapt. We’ll innovate. And we’ll keep organizing, fundraising, and turning out the voters it's going to take to win this race. Let's keep pushing forward together. Thank you, Abigail Spanberger | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

## AOC Townhall Descends Into Chaos As Protester Shrieks, ‘You’re a Liar!’ – RedState
The Democrats love chaos and unhinged protests—except when it’s directed against them. But sometimes, the chickens come home to roost, and NY Dem Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez found that out the hard way as she was heckled and shouted down at her town hall Friday night. Hi Peter,

Did you know that eight U.S. states are considering legislation that would prosecute abortion as homicide?

According to the _19th News_ , legislators in **Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Kansas, Kentucky, Missouri, South Carolina, and Texas** , most of which already have total abortion bans in place, have introduced legislation that would impose extreme criminal penalties on both providers and patients. The worst part? Many of the states considering these bills still sometimes issue the death penalty to defendants who are found guilty of homicide.

**We are sounding the alarm:** [**Draconian bills like this are becoming more popular in deep red states; states in which men account for more than 80% of the legislators weighing in on these policies. We desperately need more pro-choice women in the rooms where these decisions are being made. At Her Bold Move, we understand our responsibility to _chip away at the male supermajorities_ in the very legislatures that are passing dangerous laws about women. While blue and purple states continue to get the most attention from the Democratic (pro-choice) party, the millions of women who live in red states are being left behind. We cannot let that stand.

**That’s why Her Bold Move has doubled down on our support for women candidates running for office in red states.** Those are the women candidates whose voices are needed most desperately.

And guess what? Our work is making a DIFFERENCE! Last cycle, 44% of Her Bold Move’s winning candidates lived in RED STATES. We want to keep expanding our impact across those states in 2025 and beyond. [**Help Her Bold Move elect pro-choice women to state legislatures in red states by chipping in $20.25 today! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107011077/543334967/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250502bad_N_HBM_IN_10_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhYTVlYWQwLTI0MjgtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FaAlg2QHnwMwdY6IgnBVHNt2F154H2q0Ptrv10i-sRc=)

In Georgia, lawmakers heard hours of testimony on one of these homicide bills, and it even drew criticism from those who support abortion restrictions. **As Elizabeth Edmonds, an anti-abortion lobbyist, stated, “This is a bad bill. It’s bad for women.”** Despite this opposition, **the bill garnered 21 sponsors in Georgia’s state legislature** – the most support it has ever had.

Pregnancy criminalization has been on the rise. In a recent report by Pregnancy Justice, they found that at least 210 pregnant women have faced pregnancy-related criminal charges since the fall of Roe v. Wade, and that number is only going to continue to go up.

**We are outraged by the audacity of male politicians writing laws about our bodies. There is only ONE way to fight back against these extremists: making sure there are pro-choice, pro-_women_ women in all of the rooms when decisions about our bodies are being made.**

[**We cannot afford to stand down. You can help us elect women leaders to these majority-male state legislatures by rushing $20.25 or more right now! Join our movement today! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107011080/543334969/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250503bad_N_HBM_NO_10_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhYTVlYWQwLTI0MjgtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FaAlg2QHnwMwdY6IgnBVHNt2F154H2q0Ptrv10i-sRc=)

Onward,

Kenzie Shelstad

| | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz4iRqqM1-2BRJNyOhahdpaLRqTQMH6SO1Ajg0i0jyf1p5ogZ8Bo6pyH-2BhYkwKz3Z-2BVDz7dBqkI8t4xEMaCCe0DAGnYBs3QRL8Mpxc7IgtfXdY1Dzn4N3IsVrthDIx11UmkpM-3DLZQS_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYh5wTfEjZxgTKIe6i7M4sZoIqQRp7lqA333g-2BeLtFrSHNK5iSe-2FoeHltVBjo68bIXg-2Bqb-2BnLoVKUCtdrcL0Xv5Vs-2FfsOvBMl-2BGTG5LTKYPagmFnBYbgrO4hjjdkuaRTykSrpD2snG8D9n7q632gfMbhnMBnohbT0kIRBn3ze2uRZ1F7XW1PC8waFcJ21uZyNt)

Fellow activist,

Today, NPP is celebrating our FOURTH anniversary! It has been four years of dedication, growth, and impact, and we are grateful to have had you by our side through it all.

Since our founding, we have assisted **more than 50,000** Pennsylvanians in registering to vote. Now, as our democracy is under threat like never before, we are more committed than ever to expanding the electorate and ensuring that every voice in Pennsylvania is heard.
---
[](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz4iRqqM1-2BRJNyOhahdpaLRqTQMH6SO1Ajg0i0jyf1p5ogZ8Bo6pyH-2BhYkwKz3Z-2BVDz7dBqkI8t4xEMaCCe0DAGnGWPBydLfn5-2FOVXhhZhSvxFlwXVlnz7FD7ic3hk62voE-3DfRye_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYh5wTfEjZxgTKIe6i7M4sZoIqQRp7lqA333g-2BeLtFrSH3CgQQgHFvtVJ7A3nfv6KaF-2BPqUVuckpVVkbc9m89YHoJEA6-2Bn-2B0WBe7OOZJC1raYUCZUxXM8-2BZv-2FN1PGP5pYrv5wtWTvdkQjE-2B5DMIvCFQvlT5S0iNlerlcU8zOc3i4a-2BhBgNr1oGL41pH41nph-2FB)
---
Our impact is only continuing to grow. Thanks to your continued support, NPP has grown from a staff of _one_ in 2021 to a staff of _fifty_ now in 2025. As we have increased our capacity, we have also been able to expand our work to include twenty counties across the Commonwealth.

During our time together, we helped to FLIP the PA State House for the first time in over a decade, and protected that majority throughout several special elections, including State House District 35 (Allegheny) and State House District 163 (Delaware). Across NPP’s Independent expenditure Get-Out-The-Vote (GOTV) programs spanning the past three years, **we knocked on more than 250,000 doors across Pennsylvania. Over the last three years, NPP made more than 200,000 calls, and had more than 500,000 conversations with voters on the ground. **

Now, as we near critical judicial and municipal elections, including three seats up for retention on our State Supreme Court, we are going to need to know that we can continue to count on your support.

**[Will you join us in wishing The New Pennsylvania Project a happy anniversary by donating $25 or more today? Your donation will help us continue to engage and mobilize voters ahead of this year’s critical elections.](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz4iRqqM1-2BRJNyOhahdpaLRqTQMH6SO1Ajg0i0jyf1p5ogZ8Bo6pyH-2BhYkwKz3Z-2BVDz7dBqkI8t4xEMaCCe0DAGnODk8ME6-2BPMB9qX0CQ4uSLQifdXeOybwaQ-2F4sJtGxlKopVhBPMA1ccJIZ6NEl0k8gQeYf_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYh5wTfEjZxgTKIe6i7M4sZoIqQRp7lqA333g-2BeLtFrSHQAP2AT0bNzTd5YhZBCjtp2NR3fRDTC41lyjFtI410DWuYvMBgoc70UOFo3CbZ3gDiI2-2B21il9iywgZBgFLxbxjvykL6RT8LZsVIiHGAvL9yZHsr-2BKvPSIiSlfmTsvME3IUCAuQwPGgarfL8tnNhOu)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Today, NPP is celebrating our FOURTH anniversary! It has been four years of dedication, growth, and impact, and we are grateful to have had you by our side through it all. Since our founding, we have assisted more than 50,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote. Now, as our democracy is under threat like never before, we are more committed than ever to expanding the electorate and ensuring that every voice in Pennsylvania is heard. Our impact is only continuing to grow. Thanks to your continued support, NPP has grown from a staff of one in 2021 to a staff of fifty now in 2025. As we have increased our capacity, we have also been able to expand our work to include twenty counties across the Commonwealth. During our time together, we helped to FLIP the PA State House for the first time in over a decade, and protected that majority throughout several special elections, including State House District 35 (Allegheny) and State House District 163 (Delaware). Across NPP’s Independent expenditure Get-Out-The-Vote (GOTV) programs spanning the past three years, we knocked on more than 250,000 doors across Pennsylvania. Over the last three years, NPP made more than 200,000 calls, and had more than 500,000 conversations with voters on the ground. Now, as we near critical judicial and municipal elections, including three seats up for retention on our State Supreme Court, we are going to need to know that we can continue to count on your support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | | Thanks to our community of activists and supporters, we're expanding the electorate across the Commonwealth! We’re so happy to have your continued support. Cheers, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Re: Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Help me stop the Trump Administration from continuing to put our national security and our democracy at risk >>

---
Hi Derek,

If you've been watching the news, then you know that chaos continues to unfold at the Pentagon. It's been a month since our country was shocked by the news of a Signal group chat of our nation’s intelligence officials discussing classified U.S. military plans.
Since then, Mike Waltz has been ousted by Trump but there still hasn't been any accountability for Hegseth for putting the lives of American troops at risk. And it just keeps getting worse. New reporting shows that Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has also used Signal and his personal cell phone to share war plans with his wife, brother, and personal lawyer, among others – _can you believe this?_

**This is so important to me that I introduced legislation that would force Hegseth to step down.** I spoke earlier this week on that effort and will keep at it. I’m doing everything in my power to hold him accountable for his reckless and dangerous behavior.
We are all at risk with Pete Hegseth still at the Pentagon, especially our troops. He's a danger to our nation, and he needs to resign immediately.
**We can't let this administration continue to hide in hopes that this news cycle will blow over. But I can't do it without you.**

[**_Please, will you rush $5 now so I can continue to focus on the important work itself - not the campaign - as we push back on the worst of the offences and position ourselves and our party to return Democrats to power in November?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107014783/543339694/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1123-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjRlOTNlOS0yNjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LePNBqvpfOvbqw7nxlaqrXNrP8U65p9A4Uhb0wLgFSM=)

From: **Chrissy Houlahan**
Date: Wed, Mar 26, 2025
Subject: Hegseth should resign – you and I can help
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107014796/543339708/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjRlOTNlOS0yNjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LePNBqvpfOvbqw7nxlaqrXNrP8U65p9A4Uhb0wLgFSM=&emci=600caa6f-b526-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f24e93e9-2628-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21278485)
Like many of you, I knew Pete Hegseth was unqualified to be our nation’s top military leader. I called for the Senate _not_ to confirm him as Defense Secretary and even asked you to sign a petition to show how much opposition there was to his nomination. We almost did it – Vice President Vance had to break the tie vote.
But even I was shocked by the news of a Signal group chat of our nation’s intelligence officials discussing classified plans for U.S. military action in Yemen. Since then, it’s been one lie after another from the Trump Administration.
I spoke with **[CNN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107014802/543339714/-803653937?v=oaw1OVou7w4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjRlOTNlOS0yNjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LePNBqvpfOvbqw7nxlaqrXNrP8U65p9A4Uhb0wLgFSM=&emci=600caa6f-b526-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f24e93e9-2628-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21278485)** this morning and will keep pushing on all the news shows that will have me. As an Air Force veteran and a member of the House Intelligence Committee, I understand – to my core – how reckless and dangerous this behavior is.
I’m fighting for an investigation, but we don’t need one to know that people should be fired. After committing a mistake like this, one that put the lives of the men and women carrying out the military strikes at risk, Secretary Hegseth should step down.
Will you help me keep pressure on the administration? Not let them hunker down until this news cycle blows over? Help me hold them accountable? You can use your voice online, in letters to the editor, in marches and rallies, by calling your U.S. Senators, and by calling the White House.

name: Johnny O
subject: Johnny O Returns from East Pacific
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/CJO%20and%20Pres%20Whipps.jpg]
Johnny O meets with Sarangel Whipps, the President of the Republic of Palau, who was born in Baltimore.

I recently returned from my first overseas trip as a member of the House’s Foreign Affairs Committee and wish I had better news to report. I traveled through the Indo-Pacific – home to some of our strongest trade partners and military allies.
I met with our counterparts in New Zealand, the island nation of Palau and Taiwan. They all expressed concern over President Trump’s tariffs and his Administration’s cuts to humanitarian aid and disaster relief. They are also losing confidence in America’s security commitments as we cede influence to an increasingly aggressive China.
The message was clear: as America’s global standing shrinks, China’s grows.
We can’t let this happen. I reaffirmed our support for our allies, cemented over centuries of shared history and values. And I will do everything I can to stand up to China’s bullying tactics.
I hope I can continue to count on your support here at home so that I can continue to work to restore our standing around the world. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Why Virginia is key
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Early voting for Virginia’s June 17 primary election just began, which means it’s go time.
At GOTV PAC, we’re jumping in to support key House of Delegates campaigns across the Commonwealth. Because while most people are watching the statewide races, the battle for the House of Delegates is where the future gets decided.
Right now, Democrats hold the chamber by just two seats . That’s all that stands in the way of a Trump-aligned Republican agenda taking hold in Virginia.
And with Donald Trump back in the White House and Glenn Youngkin eager to boost his party’s grip on power before he leaves office, every single seat in the House matters.
That’s why we need your help. We’re gearing up to make strategic investments in battleground House districts — but we need grassroots donors to power this work.
Chip in now to support Democratic victories in Virginia » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05032025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email05032025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email05032025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email05032025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email05032025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05032025]
This is the first true bellwether of the Trump era — one of just two states holding elections this year, and the only one that’s broadly competitive.
The outcome in Virginia will send a national message about how voters are responding to Trump’s second term — and whether Democrats are prepared to go on offense.
We’re going all in on the House of Delegates because if Democrats lose it, even a Spanberger win in the governor’s race won’t be enough to stop Republican overreach.
But we can’t do it without a surge of early support.
Will you rush a donation now to help GOTV PAC organize, bolster, and mobilize in the districts that will decide control of the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05032025&amount=25]
Let’s show the country what happens when we fight for every vote — starting right now.
Team GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05032025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05032025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

body:
| | | The Republican State Leadership Committee, which spends millions to turn state legislatures red, is already launching YouTube ads to rescue vulnerable MAGA incumbent Rep. Ian Lovejoy - _six months_ before the November election.
**Friend, they’re running scared, because our campaign outraised Lovejoy last quarter.**
Virginia Democrats are working to EXPAND a 51-49 majority in the House of Delegates this year, and the Guardian reports, “Virginia elections will test the backlash against Musk.”
Lovejoy has stayed silent as Trump and Musk attack Northern Virginia’s federal workers. He voted against protecting access to birth control and abortion, commonsense gun safety laws, and paid sick leave.
National Republicans are poised to spend millions against us ... and mom, social worker, and labor leader Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to win.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
Honor Veterans with the National Memorial Day Parade
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0MqhVnq4uh3SWze04ln_evSQOKRYfQ7q_Nivr5hqh1lR3Bo2KgVuFBIRz2zlw40mawE0trcc-Hq7daNBHY5jTII94FCl0PYIixK_N40KiRuGoo5PWhfm7uO80MnjeLj06_gt3Lyum7Vqudws0HSDodeN4um1_nVWLA0pP7rYGMpusdbzAz8cTbJHnxXLG-Fo72HqV9znMZX-4o0INjK918696kN15rHrPJpJbGE-CF24VwfzSy9fbmxaDuLldiJUu)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0MqhVnq4uh3SWze04ln_evSQOKRYfQ7q_Nivr5hqh1lR3Bo2KgVuFBIRz2zlw40mawE0trcc-Hq7daNBHY5jTII94FCl0PYIixK_N40KiRuGZeVfpHFYgdLYnUXDJx0xOT9W7vf0oPzFJasQkcLt7UF0lWNHr-sXaziEIGTnnL_GHf8Cm_BE8nryWjkedkiBWxeXaF-byQs3T7STIYkUe1ts3PDGcMV7LxWYEX_HJG7xCp170xVxdTC19vUxX9NNy)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0MqhVnq4uh3SWze04ln_evSQOKRYfQ7q_Nivr5hqh1lR3Bo2KgVuFBIRz2zlw40mawE0trcc-Hq7daNBHY5jTII94FCl0PYIixK_N40KiRuEo-SnRZF8IsCcRwZ_bmNGdDoZX-k2lfeKOe5v0_PDfwBXYroOUYlc5z5330X-MRVea_aaCiH5sP54iLZD9SzVu0KcAGshJod5wCed2s8aclHaOgdlFb3hoc_5RJ-popdwyXsu6HGdWzab3EbHKFwKp)
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0MqhVnq4uh3SWze04ln_evSQOKRYfQ7q_Nivr5hqh1lR3Bo2KgVuFBIRz2zlw40mawE0trcc-Hq7daNBHY5jTII94FCl0PYIixK_N40KiRuEUyADyMSc0FUC-1QZEfohaVOz3kjmof31yimF60cU5_4dIarYYrbk7xVFs11E-DYbh6djCnXZ57GuXOSKNUBEzgcFrZ6_bSxD5dw_6kk1fuQalzfrcAo5IANzuvj8k5An87mP6867kYtVnpPxqn-0C)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0gbhFnlfY1RYsMen7Wh2BxXjQtGi1a-H3lqgVO6Engbt44AZ9zj8GOWRc1Eyccjm7CdmTKtjZ3udYKPbaMOHQet82X5QdKzPnV1qbKFlsw0sZkwqOH1Ld0c8ppC7-pO1AOjdmdfuZZENmAK7yA0oZxETdBvesRMn7047Dx8nRqRH1p9ulHLew6q-whcTjFEuiMuInFfGjIjTRyu1aZmeOts5zCwnjAMCc12GPdm1qaqg%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0MqhVnq4uh3SWze04ln_evSQOKRYfQ7q_Nivr5hqh1lR3Bo2KgVuFBIRz2zlw40mawE0trcc-Hq7daNBHY5jTII94FCl0PYIixK_N40KiRuGnr4fzBzemJ7asug5qbdjmnfRekx89w8kwZIL757_SfYsdDPvyhTeUsYOHOeAFqJx6VI7HPUHQgGrUhkj1ADVHhV7TllrSRDrCbCdVfaDUq4hcEc9ESszDfcv58Sk9rPlTT1k2JdfdLjcOMZueq5oX) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0MqhVnq4uh3SWze04ln_evSQOKRYfQ7q_Nivr5hqh1lR3Bo2KgVuFBIRz2zlw40mawE0trcc-Hq7daNBHY5jTII94FCl0PYIixK_N40KiRuEh-2hflSbpB1AgaZVnQsfzXl8SkBF-TP2JTZRLw1-A51fdc_npRTQig5x4ZsqzH_c4-R3m7xu6c_zwPE5VAt_r1jT8TeEVx0p-jh6oWEzESYh1TuaQsT1ai3AKWMHEXHq2BVG-IzpXtpWnhEi6bfqb)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=993dac26671d4587b9c746b8c353fa08&_e=H8PtG6b-hS3FkCse93bBl3bSP8KOg8jf44KuexEOCVhRqTECmPN48w8Pz5iuYMw0MqhVnq4uh3SWze04ln_evSQOKRYfQ7q_Nivr5hqh1lR3Bo2KgVuFBIRz2zlw40mawE0trcc-Hq7daNBHY5jTII94FCl0PYIixK_N40KiRuF9rD1WbQxogFeelZU9mXGc8mCkK-pmANoKSveCCpEeCBSZAWkbUCXw5C3TPrBgOHkuiwv0jdr-Q2Mc6Q6RVh7jKzoXU45wL4U57rq_PgNuZ83AitmpT4E-FIr1pqembKKas8m-60WRjSTR1usBhuf5)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: Honor Veterans with the National Memorial Day Parade It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

| | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift for our “See You at the Library Day” in the next 48 hours?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9704e7ebe8f54c218f78bec0b64a62cd&_e=FIHPROJtLijelUC3iANRIYlN1015xWs6u2SNA9LZpAmzqEOtMhApkvw0OJ-GUnCBjh4LsNRMSoWm8q_4eKLqSCYK-MH3C4FngJeUOAPXEc3HZFm4uA_lFIhDYtd16aiMi8bBQJP-U4wBVFxwFvJbClG7PQMWh7GJUX8MAY5qXCLGv78GsRuyCc6XqjZqj-U9SxM3PMOSJlPskaZHDWHYl5473JvV5TfcX-ERu1CYhKuxkSstqRoXlM5oZD8pvFF3mYnmwSxxfD_pg7E7XON-R2Ce13zcBJN0h63GUUQqhzgYWcn7rXUWcq5RXRRBoBhQqL_Kbh9_2V_BK2fxJSJWbrEloTx-TpTjZO4ZrfCUSOV3ReQHoezJtTNB-uhYomTzSuXZltdCxRLFUpgm-Wg_xQ%3D%3D)** If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values!**[**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9704e7ebe8f54c218f78bec0b64a62cd&_e=FIHPROJtLijelUC3iANRIYlN1015xWs6u2SNA9LZpAmzqEOtMhApkvw0OJ-GUnCBjh4LsNRMSoWm8q_4eKLqSCYK-MH3C4FngJeUOAPXEc3HZFm4uA_lFIhDYtd16aiMi8bBQJP-U4wBVFxwFvJbClG7PQMWh7GJUX8MAY5qXCLGv78GsRuyCc6XqjZqj-U9SxM3PMOSJlPskaZHDWHYl5473JvV5TfcX-ERu1CYhKuxkSstqRoXlM5oZD8pvFF31gPz16nZa56FGIFygtDb1dVaKBHydUtMj7Fsb99JMpDcl64mhpnzWk7l0KHEbojGwD804i_1cjYDhpOiKPCNdQz-NuE4ntq246S8blyTTzX9CZ_lUM-0yE4OSQzgTbOSA_0Uvt0aQ1oBtKYAQ3GJjw%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **Brave Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **Brave Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **Brave Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.**I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...**...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That’s why I hope you’ll give a sponsorship gift of $175, $350, $525 or more today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9704e7ebe8f54c218f78bec0b64a62cd&_e=FIHPROJtLijelUC3iANRIYlN1015xWs6u2SNA9LZpAmzqEOtMhApkvw0OJ-GUnCBjh4LsNRMSoWm8q_4eKLqSCYK-MH3C4FngJeUOAPXEc3HZFm4uA_lFIhDYtd16aiMi8bBQJP-U4wBVFxwFvJbClG7PQMWh7GJUX8MAY5qXCLGv78GsRuyCc6XqjZqj-U9SxM3PMOSJlPskaZHDWHYl5473JvV5TfcX-ERu1CYhKuxkSstqRoXlM5oZD8pvFF3fcZd0T7xieD-Fr9eWiqVAIxEesEu0Vl1VFM_wjCFYFgJ1RI3hwqTZDmZ3FIO9sUNqHLZq_nDBWKn7NYHL3ume46VQ_gBG6d7-6SmS2M0TsHoo3zl1Uvik-if-5AzdhC2qOEsrJyl66mrglGFJDJHew%3D%3D)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.**Brave Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries.
