clean_body: The counter to drag queen story hour| | | | | Fellow Conservative,Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.And that’s how our nationwide “See You at the Library Day” was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states.On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand “See You at the Library Day” to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children.The exact date in August will soon be announced. And before then, what we need is you!It’s going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing a “See You at the Library Day” event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Can I be candid with you?
body:
Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump’s closest confidantes, I’m certain to be one of the Democrats’ biggest targets once again. |

Peter,

Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. **As one of President Trump's closest confidantes, I'm certain to be one of the Democrats' biggest targets once again.**

As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I am working with the President and his team to pass sweeping legislation that will secure our border and rebuild our economy.

_**I can't wait for you to see our successes!**_

But to be candid with you, Peter, I don't have a lot of time right now to focus on my campaign.

My time is spent working to dramatically reduce government waste and inefficiencies and extend the Trump tax cuts for hard-working families and job-creating businesses, which will help get our economy back on track. Don't forget -- a stronger economy means a more secure nation, whether it's at our southern border or in the world arena.

**My dilemma here is simple:** the more time I spend helping President Trump, the less time I have to raise for what is shaping up to be an incredibly expensive re-election contest.

**[Will you do me a favor and contribute $20, $30, or even $75 to help fund my campaign?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7a9c22cfde1d4ff786b72f452ce77675&_e=K0TO3rXWiijSJEJH-cB7Eu1bAiTqlTrLtkjAIbOqb87LYeKswxyi16XMzmU4iRegKi4lGzRKROTfwIMgyC0yDDF-41lgBYRq0yxHtpmMEzHsbQNj7ZzmXQFpv3i7zIQFdza-iJxINSSM7Z-dE9suL7i7ZteLmYFk1s1BhXsZUOs8hPA-K2pKN3RtJ5SQnYwzWhtzyseMh2CItmxMgqtAfv9pAJg6zoLN8CXXnGvIjdX7VyPXk7xEFhdKZ_AWOzLme0kaM2D0VntN4JtfmNCq9fyXQhmvMnADfTA_UJdxGDP7UfTueIL32b8xPzR9pKH-kmx91drT-kgrIS4OKK1parwJrzsO5sRIQ7D6cCMedkkEmTTHiDWnLHfV2WG1Oi0E1D_5xBMHl3PXgxmzeTMhkQ%3D%3D)** Your support will allow my focus to stay where it needs to be: serving the American people.

clean_body: Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump’s closest confidantes, I’m certain to be one of the Democrats’ biggest targets once again. | Peter, Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump's closest confidantes, I'm certain to be one of the Democrats' biggest targets once again. As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I am working with the President and his team to pass sweeping legislation that will secure our border and rebuild our economy. I can't wait for you to see our successes! But to be candid with you, Peter, I don't have a lot of time right now to focus on my campaign. My time is spent working to dramatically reduce government waste and inefficiencies and extend the Trump tax cuts for hard-working families and job-creating businesses, which will help get our economy back on track. Don't forget -- a stronger economy means a more secure nation, whether it's at our southern border or in the world arena. My dilemma here is simple: the more time I spend helping President Trump, the less time I have to raise for what is shaping up to be an incredibly expensive re-election contest. Your support will allow my focus to stay where it needs to be: serving the American people. | Thank you, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. DOGE is one of the best things to come out of this new Administration. **However, Democrats are starting to go after it with everything they have.**

_They’re even going so far as to call Elon Musk a “Nazi” and say he’s orchestrating a “coup.”_

First, they tried to stall Elon Musk by denying him access to critical data. Now, they're calling for the complete elimination of DOGE. Any hope of restoring fiscal sanity in our government will be gone in one fell swoop. _We can’t let them get away with this._ [**Will you sign my petition to support DOGE and protect it from the Democrats?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._RVEYYeID30TpoA)

body:
| | | Peter, **Did you know that May 4th marks exactly six months until Election Day?**

That’s six months to protect everything we’ve fought for. Six months to defend law enforcement, keep violent criminals behind bars, and ensure Virginia’s Attorney General stands with the people—not the progressive left.

__**[But I can’t do it alone.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/3H4F6A1aZ2TysfPROUydbIaPOvtb7Rzk-pLQBTcpO-GAlN3L5tE9gZhjVV9jUNViajZGpKQM_0jIkc-5UBlAe00xqUDNmMmNs6rT5wPEzjAMxcva1dFujbI2wLwTDJDWZd-2hHCoum2nDMrTwCy9mRIwRnwhPwqrGfxbdykMaLk67dWcCS1FPcZU-aeEwLQw3JlclUSboWatgUCRFPm-sXutjC7gDMXNZsHvWy2x1hPcvnayddU6rwnMbFN1P-5TLrueKs31J3BI6tXqha9iPm_KkMVgkVsT5X1ZIm7lA-B6bYQYZaBROha-JKZzQXgklYdNgHvs9OtWm4bN4eSNCnvHWw0ehlSkrJfbulUoijIrz3C3mIV3Uf1bQ2sP5eJRmCbuGF_Hy0yH6nJ4_jZEsKMcvkIB5Ebdm8Z-Or8qZZbfNjVwL6UazCdboCAuR_L2a_m2tfrq-kVnOWkGQwBX/pMf-YgXZMXyipUvmGKbr-N7SZYASngNp/8)**__

Our campaign is racing toward our end-of-month fundraising goal, and we need the help of every supporter to stay on track so we head in to the 6 month milestone ready to win.

National Democrats have made it clear: Virginia is their battleground this year. Millions in out-of-state money is already pouring in, trying to flip us deep blue. They’re targeting our values, our victories, and the progress we’ve made together.

I’ve never backed down from a fight. But I can’t fight with empty hands.

**Will you step up with a donation to help us defend Virginia?**
__

clean_body: | | | Peter, Did you know that May 4th marks exactly six months until Election Day? That’s six months to protect everything we’ve fought for. Six months to defend law enforcement, keep violent criminals behind bars, and ensure Virginia’s Attorney General stands with the people—not the progressive left. Our campaign is racing toward our end-of-month fundraising goal, and we need the help of every supporter to stay on track so we head in to the 6 month milestone ready to win. National Democrats have made it clear: Virginia is their battleground this year. Millions in out-of-state money is already pouring in, trying to flip us deep blue. They’re targeting our values, our victories, and the progress we’ve made together. I’ve never backed down from a fight. But I can’t fight with empty hands. Will you step up with a donation to help us defend Virginia? Every dollar we raise sends a message: We won’t be bought. We won’t be bullied. And we won’t let Virginia fall. Let’s win this together. Jason Miyares Attorney General of Virginia | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Wes Moore
subject: I wanted to reach out
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to reach out with a quick message directly from me to you.

Making this Maryland’s decade is not a lone effort. It’s only with support
from folks like you, that we’re able to accomplish anything.

Working together, we can be ready for the fight ahead. But that takes a
team effort, so I’m asking:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250503-1?refcode=em-20250503-1&refcode2=31_1086043_lTminO&akid=31%2E1086043%2ElTminO ]Will you pitch in your
first $5 today so we can fuel the fight to
win this decade? Grassroots donations from folks like you are key to our
effort.

Thanks — and have a good weekend!

Elevate,

Wes

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.wesmoore.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=31%2E1086043%2ElTminO

name: Cerebra
subject: 3 Foods That Fight Memory Loss
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9319123/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcHFRTnZVemRrYg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNsWE1SdUJxeA/qP2hpZHM9bmNlejV1dk03Q0FER2tscw/gaBYtag/s7vae917aaf)
| | Why do some people stay sharp as a whip as they get older, while others have trouble recalling names, dates, and even conversations?

New research from Harvard University suggests age may not be the culprit.

And one Boston medical doctor now says memory problems are often caused by the foods you're eating — or NOT eating.

Dr. George Karanastasis, MD says: _"Your brain needs fuel to create new brain cells, recall memories, and focus on tasks. And where does it get that fuel? From the foods you eat."_

However, due to a change in modern dietary habits, Dr. K says most of us aren't getting the nutrients our brain needs. He says this lack of nutrients can cause brain fog, forgetfulness, or worse.

_"When your brain doesn't receive the right nutrients, it literally starts to starve. And that's when you start to suffer those embarrassing senior moments. You might forget people's names, walk into a room and forget why you're there, or even get lost driving to familiar places,"_ Dr. K says.

Fortunately, Dr. K developed a simple protocol that can help fight memory loss.

Best of all, it doesn't require any major lifestyle changes. It just requires adding [**these 3 foods back into your diet**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.).

Dr. K recently put together a video revealing these foods. And since the video was released, it's gone viral, racking up more than 1 million views. Thousands of folks around the country are singing the praises of this protocol.

He says: _"I've seen this protocol work for thousands of people. People keep telling me: 'Dr. K, I feel so much sharper and smarter. Even my family noticed.' It's wonderful to hear how many lives this has changed."_

Now, what about you? Are you concerned about your fading memory? How would you like to take back control of your life?

If so, watch the video at the link below and try this protocol for yourself. You'll discover which foods can help make sure your brain lasts as long as your body.

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

==> [**Forgetful? Eat these 3 foods daily and watch what happens...**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Alexandria, VA 22314

Over half of illegal immigrant households in the United States use at
least one taxpayer-funded welfare program, according to congressional
testimony provided recently by the Center for Immigration Studies
(CIS), and it costs the government tens of billions of dollars
establishing that clamping down on the unprecedented flow of migrants
is only the first step to mitigate the damage of the Biden
administration’s disastrous open border polices. One major area of
concern is government-subsidized public housing, which became
available to illegal aliens under policies established by the previous
administration’s Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD).

body:
Will you take a moment to let me know?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107022576/543358667/-1997846894?code=jtk1867-su-nd&refcode=jtk1867-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmUwZjlmZi0yZjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Bs3_eMkfEzl96IiVtqrY3guNorWFcnpTpxjJ2Bx8c8=)

Peter, it’s been just over three months since Donald Trump took office – and already, we’re seeing the real-world consequences of his presidency.
From mass deportations and constitutional crises to economic turmoil and irresponsible cuts to critical programs, this administration is doing everything it can to tear down the rights and protections we’ve fought so hard for.
And I’ll be honest with you: Their attacks are getting personal.

Because I've fought to block their unconstitutional actions, I've been targeted by Trump and his allies with a full fledged smear campaign.
But I won’t back down. Not now, not ever.
**That's why as I continue these important fights in the courts, I want to hear the personal impact Trump's MAGA agenda has had on people like you.

[Will you take the survey and tell me: How has the Trump administration impacted you and your loved ones? What has changed in your community, your life, and your family's lives since he took office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107022577/543358668/-823796840?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1867-su-nd&refcode=jtk1867-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmUwZjlmZi0yZjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Bs3_eMkfEzl96IiVtqrY3guNorWFcnpTpxjJ2Bx8c8=&emci=8e8661ea-b126-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=52e0f9ff-2f28-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=25369504)**

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick to lead Trump 's commission on religious liberty**," Texas Tribune's **Katharine Wilson** \-- "Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick** has been tapped to chair President **Donald Trump 's** new commission on religious liberty, which was announced during the National Day of Prayer celebration at the White House on Thursday.

"You are restoring the hopes and the prayers of millions upon millions of believers of all faiths," said Patrick, referencing Trump, during a speech at the event.

The commission, according to Trump's [executive order](https://substack.com/redirect/11eaae7a-d91a-44f3-bfde-a8b2be181693?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), will make a report about threats to religious liberty and strategies to increase awareness of religious pluralism in the country.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/84102d8c-c272-446f-a4e3-85c99f8ee559?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This commission is a part of Trump's push to "bring back religion," to the United States. Trump on Thursday touted his pardons of anti-abortion protesters, the reinstatement of military members who were discharged due to vaccine mandates, creation of a Department of Justice task force to eradicate "anti-Christian bias," and executive order against anti-semitism.

**Ben Carson** , the Housing and Urban Development Secretary in the first Trump administration, will serve as the commission's vice-chair. Other [commission members](https://substack.com/redirect/f27ca2c5-0a53-4b97-8a95-e66f0ed6ffe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) include television host Dr. **Phil McGraw** , Cardinal**Timothy Dolan** , various religious leaders, and **Kelly Shackelford** , the CEO of First Liberty, a Plano-based conservative legal organization. Commission members will serve at least until July 4, 2026.

Patrick approached Trump with the idea for the commission, Trump said during his speech in the Rose Garden.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/84102d8c-c272-446f-a4e3-85c99f8ee559?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Patrick, who was in Washington on Thursday for the announcement, said during his speech that the United States was "birthed by prayer," and founded on the "Judeo-Christian ethic," that people can worship without government interference. Patrick accused the Biden administration of having attacked people of faith.

"We have a magnificent inheritance of religious liberty and every believer today, no matter your faith, has a claim to that inheritance," Patrick said.

Patrick has long promoted policies to [infuse religion into public life](https://substack.com/redirect/eade7fb3-8c5d-4d07-86fc-123711e089b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), most recently prioritizing legislation that would require the Ten Commandments to be posted in public school classrooms and allow time for prayer in public schools. Patrick has referred to the United States as "a Christian nation" and echoed many of his political allies in arguing that there "is no separation of church and state. It was not in the Constitution."

"We were a nation founded upon not the words of our founders, but the words of God because he wrote the Constitution," Patrick [said in 2022](https://substack.com/redirect/41e39299-545b-4d45-bad5-64cec8b2ee23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/59bd791a-dade-4f50-bd2b-e3f6bc49dc4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Dan Patrick has been tapped to chair President Donald Trump 's new commission on religious liberty, which was announced during the National Day of Prayer celebration at the White House on Thursday. "You are restoring the hopes and the prayers of millions upon millions of believers of all faiths," said Patrick, referencing Trump, during a speech at the event. The commission, according to Trump's , will make a report about threats to religious liberty and strategies to increase awareness of religious pluralism in the country. This commission is a part of Trump's push to "bring back religion," to the United States. Trump on Thursday touted his pardons of anti-abortion protesters, the reinstatement of military members who were discharged due to vaccine mandates, creation of a Department of Justice task force to eradicate "anti-Christian bias," and executive order against anti-semitism. Ben Carson , the Housing and Urban Development Secretary in the first Trump administration, will serve as the commission's vice-chair. Other include television host Dr. Phil McGraw , CardinalTimothy Dolan , various religious leaders, and Kelly Shackelford , the CEO of First Liberty, a Plano-based conservative legal organization. Commission members will serve at least until July 4, 2026. Patrick approached Trump with the idea for the commission, Trump said during his speech in the Rose Garden. Patrick, who was in Washington on Thursday for the announcement, said during his speech that the United States was "birthed by prayer," and founded on the "Judeo-Christian ethic," that people can worship without government interference. Patrick accused the Biden administration of having attacked people of faith. "We have a magnificent inheritance of religious liberty and every believer today, no matter your faith, has a claim to that inheritance," Patrick said. Patrick has long promoted policies to , most recently prioritizing legislation that would require the Ten Commandments to be posted in public school classrooms and allow time for prayer in public schools. Patrick has referred to the United States as "a Christian nation" and echoed many of his political allies in arguing that there "is no separation of church and state. It was not in the Constitution." But there was another success you may have missed: **The analysts at Inside Elections DOWNGRADED Derrick Van Orden’s chances of holding this seat.** We’re officially a TOSS UP with every major political forecaster! And that is entirely from the strength of this movement that we have built. So truly, thank you for helping get us here. Now comes the fun part: Going from a toss up to a win. The attacks are already starting up to try and curb our momentum, but I’m not fazed at all. Together, we can – and will – keep building towards the worker-first future we deserve. [**If you didn’t chip in before our end-of-month deadline, this is the perfect time to make your impact felt. clean_body: Millions of grassroots Democrats use ActBlue to participate in our democracy, to power candidates, campaigns, and organizations like the DLCC, and to give our party the resources it needs to win. | | | | | ---|--- | Trump is attacking ActBlue, Democrats’ grassroots fundraising platform. While Trump claims that his sham investigation will make our elections safer and more secure, this is nothing more than a pathetic continuation of his “Big Lie.” He wants to silence his opponents – even if it means sacrificing our democracy. Millions of grassroots Democrats use ActBlue to participate in our democracy, to power candidates, committees, and organizations like the DLCC, and to give our party the resources it needs to win elections up and down the ballot. Trump knows exactly what he’s doing. This shameless attack on our democracy cannot go unanswered. Now more than ever, it’s critical that we elect Democrats who will stand up to Trump’s authoritarian agenda in our statehouses. Will you donate via ActBlue to help strengthen our blue firewall in the states and defeat Trump’s MAGA allies nationwide? Use your personalized link below: We’re in this together. Team -- Amid Donald Trump and Elon Musk's calls to demolish vital news sources like MSNBC, PBS, and NPR, Justice Sonia Sotomayor has a _dire warning:_ **Unless we stand up for a free press and independent media, "we're going to lose our democracy."**

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump and Musk want!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 11:10 A.M. ET, we're still waiting for your signature, and the petition closes at midnight! **Please, sign on now:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to stand with PBS, NPR, MSNBC, and freedom of the press>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250503-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250503-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=20145%2E9716520%2EHc9i22)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: A slap in the face to taxpayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39696%2E3422442%2Er7iydu)
Dear Derek,
Last month, shortly after Tax Day, the Trump administration announced that the federal government would stop offering Direct File, which let taxpayers file with the IRS for free.
I championed this program in Congress, because it made government work better for everyday Americans.
**This is another one of Trump’s cuts that doesn’t help anyone except his cronies.**
It’s doubly offensive when we also consider how his cuts to the IRS have let more tax cheats get away with not paying what they owe—to the tune of half a trillion dollars collectively.
It seems like that’s what this Trump presidency has been all about: **hijacking government to work great for Trump and his allies, at the expense of working people.**
As long as Trump continues to hurt families, I’m not backing down. I’m going to continue calling out the BS and keeping you informed.
**[Will you chip in $5 to my campaign for governor, so I have an even bigger platform to push back against Trump’s harmful policies?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250503_1_ak?refcode=em20250503-39696&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39696_3422442_r7iydu&akid=39696%2E3422442%2Er7iydu)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250503_1_ak?refcode=em20250503-39696&refcode2=39696_3422442_r7iydu&akid=39696%2E3422442%2Er7iydu)
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250503-39696&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39696_3422442_r7iydu&akid=39696%2E3422442%2Er7iydu)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39696&t=4&akid=39696%2E3422442%2Er7iydu)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39696&t=5&akid=39696%2E3422442%2Er7iydu)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107024809/543364844/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250503_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzdmYmU0Ny0zMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LITA9fPC7UjUXIDiPZZblriMNMXuTwLIYkhvshjYhKc=)
---
I needed you to hear this from me:
1\. The richest man alive, Elon Musk, bought Donald Trump another term in the White House – and now he holds [TERRIFYING](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107024810/543364845/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250503_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzdmYmU0Ny0zMDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LITA9fPC7UjUXIDiPZZblriMNMXuTwLIYkhvshjYhKc=) power over our country.
2\. New York GOP Rep. Mike Lawler **[steamrolled Democrat Jared Moskowitz](https://substack.com/redirect/f8ee7b99-df35-4f71-b32c-2eb8216dadd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a fiery live T.V. confrontation on CNN about President Trump's first 100 day economic track record.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f8ee7b99-df35-4f71-b32c-2eb8216dadd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f8ee7b99-df35-4f71-b32c-2eb8216dadd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"He told everybody that the economy was terrible under Joe Biden, it wasn't, but that's what he told people,... the economy in every metric is worse in the first 100 days than it was before he got elected," Moskowitz said. "The stock market is worse. egg prices were highest on Easter than any Easter we've ever had!"
Lawler patiently sat and waited for the Democrat to finish, but he just couldn't let this go on any further. "Respectfully, look, if we do not pass the tax bill it will be the single largest tax increase in American history. And Democrats are planning to vote against the tax bill! You wanna focus on tax the rich, but the fact is, if you do not pass the tax bill it will be the biggest tax increase in American history. The standard deduction would be cut in half! Do you want that?!"
Lawler continued to lambast the Democrat for his party's reckless and shallow economic policy which lead to massive inflation.
"Over the next 10 years we're projected to spend $86 trillion, we're running $2 trillion deficits," Lawler said. "That exploded under Joe Biden's first 2 years where he increased spending by $5 trillion. That's what gave us the record inflation!"

| | ** _Friend,_** I’ve worn the uniform. I took the oath. I fought human traffickers as an FBI special agent. In Congress, I helped hunt down terrorists. **I’ve fought to protect this country my entire adult life.** Now I’m stepping back into the fight — this time for the future of America. Michigan is the #1 Senate battleground race in 2026. If we win here, we will grow President Trump’s majority. If we don’t win, Chuck Schumer and Bernie Sanders keep full control._It’s that simple._ I’m running because we need conservative warriors — not spineless politicians — to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with President Trump and take our country back. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Sign On: Protect Funds for Life-saving Research
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4696%2E35263%2EYhyUTE)
Peter — the Trump administration wants to cut funds for life-saving research, and I’m fighting back. I was proud to lead a forum on how this administration is recklessly cutting funding for research to develop cures to cancer, Alzheimer’s, and more. At that event, we heard from a 10-year-old boy who shared what it’s like watching his dad battle ALS. He wanted our help protecting the life-saving research being done at the NIH so his dad can live long enough to see him graduate from high school. Staffing cuts at our nation’s Health Department affect support for lifesaving research, hope for families, and cures for serious illnesses. Growing up, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and had to watch my grandparents stay up at night, worried about my health and how to afford my care. The Trump administration and RFK Jr.'s harmful cuts to HHS put the health of all Americans in jeopardy. I know what it’s like to live with pre-existing conditions, which is why I’m standing firm against these cuts in defense of American families. **[If you agree that these funds should stay with the HHS to fund lifesaving research, please add your name to my petition today:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2505_lifesaving_research?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250503_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4696%2E35263%2EYhyUTE)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2505_lifesaving_research?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250503_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4696%2E35263%2EYhyUTE)
---
Thank you,
Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4696%2E35263%2EYhyUTE) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4696%2E35263%2EYhyUTE)**

This is especially urgent as Israel’s government continues its two-month blockade, preventing any items from entering Gaza, even as thousands of aid trucks line up outside. **But now André Carson has a new Democratic primary opponent, who has boasted about meeting with and seeking funding from AIPAC.** During last year’s election cycle, the Islamophobic, anti-Palestinian group spent over $100 million to support lawmakers who’ll keep aiding Israel’s war crimes. Primarily funded by right-wing billionaires, AIPAC is the biggest source of Republican money interfering in Democratic primary elections. [**Now’s the time to donate to André Carson’s campaign. Together we can stand up to AIPAC, show strong early fundraising numbers, and keep this progressive human rights leader in Congress. While serving Indiana’s 7th congressional district, Congressman André Carson has gotten 24 bills signed into law and brought back over one billion dollars to his district.
Now he’s holding rallies and workshops in his district to resist Trump’s attacks, and we’re both working with local grassroots groups to share “know your rights” information with our immigrant neighbors.
Congressman Carson is also one of four Muslims now serving in Congress, including me.
He and I fought Trump’s first Muslim ban, and we’ve both led legislation to lift up Muslim Americans, a community that has felt unseen for far too long. As hate crimes and other attacks against Muslim Americans are on the rise, our leadership is needed more than ever.
**Our presence in Congress challenges the narrative of who deserves to have a voice in our government. It sends a message to Muslim Americans and other marginalized people: You belong.**
Each year we hold Congressional Iftar dinners to celebrate Ramadan at the Capitol with colleagues. And last year André established Congress’ first-ever interfaith space for staff and interns, saying it “encourages interfaith engagement—a key tenant to achieving a more peaceful, understanding community.”
We know that all life is precious, and we will continue fighting for a world where all people can thrive with dignity and peace.

clean_body: We don’t take money from AIPAC and we’re not afraid to stand up for everyone’s rights. | | | Friend, Congressman André Carson is among the few members of Congress who consistently stands up for Palestinians’ human rights, and who doesn’t take money from AIPAC. Right now he’s leading legislation to reinstate humanitarian aid funding to UNRWA, the UN group serving Palestinians. This is especially urgent as Israel’s government continues its two-month blockade, preventing any items from entering Gaza, even as thousands of aid trucks line up outside. But now André Carson has a new Democratic primary opponent, who has boasted about meeting with and seeking funding from AIPAC. During last year’s election cycle, the Islamophobic, anti-Palestinian group spent over $100 million to support lawmakers who’ll keep aiding Israel’s war crimes. Primarily funded by right-wing billionaires, AIPAC is the biggest source of Republican money interfering in Democratic primary elections. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Andre Carson and Rashida Tlaib. | | | | | | | | | | While serving Indiana’s 7th congressional district, Congressman André Carson has gotten 24 bills signed into law and brought back over one billion dollars to his district. Now he’s holding rallies and workshops in his district to resist Trump’s attacks, and we’re both working with local grassroots groups to share “know your rights” information with our immigrant neighbors. Congressman Carson is also one of four Muslims now serving in Congress, including me. He and I fought Trump’s first Muslim ban, and we’ve both led legislation to lift up Muslim Americans, a community that has felt unseen for far too long. As hate crimes and other attacks against Muslim Americans are on the rise, our leadership is needed more than ever. Our presence in Congress challenges the narrative of who deserves to have a voice in our government. It sends a message to Muslim Americans and other marginalized people: You belong. Each year we hold Congressional Iftar dinners to celebrate Ramadan at the Capitol with colleagues. And last year André established Congress’ first-ever interfaith space for staff and interns, saying it “encourages interfaith engagement—a key tenant to achieving a more peaceful, understanding community.” We know that all life is precious, and we will continue fighting for a world where all people can thrive with dignity and peace. Thank you so much for your support. Grassroots donations help ensure progressive candidates have a chance against billionaires’ ever-increasing spending in our elections. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | Did you see my appearance on Jimmy Kimmel’s show this week? I took off the gloves and took big swings at Pete Hegseth (our country’s favorite DUI-hire), the idiot known as Elon Musk, and the dumbest person in Congress: Marjorie Taylor Greene. **Then, I turned my attention to Donald Trump. I responded to his calling me a “very low IQ person” and challenged him right then and there to an IQ test.** [If you're with me, please donate a few bucks to support my campaign to take back Congress and send a message to the MAGA idiots running this Administration that we're done playing games:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107027615/543374633/2041312630?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050325_CROCKETTSPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ1YTkzYS0zOTI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft8lcaG64p7OK6kvjBYnKq0kOFEk7ohwvVBEKq3ZE30=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107027616/543374634/2041312630?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050325_CROCKETTSPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ1YTkzYS0zOTI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft8lcaG64p7OK6kvjBYnKq0kOFEk7ohwvVBEKq3ZE30=) | | **[DONATE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107027617/543374635/2041312630?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_050325_CROCKETTSPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQ1YTkzYS0zOTI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft8lcaG64p7OK6kvjBYnKq0kOFEk7ohwvVBEKq3ZE30=)**

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: We must stay focused
body:
Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. As one of President Trump’s closest confidantes, I’m certain to be one of the Democrats’ biggest targets once again. |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cfce8d6478fd434d9fe0806328156796&_e=8BxTssgCYQF2QH_iXu8WzxaHT1SJTZSD68BS-mtcv05kJbpwFkPov3jbFZ5-d9xvdU-rZWqun6VUjg3XfjNJoPUlg9pXnyzR5LmglpbRg7dFH5yCavi_gJYkqG__COdilexsBs-TG77EyAzYE7i1i1IPAoTii7K_XTvnO5S7eSaBi9s1FyIPczvueV3_eilWMVxXRznYdVIvV0uX1pkslcopD4nP3xjRcYP1V4Ay35DNY7UjQF9ASqKT06HqJO5lJSqIya0jYEsJybKPFmpD_e8HVCkN1DK4IlvRcgJdlEEGuYEy-g1j7oOuK82pRSGSmV5_TNmzdvO7Ch1wgmbYzIYfRuEWAcqOOb9a6maectUUOjF26uuw5oqSCAC_CBmAiFHt1qEPmk5FR_IwitpwLA%3D%3D)
Peter,

Soon, I will face the voters of my Palmetto State as I seek re-election. **As one of President Trump's closest confidantes, I'm certain to be one of the Democrats' biggest targets once again.**

As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I am working with the President and his team to pass sweeping legislation that will secure our border and rebuild our economy.

_**I can't wait for you to see our successes!**_

But to be candid with you, Peter, I don't have a lot of time right now to focus on my campaign.

My time is spent working to dramatically reduce government waste and inefficiencies and extend the Trump tax cuts for hard-working families and job-creating businesses, which will help get our economy back on track. Don't forget -- a stronger economy means a more secure nation, whether it's at our southern border or in the world arena.

**My dilemma here is simple:** the more time I spend helping President Trump, the less time I have to raise for what is shaping up to be an incredibly expensive re-election contest.

**[Will you do me a favor and contribute $20, $30, or even $75 to help fund my campaign?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cfce8d6478fd434d9fe0806328156796&_e=8BxTssgCYQF2QH_iXu8WzxaHT1SJTZSD68BS-mtcv05kJbpwFkPov3jbFZ5-d9xvdU-rZWqun6VUjg3XfjNJoPUlg9pXnyzR5LmglpbRg7dFH5yCavi_gJYkqG__COdilexsBs-TG77EyAzYE7i1i1IPAoTii7K_XTvnO5S7eSaBi9s1FyIPczvueV3_eilWMVxXRznYdVIvV0uX1pkslcopD4nP3xjRcYP1V4Ay35DNY7UjQF9ASqKT06HqJO5lmN2kKjUg-ak5Ehu-xVNYsruQwmCanvcMeMTDchDC7s8wgWpGNodsG5QgVO_fVzfhdnpNk6rm40erQFFMWdP0ms6GUw0n7_CSAvunpyAldBwnmjqf2Rcy8yDNnsPqRWzQmtlLySRsYhlqdQlj_TQCKA%3D%3D)** Your support will allow my focus to stay where it needs to be: serving the American people.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Tell Congress: No military parade for Trump’s birthday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
During Trump's first-term, we organized and helped stop his repeated efforts to hold a military parade.
#
During Trump's first-term, we organized and helped stop his repeated efforts to hold a military parade.
One time, we requested and were awarded a permit to host a 5-K road race on the parade route. One K for each of his deferments.
Now Trump is trying again - he wants a parade on his birthday that, according to the Associated Press, would include "more than 6,600 soldiers, at least 150 vehicles, 50 helicopters, seven bands and possibly a couple thousand civilians."
This parade would be far from the national celebration that Trump claims, it would be an international embarrassment. His wishes for this event are not about celebrating the military, they are about his fragile self-image needing a public display of the military honoring him.
And he's doing it at a time his administration is looking at cutting veterans health care and housing cuts to fund tax cuts for the rich.
No.
If this parade is going to be stopped, it'll be the voices of veterans who make it possible. But we can't do it alone.
[**Sign VoteVets petition: Tell Congress the American people believe a military parade would be a huge mistake, and that the military is not there to be used and abused to prop up the president's fragile self-image.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250503_vv_em_no_parade/?source=em250503-1-30&akid=34391%2E3013755%2EF2mzw3)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250503_vv_em_no_parade/?source=em250503-1-30&akid=34391%2E3013755%2EF2mzw3)
---
This is a president who has continually shown himself to have authoritarian tendencies and this is just another worrying example.
Thanks for making your voice heard.
The team at VoteVets
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250503_vv_em_no_parade/?source=em250503-1-30&akid=34391%2E3013755%2EF2mzw3)
---

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

subject: your vote matters, Derek

body:

Hey, Derek, it’s John.

There’s a lot of sh*t happening in the world right now. But we gotta remember: Protecting the right to vote has NEVER been more important.

Voter suppression, gerrymandering, and election-denial BS – these are all attacks on our democracy. And they aren’t just dangerous, they’re un-American.

So I’ve got a favor to ask yinz. 👉 Will you take my Voting Rights Survey right now?

I’ve always fought like hell to protect and expand voting rights. That means getting rid of partisan gerrymandering. That means calling out dumb lies when politicians try to toss out votes they don’t like. That means getting big money out of politics.

So if you care about protecting our democracy, I wanna hear from you. Please, click here to take my Voting Rights Survey.

John ❤️

# [Sign your name: NO Military Parade for Trump!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0cd0560b-a15d-4a65-b3a3-a6bdcc2b0a0e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Leaked documents revealed plans for a military parade on Trump's birthday in June, which would include more than 6,600 soldiers, at least 150 vehicles, 50 helicopters, seven bands, and more. This ridiculous spectacle would likely cost tens of millions of dollars in taxpayer money – while Trump slashes important government programs that benefit veterans. Trump wants to join the ranks of other dictators who put their militaries out on display for their own egos – he's been pushing for a parade in his honor since his first term. This is NOT okay. We need to show overwhelming disapproval of this wildly inappropriate spectacle.

[**Sign your name: Absolutely NO military parade for Trump >> **](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tebed9ca7-8faa-46b8-840d-266db51b78f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Lucas Kunce via Substack
subject: The Shortcomings of Bully Foreign Policy
body:
A new angle on tariffs and how our current foreign policy could topple the empire

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.8RHZ9eIqqPbSF6CNUav_btnqtZY8cnjaL8G5-KKV3mA?) for more
---
[](https://substack..0ku5Mm9nt9KVMx-Ej3BaBDVa-5cy7PJd42Ob2fKiCXI?)
---
# [The Shortcomings of Bully Foreign Policy](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=162765832&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzY1ODMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDYyOTA3ODgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODg4Mjc4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0HlwCsUoWKckA6ukpbGpb9IFEU7xmUdh1qIahHRKx14)
### A new angle on tariffs and how our current foreign policy could topple the empire
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| May 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=162765832&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzY1ODMyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjI5MDc4OCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ4ODgyNzg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4_DIqCo0NZ9-vjeKBEbMwABSybCAwkUXHX5hzxmrVUI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=162765832&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzY1ODMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDYyOTA3ODgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODg4Mjc4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0HlwCsUoWKckA6ukpbGpb9IFEU7xmUdh1qIahHRKx14&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=162765832&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzY1ODMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDYyOTA3ODgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODg4Mjc4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0HlwCsUoWKckA6ukpbGpb9IFEU7xmUdh1qIahHRKx14)
---
| | [](https://substack..4OmwiKIeOHUJ6rkdegeTxLrkaA7tjOSwysRb8XFwIao?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/the-shortcomings-of-bully-foreign?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Sometimes, being a bully works.
When I was growing up, one of my mom's two favorite Christmas movies - that we watched every year - was [A Christmas Story](https://substack.com/redirect/9f042169-ba73-44ea-b1b6-1a77b6888ee1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The main character, Ralphie, and his pals spend half the movie running in terror from the local orange-tinged bully, Scut Farkus, and his sidekick, Grover Dill.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eae32eec-2d0e-4259-b968-248e074c5beb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For a while, being a bully works for Scut. He owns the neighborhood and gets away with whatever he wants. Until, that is, one fateful day when he accosts Ralphie in a moment where Ralphie felt he had nothing to lose. Ralphie fights back, pummels Scut into the snow, and ends Scut's reign of terror forever.
Because bully power doesn't survive an embarrassing ass-whupping.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.nAvv--O-5L2Y3cM4Vm0KkKHgCBjG2BRh2cR-74xrbfU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=162765832)
Many observers over the years have likened foreign affairs to the schoolyard, something that I saw firsthand doing arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia when I was a Marine on the Joint Staff at the Pentagon. And, in 1956, the United Kingdom, just like Scut Farkus, learned the hard way just how true that is.
Although its empire was in the midst of decolonization, the UK was still considered a top world power and had long exercised bully politics in the Middle East, where it had controlled the Suez canal for nearly a century.
In July of 1956, though, to mark the fourth anniversary of his power-taking coup, [Egyptian President Gamal Abdel Nasser nationalized the Suez Canal Company](https://substack.com/redirect/46146577-8aaa-4c2a-a4b5-b3eaad6b5b05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), seizing control of the Suez Canal from the British-French enterprise that had owned and operated it since its construction in 1869.
The UK, still thinking it was a great power, responded with force, teamed up with its sidekick, France, and invaded Egypt. The US and USSR were both furious and demanded that the troops withdraw. The US threatened to offload its British currency bonds, which would have wrecked the UK financially, and the UK was forced to slink away with its tail between its legs. A United Nations peacekeeping force came in. The UK ceded the canal to Egypt forever, and the British prime minister was forced to resign in shame. The whole world now knew that the UK could no longer do its own thing without US permission, exposing it [as a second-rate power](https://substack.com/redirect/524e9bce-da67-44fb-b7d3-7af9902af861?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Exposure is the worst thing that can happen to a bully, both on the playground and on the world stage, and right now the US seems to be seeking exposure risk in every single direction.
To continue the analogy, we used to be the rich cool kid out on the playground. Sure, we pushed some other kids around and excluded others, and not everyone liked us, but we always had a circle, and everyone wanted to be in it or at least wished they had something similar. But over the last few months, we decided to cast our circle aside and pick fights with every single kid on the playground
We've won more than a few of these fights over the years, and will probably win most of these, just like the UK discovered, you can't always win them all. And the more fights you pick, the higher the chance that someone with nothing to lose will smoke you, and if you've tossed your circle aside, well they might just take that, too.
Unfortunately, according to Rick Waters, former coordinator of the State Department's China House, at least one of our targets seems [ready to fight back](https://substack.com/redirect/f36752b5-9185-4432-ab3d-18c5c7160f92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
"I spent most of March in China prior to the tariff announcement and it was clear the Chinese aren't going to pay tribute to another emperor."
Since then, China's leadership has repeatedly said in the news that they have prepared for this and are ready to go. We might have found a government that thinks it has more to gain than to lose by fighting back, a sentiment that seems to extend to at least some of its people, too.
"We don't care about sales to the United States," Hu Tianqiang, a maker of toy fighter jets, [recently told the BBC](https://substack.com/redirect/24da3ef7-23c8-418d-9dcb-650119c5b634?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). "Other countries have money too!" he added. "We now sell mostly to South America and the Middle East. We are not lacking money, we are rich."
Despite Treasury Secretary Bessent repeatedly saying, as if the repetition will make it true, that China needs us more than we need them, China hasn't made public overtures to the US to negotiate. In fact, in one critical way the US is in a similar position to the UK back in 1956. Remember how the US threatened to sell UK bonds to sink their economy during the Suez crisis? Well, China owns nearly $1 trillion in US debt.
And it seems instead that, despite Bessent's cool insistence that everything is good, the US is tasting fear after [China said that](https://substack.com/redirect/f9448aec-06ef-4870-8589-a3142a8c0bba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "if the United States insists on having its way, China will fight to the end." In fact, it appears that after picking this fight we have now [reached out to China through multiple channels](https://substack.com/redirect/cd52ff3b-f914-4574-824e-4dca2b304fbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to try to prevent an ass-whupping that exposes on the world stage.
And it's not just China that doesn't respect us anymore. Russia has seemingly refused to accept a single term proposed by the Trump administration in the Ukraine negotiations, causing Secretary of State Marco Rubio to [admit that the US](https://substack.com/redirect/63f698bb-26f6-4dd1-9ce0-4ed59e25be55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) might just have to "move on."
Steve Witkoff, Trump's Iran envoy, even admitted- [before hastily retracting it](https://substack.com/redirect/142e2083-cbab-49f6-bd52-289a2164aaf1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)- that in order to get an Iran deal they might just have to let Iran keep enriching uranium (the exact thing they mocked the Obama administration for allowing).
We all know that deep down the root of bullying is cowardice, and these guys seem to be tasting the fear that their one dimensional bully foreign policy is going to get exposed. People are already calling their bluffs and the next step, public humiliation, will bring the whole house of cards crashing down around us.
In which case, left alone on an island, our best case scenario will be to become post-1956 Britain, and our worst case scenario will be to turn into modern Russia: a shell of a country with an oligarchy reliant on vast military expenditures and fossil fuels, just waiting until it all runs out.
As always, though, where there's failure, there's opportunity.
If there's one thing the American people will not stand, it's to be humiliated and made weak. This could be a real turning point in domestic politics if folks start to feel humiliation and weakness creeping up on our country.
One note on that, though, is that it's not the other countries judging us that matters. People love feeling judged, especially by foreigners/outsiders. So if you're talking about this, the point isn't that our policy is embarrassing and that other people think we are stupid. That's not humiliation, that's a reason to stay the course to prove folks wrong. The point to get across is that we are on the verge of losing.
And that losing will not just be humiliating, but it will cost us our way of life and turn us into a second-rate power like Great Britain. Believe me, no red-blooded American wants us to become the UK.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=162765832&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNzY1ODMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDYyOTA3ODgsImV4cCI6MTc0ODg4Mjc4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0HlwCsUoWKckA6ukpbGpb9IFEU7xmUdh1qIahHRKx14)
As always, please share this with anyone you think might find it valuable, particularly folks who are looking for a way to talk about what is happening internationally with a tariff talking point that goes beyond the price of goods.
Lucas

A new angle on tariffs and how our current foreign policy could topple the empire | | | May 3 | | | | | | | | | | | | Sometimes, being a bully works. When I was growing up, one of my mom's two favorite Christmas movies - that we watched every year - was . The main character, Ralphie, and his pals spend half the movie running in terror from the local orange-tinged bully, Scut Farkus, and his sidekick, Grover Dill. | | ---|---|--- For a while, being a bully works for Scut. He owns the neighborhood and gets away with whatever he wants. Until, that is, one fateful day when he accosts Ralphie in a moment where Ralphie felt he had nothing to lose. Ralphie fights back, pummels Scut into the snow, and ends Scut's reign of terror forever. Because bully power doesn't survive an embarrassing ass-whupping. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Many observers over the years have likened foreign affairs to the schoolyard, something that I saw firsthand doing arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia when I was a Marine on the Joint Staff at the Pentagon. And, in 1956, the United Kingdom, just like Scut Farkus, learned the hard way just how true that is. Although its empire was in the midst of decolonization, the UK was still considered a top world power and had long exercised bully politics in the Middle East, where it had controlled the Suez canal for nearly a century. In July of 1956, though, to mark the fourth anniversary of his power-taking coup, , seizing control of the Suez Canal from the British-French enterprise that had owned and operated it since its construction in 1869. The UK, still thinking it was a great power, responded with force, teamed up with its sidekick, France, and invaded Egypt. The US and USSR were both furious and demanded that the troops withdraw. The US threatened to offload its British currency bonds, which would have wrecked the UK financially, and the UK was forced to slink away with its tail between its legs. A United Nations peacekeeping force came in. The UK ceded the canal to Egypt forever, and the British prime minister was forced to resign in shame. The whole world now knew that the UK could no longer do its own thing without US permission, exposing it . Exposure is the worst thing that can happen to a bully, both on the playground and on the world stage, and right now the US seems to be seeking exposure risk in every single direction. To continue the analogy, we used to be the rich cool kid out on the playground. Sure, we pushed some other kids around and excluded others, and not everyone liked us, but we always had a circle, and everyone wanted to be in it or at least wished they had something similar. But over the last few months, we decided to cast our circle aside and pick fights with every single kid on the playground We've won more than a few of these fights over the years, and will probably win most of these, just like the UK discovered, you can't always win them all. And the more fights you pick, the higher the chance that someone with nothing to lose will smoke you, and if you've tossed your circle aside, well they might just take that, too. Unfortunately, according to Rick Waters, former coordinator of the State Department's China House, at least one of our targets seems : "I spent most of March in China prior to the tariff announcement and it was clear the Chinese aren't going to pay tribute to another emperor." Since then, China's leadership has repeatedly said in the news that they have prepared for this and are ready to go. We might have found a government that thinks it has more to gain than to lose by fighting back, a sentiment that seems to extend to at least some of its people, too. "We don't care about sales to the United States," Hu Tianqiang, a maker of toy fighter jets, . "Other countries have money too!" he added. "We now sell mostly to South America and the Middle East. We are not lacking money, we are rich." Despite Treasury Secretary Bessent repeatedly saying, as if the repetition will make it true, that China needs us more than we need them, China hasn't made public overtures to the US to negotiate. In fact, in one critical way the US is in a similar position to the UK back in 1956. Remember how the US threatened to sell UK bonds to sink their economy during the Suez crisis? Well, China owns nearly $1 trillion in US debt. And it seems instead that, despite Bessent's cool insistence that everything is good, the US is tasting fear after "if the United States insists on having its way, China will fight to the end." In fact, it appears that after picking this fight we have now to try to prevent an ass-whupping that exposes on the world stage. And it's not just China that doesn't respect us anymore. Russia has seemingly refused to accept a single term proposed by the Trump administration in the Ukraine negotiations, causing Secretary of State Marco Rubio to might just have to "move on." Steve Witkoff, Trump's Iran envoy, even admitted- - that in order to get an Iran deal they might just have to let Iran keep enriching uranium (the exact thing they mocked the Obama administration for allowing). We all know that deep down the root of bullying is cowardice, and these guys seem to be tasting the fear that their one dimensional bully foreign policy is going to get exposed. People are already calling their bluffs and the next step, public humiliation, will bring the whole house of cards crashing down around us. In which case, left alone on an island, our best case scenario will be to become post-1956 Britain, and our worst case scenario will be to turn into modern Russia: a shell of a country with an oligarchy reliant on vast military expenditures and fossil fuels, just waiting until it all runs out. As always, though, where there's failure, there's opportunity. If there's one thing the American people will not stand, it's to be humiliated and made weak. This could be a real turning point in domestic politics if folks start to feel humiliation and weakness creeping up on our country. One note on that, though, is that it's not the other countries judging us that matters. People love feeling judged, especially by foreigners/outsiders. So if you're talking about this, the point isn't that our policy is embarrassing and that other people think we are stupid. That's not humiliation, that's a reason to stay the course to prove folks wrong. The point to get across is that we are on the verge of losing. And that losing will not just be humiliating, but it will cost us our way of life and turn us into a second-rate power like Great Britain. Believe me, no red-blooded American wants us to become the UK. body:
Donald Trump and his billionaire allies are trying to flip New Mexico red and hand our future over to Big Oil. We can’t afford to sit back.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1718%2E400544%2EnNMEMZ)

Conservation Voters New Mexico backs leaders with the political courage to protect our air, land, and water. They know Deb will fight fiercely for New Mexico communities, tackle the climate crisis head-on, and protect our land, water, wildlife, and way of life — just as she’s done in Congress and as Secretary of the Interior.

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Let’s make motherhood affordable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
You may have seen that the Trump Administration is crowdsourcing ideas for getting women in the U.S. to have more babies, including a $5,000 “baby bonus.” As bizarre as that is to say, if they’re looking for ideas, I’ve got a few suggestions for the President:
* Roll back your cuts to Medicaid. In Maryland and beyond, Medicaid is an essential program for supporting prenatal and postnatal care. In fact, 40% of births are on Medicaid. If the Trump Administration truly wants women to have more children, let’s start by making sure safe and high-quality care is accessible.
* Bring back the expanded child tax credit. Supporting a family requires more than a one-time cash payment. The Biden Administration’s expansion of the child tax credit led to record-low childhood poverty, and if extended, would provide the support families need to raise children.
* Don’t touch IVF. The Life at Conception Act, which could ban IVF entirely, is currently supported by more than 130 House Republicans. IVF is an essential option for women looking to start a family, and attempting to restrict access is totally at odds with their goal here.
* Expand affordable childcare. It costs more to send one infant to childcare than the cost of tuition at the University of Maryland. We have to prioritize expanding affordable childcare for the sake of families and our economy.
I will always be on the side of women and working families. Will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-03]
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-03&amount=5.00]
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-03&amount=10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-03&amount=25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-03&amount=50]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-05-03]
Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

I took off the gloves and took big swings at Pete Hegseth (our country’s favorite DUI-hire), the idiot known as Elon Musk, and the dumbest person in Congress: Marjorie Taylor Greene. Then, I turned my attention to Donald Trump. I responded to his calling me a “very low IQ person” and challenged him right then and there to an IQ test. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | Hey there — Did you read this latest headline (see below)? **[We flipped three seats from red to blue in 2024. We have a proven strategy for winning Republican districts. Now we want to deploy this game plan to flip Rep. Young Kim’s district. Democrats say the region’s shifting demographics — along with rising voter disenchantment over the economic fallout from President Donald Trump’s policies — provide the party with its best chance in years to defeat Kim. She is one of 35 House Republicans that the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee is targeting in the midterm elections.

“If ever there was a time, it could be 2026,’’ said Jodi Balma, a political scientist at Fullerton College._ In 2024, we were able to defeat Republican Rep. Michelle Steel in the district right next door. Many political experts and analysts thought it was impossible, but we started organizing early and helped now-Rep. Derek Tran get the job done. **We can do the same thing in CA-40 and defeat Rep. Young Kim._But only with your help._** **[This won’t be an easy fight. But it’s one we have the tools to win. clean_body: Hey there — Did you read this news? | = | Hey there — Did you read this latest headline (see below)? = = = Here’s some of what Roll Call had to say: First elected to the House in 2020, Kim is now the only Republican to represent a slice of Orange County, a onetime conservative bastion where Richard Nixon was born and Ronald Reagan is revered. Democrats say the region’s shifting demographics — along with rising voter disenchantment over the economic fallout from President Donald Trump’s policies — provide the party with its best chance in years to defeat Kim. She is one of 35 House Republicans that the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee is targeting in the midterm elections. “If ever there was a time, it could be 2026,’’ said Jodi Balma, a political scientist at Fullerton College. In 2024, we were able to defeat Republican Rep. Michelle Steel in the district right next door. Many political experts and analysts thought it was impossible, but we started organizing early and helped now-Rep. Derek Tran get the job done. We can do the same thing in CA-40 and defeat Rep. Young Kim.But only with your help. = = = = = = Thank you for being in this fight! \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. Peter –
Colorado has joined a lawsuit against Donald Trump’s reckless tariff policies — policies that have hurt workers, businesses, and the economy.
We are proud that Colorado is stepping up, and as Attorney General, Jena will keep up the fight against Donald Trump and the extremists who threaten our rights, our freedoms, or our way of life here in Colorado.
Whether it’s reckless policies that hurt our families or dangerous attacks on our democracy, Jena will never back down from doing what’s right for Coloradans.
But we need you with us. If we’re going to build the kind of campaign that’s strong enough to take on Trump and his allies, we need grassroots support at every step. Can you chip in today and help power our fight forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250503-email]

| **Save the Date Now**
**SECOND-ANNUAL**
**Frederick Douglass Celebration Event****Thursday, June 5, 2025 | Oceanside at The Owenego, 40 Linden Ave., Branford, CT 06405**
_**Join the Branford Republicans in Celebrating a Great American and Great Republican**_
[**BUY TICKETS**](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=f17bb0b69a&e=8763c56857)

## **About Frederick**
## **Douglass**
**A Force for Uniting the United States** Frederick Douglass, born into slavery in 1818, became a leading advocate for uniting our nation after the Civil War. His conviction in our founding values and principles helped guide the Republican party to win a second term under Abraham Lincoln’s leadership. Lincoln faced the challenge of rescuing a divided nation.
**Frederick Douglass played a crucial role in the birth of the Republican Party** The Republican Party was founded in 1854 by abolitionists who aimed to end slavery and advocate for the civil rights of Black people, with Frederick Douglass playing a significant role in initiating the political campaign.
**Believed in American Principles** Lincoln embraced Douglass’s message of preserving our nation’s values, and it became a roadmap for reunification. Today, Douglass’s contribution offers the most effective messaging for winning new hearts and minds.
**A Symbol of Republican Values** Republicans can use Frederick Douglass as a symbol to unite the voters and realize the greatness of our country, just like Lincoln did.

---
