clean_body: This isn’t a smear. This is her brand. And now, she wants to take that brand statewide.| | | Friend, How do you know Shannon Taylor is a radical progressive prosecutor? She’s a founding member of the Virginia Progressive Prosecutors for Justice. And she flat out told The Washington Post, “I DO call myself a progressive prosecutor." This isn’t a smear. This is her brand. And now, she wants to take that brand statewide. Jason Miyares knows exactly what’s at stake. That’s why he’s standing in the breach. While Shannon Taylor pushes the same radical ideology that led to cash bail elimination, lighter sentencing for criminals, and soft-on-crime policies across Virginia, Jason has delivered real results: ✅ Launched Operation Ceasefire – contributing to a 30% drop in murders statewide ✅ Put fentanyl traffickers behind bars, helping drive one of the largest overdose death reductions in the country ✅ Collected over $34 million in lump sum judgments for child support and over $6 million a month in new enforcement actions since April 2023 — helping over 35,000 families in Virginia. ✅ Protected 340,000+ students with ID kits for child safety We cannot let a self-declared progressive prosecutor seize control of Virginia's top law enforcement post. Donate today to re-elect Attorney General Jason Miyares. Every dollar helps keep our neighborhoods safer and our justice system focused on victims — not criminals. Let’s stand with The People’s Protector—and stop the far left from turning Virginia into California East. Thank you,Team Miyares | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Emma Brown
subject: Not asking for money
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I just wanted to say thank you.
#

**Team** : Will you help GIFFORDS chart our strategy for the upcoming elections?
[**Complete our new May 2025 Strategy Survey right now:**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_strategy_may2025/?source=em250503-1-b&refcode2=10374.3935704._uUbTP&akid=10374%2E3935704%2E_uUbTP)
**[BEGIN SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_strategy_may2025/?source=em250503-1-b&refcode2=10374.3935704._uUbTP&akid=10374%2E3935704%2E_uUbTP)**
Team —
It’s Emma Brown, GIFFORDS’s Executive Director. We just closed the books on our April deadline, and I wanted to take a minute to say thank you.
Gabby Giffords founded our organization after the tragic mass shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School. Our mission is to save as many lives as possible from gun violence – the leading cause of death for American kids. Thanks to your support, we have defied the odds and gotten a lot done in the past decade.
Your donations have helped us...
* Pass over 700 lifesaving policies in state legislatures across the country
* Elect hundreds of gun safety leaders up and down the ballot
* Pass the first federal gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years

None of our victories come easily. At every turn, we’re seeing the gun lobby scale up their attacks and try to block our critical work.
But there’s something they don’t have: You.
Grassroots support is the engine to all of our work. Whether it’s you donating a few dollars, filling out our surveys, or simply opening these emails, your time and generosity goes a long way.
**Now as we kick off May, I’m hoping you can do something big for us:**
[**Before the weekend starts, will you leave your thoughts on our official May 2025 Strategy Survey? Your feedback will help us craft our strategy for the fights ahead.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_strategy_may2025/?source=em250503-1-b&refcode2=10374.3935704._uUbTP&akid=10374%2E3935704%2E_uUbTP)
**[BEGIN SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_strategy_may2025/?source=em250503-1-b&refcode2=10374.3935704._uUbTP&akid=10374%2E3935704%2E_uUbTP)**
This fight is far too important to give up. There’s more work to do, and we need you with us.
— Emma

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=10374%2E3935704%2E_uUbTP) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

* * *
Imagine this: A fossil fuel corporation files a permit to drill near a protected wetland. Instead of undergoing a full environmental review process that the law requires — _typically lasting one to two years_ — they get rubber-stamped in as little as two weeks.
No public input. No accountability.
That’s exactly what the Trump administration just set into motion. Under the cover of an “energy emergency,” they’re gutting the rules to fast-track coal, oil, gas, and mining projects on public lands across the country. They’ve even cut safeguards for endangered species to make it easier to break ground on these dirty energy projects.
They’re calling it energy security. But let’s be clear: This is about profit. It’s about billionaires and oil lobbyists cashing in while protected lands are destroyed and vital ecosystems are thrown into chaos — all so corporate polluters can drill and dig with no questions asked.
**They plan to start drilling NOW. So our resistance needs to move just as fast. Once the land is torn up and the pollution begins, there’s no undoing it. But right now, your signature isn’t on our list.**
**[Add your name to call on Congress to stop this fossil fuel land grab. Public lands are not corporate playgrounds. They belong to the people, and we’re NOT backing down.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107031760/543389688/997768676?refcode=ea.34cfaaf0-4628-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.34cfaaf0-4628-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0Y2ZhYWYwLTQ2MjgtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PAX7GdaoeX79EZmUAaT9L9OG9PqXimEZJKnrHOhsF2o=&emci=77494fe9-4628-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=34cfaaf0-4628-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: If he gets his way, there’ll be nothing left to protect. | BREAKING: The Trump administration invokes emergency powers to fast-track fossil fuel and mining projects on public lands | Imagine this: A fossil fuel corporation files a permit to drill near a protected wetland. Instead of undergoing a full environmental review process that the law requires — typically lasting one to two years — they get rubber-stamped in as little as two weeks. No public input. No accountability. That’s exactly what the Trump administration just set into motion. Under the cover of an “energy emergency,” they’re gutting the rules to fast-track coal, oil, gas, and mining projects on public lands across the country. They’ve even cut safeguards for endangered species to make it easier to break ground on these dirty energy projects. They’re calling it energy security. But let’s be clear: This is about profit. It’s about billionaires and oil lobbyists cashing in while protected lands are destroyed and vital ecosystems are thrown into chaos — all so corporate polluters can drill and dig with no questions asked. They plan to start drilling NOW. So our resistance needs to move just as fast. Once the land is torn up and the pollution begins, there’s no undoing it. But right now, your signature isn’t on our list. Thank you for speaking out, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204n4kzqr22yscr7tpoq8biqw3v1og269xa8qxbz98r06v5xf59sb13p5rm7cf2n16swa41ofnrkas771bm&__stmp=svp65u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svp65u&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzfmfiylrkvjfr90z9lfkpuiuttc9ag69w8wjrre0igfy8onj5zv84zyydswye3djmrthdj078c9bpaxx1azsgaom91ttv5bjg18pg0fdlpxsdpnzpw89c84rlr3vh6o9fssyjyzda7bx71jpsfc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svp65u&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svp65u&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svp65u&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svp65u&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzfmfiylrkvjfr90z9lfkpulq4t2xm743c7ub30s66pe5jx5tjfyarg22kfro6ox7qhx1wiv8h15wtzvenxot03281aifdjjkgcjlbbtldff8nz6t0q8yh4uyj4gnadzjbe14ithmrz2yrerjux4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svp65u&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svp65u&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: | | | APRIL 2025 POLL: The tide is turning in our favor! Most voters support Trump’s IMPEACHMENT! We are just over 100 days into Trump’s second term, and already new polling shows that a majority of American voters want convicted felon, adjudicated rapist and fraudster Donald Trump impeached for a third time! Fifty-two percent of likely voters across the ideological spectrum somewhat or strongly support impeaching him—including 84 percent of Democrats, 55 percent of Independents, and even 20 percent of his fellow Republicans. And the largest share of respondents said that Democrats in Congress should attempt to impeach Trump because they have a duty to remove a lawless president who continuously violates our constitutional rights and the law. Congress MUST do their job–defend the Constitution, impeach and remove Donald Trump from office for his grave abuses of power! Help our campaign to demand Congress ImpeachTrumpNow.com spread! ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Trump’s sinister agenda is unsustainable. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. In the first four months of 2025 we have already accomplished so much:****

Our organization knocked so many doors in the Florida Special Elections that we accomplished a 20 point increase in Democratic turnout which if replicated across the 2026 midterms will mean _40-45 GOP House Seats Flipping blue_.

And we just finished the first stop of our _Unf*ck America Tour_ at Texas A&M where we confronted Charlie Kirk and his far-right campus recruitment org Turning Point USA (yes - the org that radicalized the FSU shooter), and brought out thousands of college students to our event. Our contribution to combatting the trend of 18-22 years old's voting red in 2024.

Other PACs sit back, pay their consultants, fundraise, and do nothing. _National Ground Game PAC is doing the work._

name: Bill Gray
subject: NOT. ONE. PENNY.
body:
Why we’ve taken this unique stance

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f559623667d84bfcb6c024cb20a64115&_e=0MtWJeYInIsVbVUrgKPW_g7JBlLPyZ8PKTZs7gAosXknjB7dnM0JZXlAQpZHUk7Chato-kcQ3iWFGDnBsGRucqVWly7zIAJI2kgP5ABNOa4xBEkoyxH4DuBHXaDjQanFDbIptL6q97kBP1GTXUlsmBgHLaAYYKBi6MLVmBsXoELsB0ysn-Q-SWON2VJ15Wqa9eOfxAhgN8co5tcwZlW4cLX5taF01SfTiZ-vg5hzDuIjqa7nd2wdIq3mzXFLo8rXSxO4IaUg4Kru3nHGvYZgN5MWGz_r3WWi38h40xP66CEFsyFjSFkb_WZ4dPQyT6j9GZCeMBMB00_JILerANr7tcdV9zcOlugIIJymzt1KDO67jAUmjO-Rt4A45KhUFAECbzjj5J3HgG7sBGQONUk-bw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Did you read in the news that Harvard and other elite universities are fighting the Trump administration to keep **billions** of your taxpayer dollars in their pockets?

In light of that, I'd like to remind you of three words that help define Hillsdale College:

NOT. ONE. PENNY.

That's how much Hillsdale College accepts in federal or state funding.

To remain free and independent, we even reject indirect aid, such as student grants and loans.

This makes Hillsdale almost unique among American colleges and universities, which gorge themselves on billions of taxpayer dollars each year.

Refusing to take government money means we are (thankfully!) free of corrupting bureaucratic meddling.

This independence also allows for something else--something at the heart of Hillsdale's mission. It drives the College to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

A few years ago, we made a short animated video about Hillsdale's independence from government money. Perhaps you've seen it, but if not, here's a link to watch the video and share it with your friends. It's a great, short explanation of how and why we've taken this unique stance.

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/not-one-penny-lls**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f559623667d84bfcb6c024cb20a64115&_e=0MtWJeYInIsVbVUrgKPW_g7JBlLPyZ8PKTZs7gAosXknjB7dnM0JZXlAQpZHUk7Chato-kcQ3iWFGDnBsGRucqVWly7zIAJI2kgP5ABNOa4xBEkoyxH4DuBHXaDjQanFDbIptL6q97kBP1GTXUlsmBgHLaAYYKBi6MLVmBsXoELsB0ysn-Q-SWON2VJ15Wqa9eOfxAhgN8co5tcwZlW4cLX5taF01SfTiZ-vg5hzDuKWwqbFyPNmhcoyk-d9bnpQu_N0cSQ4kUt9UbHpuzepkR9DPICuiyrOqOtCBRnHNwpwe68ABJN-bXAJANgPUtuqeiw-OADtFOkV614-aIdNAtGUW8eCVaGG1ukYo408Hrb1LJlI64uaqh10p9m-plbHFRfAPdzYx49uTipccbKKtg%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f559623667d84bfcb6c024cb20a64115&_e=0MtWJeYInIsVbVUrgKPW_g7JBlLPyZ8PKTZs7gAosXknjB7dnM0JZXlAQpZHUk7Chato-kcQ3iWFGDnBsGRucqVWly7zIAJI2kgP5ABNOa4xBEkoyxH4DuBHXaDjQanFDbIptL6q97kBP1GTXUlsmBgHLaAYYKBi6MLVmBsXoELsB0ysn-Q-SWON2VJ15Wqa9eOfxAhgN8co5tcwZlW4cLX5taF01SfTiZ-vg5hzDuK6lfeAEj27iqfTjHxpCYvwYtWq0oDmHGsdiM3pnX0Ti5RLb8BJW5CCsHcvwPipanaM6DwMy9xk2F3YxGlgiPcEIyuIEFQ5bek6E53hqEZo7IN_SCqgWIuq1I6HMDznDnurnEthmavghVJXlvDFFkEZYGQwLkH_CVfE9kdPxtR_jg%3D%3D) As the video mentions, this independence is only possible because of the support of citizens like you who understand the importance of education to liberty.

And there's a group of donors who are the bedrock of this outreach effort--the _**Liberty & Learning Society**_.

The _**Liberty & Learning Society**_ is a steady, generous group of our most dedicated benefactors.

Their monthly tax-deductible gift gives the College's mission a strong base of support. That's because they're automatically advancing the critical work of defending liberty through education, seven days a week, 365 days a year.

To join, all you have to do is click on the secure link below. Then, follow the simple directions. That's it--no fuss, no hassle! And you can cancel anytime. It really is that easy.

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/not-one-penny-lls**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f559623667d84bfcb6c024cb20a64115&_e=0MtWJeYInIsVbVUrgKPW_g7JBlLPyZ8PKTZs7gAosXknjB7dnM0JZXlAQpZHUk7Chato-kcQ3iWFGDnBsGRucqVWly7zIAJI2kgP5ABNOa4xBEkoyxH4DuBHXaDjQanFDbIptL6q97kBP1GTXUlsmBgHLaAYYKBi6MLVmBsXoELsB0ysn-Q-SWON2VJ15Wqa9eOfxAhgN8co5tcwZlW4cLX5taF01SfTiZ-vg5hzDuJYrVmiXhnE6LF13ILgb8dYRJSBO7u8W5fjxdRQ-GL4A08Z2r3ED5KkkcOqBuWS0gYKZFBpX30kCeLr-kWl8ScDqcNiVvl60Uh2yJeU5hpFgW-2miWibutmcwSPBrqsyDf4LrPBN94qGRiTYWAIulm0rinNDa57IQBMPGxQ4Oki5A%3D%3D)

So please take a moment to watch the fun video about Hillsdale's independence and consider joining the _**Liberty & Learning Society**_.

When you do, you'll help ensure that Hillsdale can remain free from government money and dedicated to defending liberty through education. With your help, we can keep proudly saying, NOT. ONE. PENNY.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=f559623667d84bfcb6c024cb20a64115&_t=v-rpE6mCA8dr6uHy2pJQv-f9CfexDKn7-xKkz19i_Rkh61v5amzxhPv5ZaozllmOD3ppjjgkptDbvMxvSG9RHrxdd8eH_YEuEArgEbvezL6fIrrq2ms4Y2Xkc2C0wmCz)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Answering your questions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8533%2E5257348%2EYupvIP ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

With all that’s going on, I want to make sure folks like you have an
opportunity to ask questions about what’s happening in the world.

That’s why I reached out with another edition of my “Ask Adam” series a
few weeks ago. Many of you sent in some great questions, so I want to take
this time to answer a few of them.

Let’s get right to it!

Dannie from Florida asked, “Why is Trump not being charged with insider
trading?”

First, we need the full facts. That’s why I’ve called for an investigation
to get to the bottom of that very issue. For anyone who may be unfamiliar
with what’s going on, here’s a quick summary:

Trump announced major tariffs and sent the stock market crashing, only to
reverse those same tariffs, which sent the stock market back up. A few
hours before Trump’s announcement that he was walking back most of his
tariffs on most countries, there was a spike in market activity.

So here are the questions I want answered: Who knew about his announcement
in advance, and did they or anyone they know cash in? Were people around
Trump personally profiting off of his chaotic moves while people’s
retirement accounts were being destroyed?

I don’t put anything past this administration — especially not from a
president who will do anything to enrich himself and his family and who
promoted his own “meme coin” when he took office.

That’s why I’ve called for an investigation into whether Trump committed
insider trading and if he, his family, or anyone around him personally
profited off his announcements.

Kathleen from California wrote “I am concerned that, observably, the
representatives in Congress decide and vote on issues the way they see fit
rather than act as conduits for ‘we the people’; that is, the people whom
they represent. How do you ensure that YOUR vote actually reflects OUR
needs and wants?"

So here’s how I make sure I remain accountable to folks like you. I travel
up and down the state to hear from my constituents — at town halls,
roundtables, business locations, and schools.

I make it a priority to speak to as many voters as I can to make sure that
my work in the Senate continues to represent your interests and your
concerns. And that’s exactly why my team and I have started this “Ask
Adam” series so that I’m hearing from as many of you as possible about
what you’d like to see me work on in the Senate.

I also refuse to accept corporate PAC money for my Senate campaign. Why?
Because I wanted my campaign to be powered by everyday people like you.

Across the aisle, it’s another story. Republican representatives siding
with Donald Trump over their constituents. Senators who vote for
legislation that benefits their mega-donors more than it does the people
who put them in office.

People don’t want Elon Musk to do mass layoffs and gut programs that
millions of Americans rely on. None of us voted for Elon Musk to be
president. Americans don’t want Donald Trump to abandon our allies and
side with authoritarian regimes like Russia while he’s chipping away at
the rule of law here at home. And they sure as hell don’t want Republicans
to attack their Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare benefits to pay
for tax cuts for the rich.

Diane from California wrote “How secure is the continuation of Social
Security and what is being done at your level to maintain the program and
strengthen it? My husband and I are middle class. A substantial portion of
our income in retirement comes from Social Security and we need it. This
is an insurance program, not a Ponzi scheme.”

I’ll be honest – I’m really worried.

Elon Musk calling Social Security a “Ponzi scheme” couldn’t be a bigger
slap in the face. It’s not a Ponzi scheme. It’s an earned benefit, a
promise made to Americans who’ve worked their entire lives. And you're
right — for millions of working-class and middle-class families, it’s the
difference between a secure retirement and economic hardship.

Unfortunately, that promise and Social Security are under attack. They’re
closing offices across the country, firing staff, and even cutting phone
lines so that when your check doesn’t show up, you won’t have an office to
visit or a person to call. That’s not fiscal responsibility. That’s
cruelty, and it’s designed to clear the way for more tax giveaways to the
wealthy.

It’s all part of their plan – gut Social Security and fire employees; make
the services much, much worse; claim Social Security isn’t saveable; and
then privatize it.

I’m fighting to protect and strengthen Social Security — not just to keep
the program solvent, but to expand it. That means making the ultra-wealthy
pay their fair share into the system, closing loopholes, and ensuring the
program is fully funded for generations to come.

Rest assured, I’m going to fight like hell to protect your hard-earned
benefits and make sure they’re there for you and generations to come.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250503_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8533%2E5257348%2EYupvIP ]Whether you’re concerned about Social Security, the economy, or Trump’s
attacks on the rule of law, we’re all in this together. I will need you to
continue to stand with me and keep up the fight for what’s right. Chip in
to support my work in the Senate >>

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250503_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=8533%2E5257348%2EYupvIP ]EXPRESS DONATE

$25

Thank you,

Adam

| Friends, Should we be protecting mass murderers caught living illegally in the US? New Hampshire Democrats think so! During testimony on a bill to ban sanctuary cities this week, Sen. Debra Altschiller (D-Stratham) defended a man convicted of murdering 11 people in Brazil that was caught illegally living in Rye last year. **Her reasoning was that the murders took place “in another country.”**
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Sen. Altschiller’s went on to claim that this man’s crimes were only “alleged” despite the fact that he was tried, convicted and sentenced to 275 years in prison. **NH Democrats are so far out of touch with regular Granite Staters that they can’t even condemn the actions of convicted mass murderers!** [>>> Help us protect public safety in NH by banning the Democrats’ sanctuary state policies! Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: You won’t want to miss this tomorrow →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re here to help educate about effective non-violent resistance frameworks, inspire hope, build community — and save our democracy.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250503-5012-footer&t=1&akid=5012%2E420207%2Ec69Lqo)
Hi Peter!
**Team Jayapal here with a quick reminder about our first Resistance Lab 2.0 Training happening tomorrow from 11 – 12:30pm PDT.**
**[RSVP Now](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/775578/?source=em20250503-5012)**
**Our 2.0 training will dive even deeper into how you can fight back.** This is about being prepared for the constitutional crisis that is right in front of us. Together, we’ll learn how to take on authoritarians and the pillars of support propping up dictators.
**So Peter, don’t miss out![RSVP for tomorrow’s Resistance Lab 2.0 Training now and get ready to resist with folks from all over the country.](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/775578/?source=em20250503-5012)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250503-5012-footer&t=2&refcode2=5012_420207_c69Lqo&akid=5012%2E420207%2Ec69Lqo)**

subject: Urgent - Our action to protect election integrity
body:
| | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Baz5-NVbSNfJDo3UNSmWrB7HzFvcps2H-ih_f932TAUyHrVjsv47jR9xtzVRSU5G58TfGOvdhK_cTZrpCHx1ba5-x95EU_VxwqJQhwhcxxnCY3GNXvXeSuVgsjE9Yz40B5AqXikrvY9fQTOy2k6ebcAbD1-nJQm6e7PstebypRaLNRoOIrDzmLEIvyr3XizBdO12VOzdz8NGd1YhO8LgpDFt9m9m17XaNOGpi7Bfh3ilkAPyJSy-WZEfaiLYd6ZTq6wyjDCCEvBefBKJsfqqQeqCxmLYpgdgYuTx1xwEGrWhHCYg45u2K1_cRrP_IspwGNI9Z0YG28RciuQII1OoBXCyx4mE4RVaFiSSCwdPBlH7byQAfeROFBlz30jVNCVG8BRIZLMb8uzTXpT6UrBRjvjCxV2efpwm0rkZEqN1W0TbnnPKtnQGumFE9ZOe_8PcoSdjPhkT_oXIgC9N6fIszWMyubscq9yuEmXnQJThaqX_vk_32XfxtuweHr7RcjzAFZvmywiC9Gz8_bhKJYYd1SA5b4zwjLftvKd94tLZQ-XFkOEqVTUC/of16e6119pgdOy5GpG0LYgiEmnGSiyXt/8)

| | Fellow Patriot,
As you know, _America First Legal has been at the forefront of the fight to secure our elections_. Clean elections are essential to safeguard our nation and protect the rule of law — and now we’re celebrating a BIG WIN in our election integrity lawsuit in Arizona.
**Thanks to our lawsuit, all 15 counties in the politically crucial State of Arizona will now be able to work to REMOVE ILLEGAL ALIENS from the state’s voter rolls! This is a major blow to the far left’s open-border agenda. **
The legal settlement in our lawsuit forced Arizona’s County Recorders to work with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security to verify the citizenship status of nearly 50,000 registered voters who have not provided proof of citizenship. _That’s potentially 50,000 fewer illegal alien votes in future elections!_
We applaud President Trump for his bold action via executive order to make Department of Homeland Security resources available to states to fulfill existing verification requirements.
_And we can’t thank our dedicated supporters enough for fueling our America First fight!_

---
**[PITCH IN NOW TO HELP US PROTECT OUR ELECTIONS >>>](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/1_N_6b0ZaiUrL-FyXthL4NSzin7hm0GUNn9hOLJ9pjoZSqAjTl2Pucn324EWAiaS0a8QOf2P5pQvweDDhhxD4BQak5UQ_xOI7Q6l7G3yIpRljKItHLbWUPu17avF633k0zqbXQVV_5cx76Rg99Z-wE_EzbP2XqRnuaf-oFaeuyEf4W8kh8bLuNXa5SX0x8g_uTDYVXJx4NPA7zsKXex6ERdjRyDJPH49ThUNfaT24IoD0C7igrbeQiqWPTRy6uh6t27EbAJUhXXbFqCQuxJqvHGV0_3jI9MOmYGWujKoWjpd2MWJeDd7S0gmwMk0Db0ACOL-j7fXFJ4Qie-rmJU4z3wvq2wWN5ngIaRQLRMXDY0JP8we7pinTAqUTeuO51nzot_lvUJ3novuq0yNHFDv6JB20_2efu568wgwI4MaG6mJHJp5EOXQjH6ZpVzk7MB8K34SMMx6EeeWR1Z9bXX0n3Dl5mU4aF3GQkPsbGUVszdcSUhib9KdWPm4wGgtYd-Yur2i35mxOkV3FJYxXka_bpVvNj_nPC-UFeLf2wIlSNl5MkWrTZNb/noCEuKtoeIxuiyi_TwCD6IbWnk_YNGz9/8)

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107034297/543398622/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1YTk4Yi01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmmJLguP85qf2_cY7kp5qVzOi0Wt3uVyZ2QgCNfMAdA=)
Hi Friend,
I just left the stage in downtown Palm Springs, where I stood with a powerful crowd of over 1,000 people to demand accountability from Republican Congressman Ken Calvert.
This is the second Republican district I’ve visited in the last month, and people are furious.
I’m going to keep showing up in these districts until Republicans find the courage to stand up to Donald Trump, defend our Constitution, and do their jobs.
[Can you chip in now to help me continue this tour? Every dollar gets us closer to confronting more Republicans in their own backyards.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107034298/543398623/2133160978?refcode2=7545a98b-5028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250503&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1YTk4Yi01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmmJLguP85qf2_cY7kp5qVzOi0Wt3uVyZ2QgCNfMAdA=)

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107034299/543398624/2133160978?refcode2=7545a98b-5028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250503&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1YTk4Yi01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmmJLguP85qf2_cY7kp5qVzOi0Wt3uVyZ2QgCNfMAdA=)

I’m doing this because Trump is trampling our democracy—and too many Republicans are enabling him. But it’s also because I’ve had the chance to meet incredible Americans across these districts. People who love this country, care deeply about their communities, and want a government that actually works for them.
They deserve better than absent, spineless representatives.
If Ken Calvert and others won’t show up and serve the people they represent, then we’ll find leaders who will, and we’ll help elect them next November.
[With your help, we’ll keep traveling, organizing, and calling out Republicans who’ve failed their constituents. Let’s make sure voters hear the truth—and make their voices heard at the ballot box.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107034300/543398625/2133160978?refcode2=7545a98b-5028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250503&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1YTk4Yi01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmmJLguP85qf2_cY7kp5qVzOi0Wt3uVyZ2QgCNfMAdA=)[With your help, we’ll keep traveling, organizing, and calling out Republicans who’ve failed their constituents. Let’s make sure voters hear the truth—and make their voices heard at the ballot box.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107034301/543398626/2133160978?refcode2=7545a98b-5028-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&refcode=em250503&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTQ1YTk4Yi01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmmJLguP85qf2_cY7kp5qVzOi0Wt3uVyZ2QgCNfMAdA=)

name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: A proven fighter and winner
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107034669/543400138/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE507_20250503_MikieDive_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056033&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg5ODdkMS01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaqKU1AZ8oXRGgJ3n3ZEtDAfMQ-1DePAVkLJmj3raZE=) Peter,

**Rep. Mikie Sherrill (NJ-GOV) is a true testament to the power of EMILYs List.**

Back in 2017, in the wake of Trump's first election, Mikie knew she had to step up and fight back — but she wasn't sure where to start. So she filled out an EMILYs List questionnaire and sent us her resume.

After hearing her story, we knew she would make an excellent candidate and future leader.

We helped Mikie launch her campaign for the U.S. House a few months later, and in 2018, she flipped New Jersey's 11th Congressional District in _one of the most competitive_ races of the cycle.

During her campaign, she was told that "people didn’t think a woman could win in New Jersey." **Mikie proved them wrong — and now, she's ready to prove the naysayers wrong again as she runs for governor.**

[**Donate to support Democratic pro-choice women like Mikie who are defying the odds:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107034670/543400139/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE507_20250503_MikieDive_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056033&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg5ODdkMS01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaqKU1AZ8oXRGgJ3n3ZEtDAfMQ-1DePAVkLJmj3raZE=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107034671/543400140/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE507_20250503_MikieDive_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056033&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg5ODdkMS01MDI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaqKU1AZ8oXRGgJ3n3ZEtDAfMQ-1DePAVkLJmj3raZE=)

While New Jersey has traditionally been a Democratic leaning state, this past November, Trump only lost the state by _five_ points — the closest margin in recent history. And, on top of that, Democrats haven't won a third consecutive gubernatorial seat in decades.

**But, Peter, Mikie is a proven fighter and winner — and we know she has what it takes.**

Governors are on the frontlines of the fight for reproductive freedom, and we're committed to supporting women across the country who are standing up to anti-choice extremists and defending our fundamental rights.

clean_body: | = Peter, Rep. Mikie Sherrill (NJ-GOV) is a true testament to the power of EMILYs List. Back in 2017, in the wake of Trump's first election, Mikie knew she had to step up and fight back — but she wasn't sure where to start. So she filled out an EMILYs List questionnaire and sent us her resume. After hearing her story, we knew she would make an excellent candidate and future leader. We helped Mikie launch her campaign for the U.S. House a few months later, and in 2018, she flipped New Jersey's 11th Congressional District in one of the most competitive races of the cycle. During her campaign, she was told that "people didn’t think a woman could win in New Jersey." Mikie proved them wrong — and now, she's ready to prove the naysayers wrong again as she runs for governor. = | = While New Jersey has traditionally been a Democratic leaning state, this past November, Trump only lost the state by five points — the closest margin in recent history. And, on top of that, Democrats haven't won a third consecutive gubernatorial seat in decades. But, Peter, Mikie is a proven fighter and winner — and we know she has what it takes. Governors are on the frontlines of the fight for reproductive freedom, and we're committed to supporting women across the country who are standing up to anti-choice extremists and defending our fundamental rights. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=EwgyW5t7U6R%2Bhm8g7OTSWxR8CgY2fLGBzDy%2BKl%2FE8swYQ7Gsgv2JUuKwYNnzzhZaVkekk4J2rap%2FFhV%2FSnpvunPvqO9TdOqDqegi738Fn%2BIIwLHOyJXrn2%2FerxpigZbFkwBX76%2BlnfjgEGySjdRRopRdcA2tAbJX7O8pc7eDa0%2BB5VTkofbzQyeAi9pkP4KzC6GnyW%2Bfzqs0vBZfFQW%2BKnf%2BtKE8M0v4JGZ5Sbg1UlImGyBl0Q%2FIM%2BXPRD4am1xFJqt%2FPI6ItiIj0SSLlfGFfjJCBgvdDndZinXyySNh7HCrL%2FmpLmbXd9Yd31kdTc%2BHSkM0ts%2F%2FtSH2P86cD2nIFTPCl8EsNnKQFCwOVghxRb0AYqWE8hAcLrGUlz%2FkM2VHBerHcXU%2FS5pHRmob7b0hqqXolHia%2BoAXfIpYfA3QvF3IFGI5ZINcgC1UJUyj4ATh)
---
| |
---
In April, Dr. Ruiz held town halls in Beaumont, El Centro, and Indio. And he didn’t just show up to speak — he listened. He stayed for _every_ question — even the tough ones — because that’s what real representation looks like. But while representatives like Dr. Ruiz show up for their communities, House Republicans remain in hiding. Instead of showing up for the people they were elected to serve, House Republicans are enabling Trump’s dangerous agenda and running from accountability. Like Dr. Ruiz said at the Indio town hall: **“We’ll fight in three arenas — the courts, in Congress, and in our communities.”** The third arena is where you come in. Together, we’ve made **_real_** progress for CA-25. >From protecting the Salton Sea, expanding care for veterans, and designating the Chuckwalla National Monument — these wins happened because you stayed connected and you fought along with us. [This campaign is about showing up, listening, and delivering for our communities. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | In April, Dr. Ruiz held town halls in Beaumont, El Centro, and Indio. And he didn’t just show up to speak — he listened. He stayed for every question — even the tough ones — because that’s what real representation looks like. But while representatives like Dr. Ruiz show up for their communities, House Republicans remain in hiding. Instead of showing up for the people they were elected to serve, House Republicans are enabling Trump’s dangerous agenda and running from accountability. Like Dr. Ruiz said at the Indio town hall: “We’ll fight in three arenas — the courts, in Congress, and in our communities.” The third arena is where you come in. # **[Report Claims Agents In 2020 Photo Issued Forced Reassignment](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

## IL Gov. JB Pritzker Is Throwing His Weight Around, Discouraging Other Dems From Seeking Sen. Seat – RedState
According to sources who spoke with NBC News 5 Chicago, Illinois Governor JB Pritzker is not at all happy that his lieutentant governor, Juliana Stratton, whom Pritzker has anointed to slide into retiring Democrat Sen. Dick Durbin's seat, is being challenged by other Democrats. ## Brits urged to avoid mistake this Bank Holiday weekend that could cost you £5,000 | UK | News
If you’re planning on having a summer BBQ this bank holiday weekend, then you’ll need to keep this one thing in mind to avoid a fine. Daniel McAfee, Head of Legal Operations at Lawhive, has shared that if you receive a noise complaint, you could end up having to pay a hefty fine. name: Haley Stevens
subject: This is for the people I love in the state that I love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107035577/543402861/289657007?refcode=250502_MFC_Stevens_ForMichigan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjMwZmZmOS01NjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=No-LAXyEMT1yMO35le8FUZ9txZQWszAD1fUSByhaV2w=) Hi, friends – if you haven’t gotten to know me yet, my name is Haley Stevens, and I’m running for Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat to fight for the people I love in the state that I love. I’ve had the honor of representing Michigan’s 11th Congressional District in the House since 2019. It means everything to me to serve my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled around our great state, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. _They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and Elon Musk have inflicted upon our nation._ All across our state I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of the uncertainty in our auto industry caused by reckless shoot-from-the-hip tariffs, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. So for Michigan, and all Americans, I’m fighting back: I’m running for U.S. Senate to help Democrats end Trump’s supermajority and block his dangerous agenda. **[But Republicans are already working to destroy my campaign – so I’ve set an ambitious $1 million campaign launch goal to ensure we have the resources to compete and win right out of the gate. If you’re with me, become a Founding Donor of my campaign by giving $25 – split between my campaign and Seth Moulton – or more right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107035578/543402862/698416938?refcode=250502_MFC_Stevens_ForMichigan&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjMwZmZmOS01NjI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=No-LAXyEMT1yMO35le8FUZ9txZQWszAD1fUSByhaV2w=)** Thank you, Haley

## State Senate passes bill aiming to stop flow of illegal abortion pills * WorldNetDaily * by Cassy Cooke, Live Action News
The Texas Senate has passed a bill to allow citizens to sue anyone who manufactures, mails, or distributes abortion pills in Texas for $100,000. Senate Bill 2880 would help expand the Texas Heartbeat Act, which was passed in 2021. Under the Texas Heartbeat Act, abortions cannot be committed after a preborn child’s heartbeat is detected, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/fPQbTSgJfVW_ygz-Mu41Qqpgz1IEiwXw9-Q1kDB8U0eiT-l5i-Q0BtDZfq3DbWh7xAy33PpVkJ-FYjq__x7QKxa4F54zywBRqkHqmxG4YnoUCBQHYpgkhUJ2RJ7casnOLlXECCJbe242BU8zhGBdqj8RLDtxY5o7i5mDM5eMOlQL894jDA_2pUcX_jNnSicuYTGf8WsESphm88bP-_LpOdk259dffRnPOR1BZR94jgwPbrKTdRdZ2_ah1uxp7MVQHLimW4mGC3oDzgjE6gC141lpkUi7zw-HunYnO9Ujkp6Uo9N8bBF3jlHEyaKAMMyJBMXb0qzPi9WPLiHbh2anIQIyFMvNJxzIO901mBl72riphZFzJY5tFzRUAuDOPK9SRqJmzxI4tVG7-ipUo8U6dQrekZ-LYiQXvFDeOKU/yxRkYhazovpgJb-uZyaCzYtycbPulQff/8)

“It is the policy of the United States to eliminate the use of disparate-impact liability in all contexts to the maximum degree possible to avoid violating the Constitution, Federal civil rights laws, and basic American ideals.” Those words, the operative section of “Restoring Equality of Opportunity and Meritocracy,” one of several executive orders President Donald [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/I_IWLr8g58V0IvD2cxMwBz6WpyYDBODxbvEk5RzMDwBCmDbLRw5FwkrFcwVQQWAZHiTQV7hP65RnSGEKsDxjUWkG4w8xOym4gRej7wlhKKnWCBdOmAvPq0Uh9ryy05skS3JpwaozoiZH4DlYir_Jb9c-6iVR-gwf-7K9pyTbWe1Ogb1L277FHCvkeBZ-kS0HhIS9y8xG-DJEwjWxtEWc2H9zTgxWXx6pAr4nMO1LVgOFDEwi8mpQmkUMKSi0QYtgAn-OrzFPF8c6xOmBh7VX6yCKVtREQLSrvaW3qU9czORxX92B2iegTGlaf13gv-g8-ixqJRAAGlw/KXvOsjQOGgTwHTRwCkHj6F5ktkTT33XS/8)

## Trump Administration Files Emergency Appeal With SCOTUS After Fed Judge Blocks DOGE From SSA Access – RedState
On Friday, the Trump administration filed an emergency appeal with the U.S. Supreme Court after a federal district court judge blocked the department of government efficiency (DOGE) from accessing Social Security Administration information on governmental computer systems. We’ll need to lay out some background on the case first. ## Is Oklahoma in Danger of ‘Satanic School’?
The Supreme Court heard arguments on April 30 on whether a Catholic school in Oklahoma named for St. Isidore the Farmer can be the first charter school with a religious foundation. It’s the latest case to alarm the media about the so-called separation of church and state. New York Times legal reporter Adam Liptak cited [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/72aX4yeX62R3StjCEwkHlc-TyybSFXf7-S7oeO3XcZC2EOahcygZlhB7jK6bqcaAD7cybiNDrbavbAtDNSH5C0u5IIkXU55aHgeDK8-v9muU2Gnt9Hxiqz119VPLLvi3_MP_tixhAiqUMnBXxndWdVV10FR0rzkgz6fMhQGNjDUNImWShPcJDYEhuIcZ0OkBz5k0NVj-x6CElb2B2Qy8fAfw3cQSXqTL8PBg_vDDqSqhiJVIb-5cwJPPs_36qWPcjQMZTnr3yUnRr70_e7sBPMeZGQaAY0nQRRanR1SZmEp4WUYEKFMd0LTO9YadGYtV/dTjOiJcS2Unn-PPGCGYL5KH_SH1OXiOv/8)

name: All On The Line
subject: No one should be able to disenfranchise millions of Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This legislation threatens the right to vote for millions of voters
|
---

Peter,
Right now, we’re facing one of the most dangerous threats to voting rights we’ve seen in decades:
_**FIRST:**_ Anti-democracy conservatives in Congress introduced the SAVE Act — a bill that would disenfranchise millions of Americans by requiring overly burdensome and costly forms of ID to register to vote.
_**THEN:**_ The House of Representatives narrowly passed the SAVE Act — threatening to make it harder for military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, working-class Americans, married women, and more to exercise their right to vote.
**_NOW:_** **We need to come together to stop the SAVE Act in the Senate.**
**All On The Line is mobilizing voters across the country to speak out against this dangerous bill and demand that their senators reject it.**[**Will you make a donation today to help power this organizing as we fight to defend free and fair elections and build a truly representative democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107035930/543404372/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FTNSAVE_email_20250503-AOTL-Tier1-FTNSAVE_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250503-AOTL-Tier1-FTNSAVE_&utm_campaign=FTNSAVE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkM2ZlZjM1LTU5MjgtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OIcG63ULzgyRhh6ZIEumb_GLEcGPXeYHdikf64mhLrs=)

For years, All On The Line has responded at a moment’s notice when anti-democracy extremists threaten voting rights. And it’s never been more important than it is today. The SAVE Act could disenfranchise about 150 million Americans — half of American citizens — folks who don’t have a passport, people who’ve lost original documents to time or natural disaster, and not to mention the millions of married women who took their spouse’s last name.
This is an existential moment for voting rights in America. And it’s going to require the biggest grassroots movement we can mobilize to make sure this legislation fails.
**[That’s why we’re asking you to make a donation right now to help protect the right to vote and safeguard our democracy — now and in the future.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107035937/543404379/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FTNSAVE_email_20250503-AOTL-Tier1-FTNSAVE_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250503-AOTL-Tier1-FTNSAVE_&utm_campaign=FTNSAVE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkM2ZlZjM1LTU5MjgtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OIcG63ULzgyRhh6ZIEumb_GLEcGPXeYHdikf64mhLrs=)**

clean_body: This legislation threatens the right to vote for millions of voters | Peter, Right now, we’re facing one of the most dangerous threats to voting rights we’ve seen in decades: FIRST: Anti-democracy conservatives in Congress introduced the SAVE Act — a bill that would disenfranchise millions of Americans by requiring overly burdensome and costly forms of ID to register to vote. THEN: The House of Representatives narrowly passed the SAVE Act — threatening to make it harder for military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, working-class Americans, married women, and more to exercise their right to vote. NOW: We need to come together to stop the SAVE Act in the Senate. All On The Line is mobilizing voters across the country to speak out against this dangerous bill and demand that their senators reject it.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = For years, All On The Line has responded at a moment’s notice when anti-democracy extremists threaten voting rights. And it’s never been more important than it is today. The SAVE Act could disenfranchise about 150 million Americans — half of American citizens — folks who don’t have a passport, people who’ve lost original documents to time or natural disaster, and not to mention the millions of married women who took their spouse’s last name. This is an existential moment for voting rights in America. And it’s going to require the biggest grassroots movement we can mobilize to make sure this legislation fails. = Thank you so much for your support. And please spread the word — make sure your friends know about the SAVE Act and what’s at stake. The All On The Line Team = is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Donald Trump’s attack on independent media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — The Trump administration just launched an all-out attack on independent media and free speech. In the dark of night on Thursday, Donald Trump signed an executive order that will defund NPR and PBS — independent, educational public media that Trump claims to be “biased and partisan news coverage.” **In other words, public media reports the facts, and Donald Trump does not like the facts.** Make no mistake, Peter: this is a blatant attempt by Donald Trump to silence independent public media and evade accountability for his lawlessness. As the Co-Chair of the Public Broadcasting Caucus, I know that this attack on public media is truly an attack on our fundamental right to free speech. Trump’s move to defund public media like PBS and NPR is only the latest step in his plan to dismantle all democratic forms of accountability — the courts, legal and regulatory enforcement, inspectors general, mainstream media, and law firms included. **In his first three months in office, Donald Trump has methodically attacked all checks, balances, and accountability as part of his effort to usurp all government power to become a Putin-like dictator.** I have dedicated my career to holding powerful actors accountable, whether in the courtroom or the halls of Congress. From prosecuting organized crime to serving as the Democrats’ lead counsel in Trump’s first impeachment, I know firsthand the importance of transparency and accountability. And Peter, we need accountability now more than ever. **[Together, we must stand up to Trump’s efforts to defund public media and evade accountability. Will you join me in defending our democratic institutions by signing my petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107035958/543404431/1004945561?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjg4MTZlMC01OTI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sn3tQuCe0tlXLIhLlDpc-APuDhUW4jvNszI57aE7k5o=&emci=42b862ec-2828-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=428816e0-5928-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107035959/543404432/1004945561?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjg4MTZlMC01OTI4LWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sn3tQuCe0tlXLIhLlDpc-APuDhUW4jvNszI57aE7k5o=&emci=42b862ec-2828-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=428816e0-5928-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13556823)

Dan

body:
His priorities are CRYSTAL clear...
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250503_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19751%2E878179%2Ev3bYFn) _Trump’s priorities are CRYSTAL clear, folks:_

**Funding Social Security, Medicare & the Department of Education?** NOPE! ❌
**Funding a $92 MILLION parade to boost his own ego?** No problem! ✅

But Trump is NOT a dictator, and we are NOT his subjects.
We’re FIGHTING BACK, team:

[**10,000 URGENT SIGNATURES NEEDED: Cancel Trump’s DISGUSTING, wasteful taxpayer-funded, Military Parade ASAP! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250503_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19751%2E878179%2Ev3bYFn) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO TELL CONGRESS: CANCEL TRUMP’S MILITARY PARADE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/cancel-parade-v2/?source=VPP_20250503_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19751%2E878179%2Ev3bYFn)
---
If Trump can find the funds to host a self-righteous, North Korea-style military parade, he can find the funds to save Social Security. __It’s that simple.__

name: Melton for Iowa
subject: Melton for Iowa : My Plans are Firming Up for '26
body:
| | |

---
| | [](https://fpglcyebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BY38YjI10nYbPSH0tzVsKPL5zvxQvd9vROaz6aC8qSs6LvHAc4ISsvaftGDGQQNc6DQkAeza5oYe1OIrhZwICM56sQQc4aZIEsjK_INXRHOX8reTy_HK0Br9e7hG3g1eZAL_qNDI8fe5_M32w35SgQu_PrQH4QON-ZGY907j4F4=&c=ibiL92ThAYzzMsqhIgP5_WejOxe6WBGO-0vVEfV7pzS4Med-wOC6xg==&ch=Y1VOxvxk6Gz9LDvLX_UgPBPYAmxrIPPhcq0MKmDC60wykl5HNE7uyA==)

---
|
# Melton for Iowa 2024
---
---
| Hello Peter,
Hello all,
It's been almost two months since I sent the survey giving you a chance to provide me input on my 2026 plans. I've also been meeting with people across the district in those past couple months in various contexts. Here's what I've found: Per the surveys, 97% of those who replied said they'd happily support me if I ran again for Iowa's 4th Congressional District. 95% said I wouldn't be overstaying my welcome if I did so. I also have seen an unprecedented amount of engagement and energy all across our district. In fact, I just got back from a sidewalk protest in Carroll where 70 folks made their voices heard. I also continue to get positive affirmation out on the road. Considering all of the above, I'm just about ready to announce my 3rd run for Congress here in Iowa-04. We've built a strong foundation our first two runs to take advantage of the variables that will be on our side in '26, many of which were in place during the last Trump midterm that helped J.D. Scholten almost win this district, as he only lost by 3%. That same cycle, 2018, Democrats won Iowa's other 3 Congressional Districts. I'm running to win, and I think in this second Trump midterm cycle that we can. In anticipation of my announcement that'll be coming in the next few days, I have a few basic asks. First, if you could help with a donation the day I announce, which I'll do per email and my campaign socials, that'll give us a good boost to kick off the campaign. I also would appreciate if you asked folks in your orbit that would be interested in being on my newsletter list to reach out to me at melton4iowa@gmail.com to be included so they can be part of our team when I make my announcement. I am so grateful for your support over the years. We've put in the work to put up a formidable challenge in '26 and to take advantage of the variables that will give us wind at our back that we didn't have in '22 and '24. I look forward to working on your behalf to further the cause of justice and progress.
Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton

---
| |
---
| |
---
|
###

Karoline Leavitt/Instagram
**By Rudy Giuliani**
As someone who has had the distinct pleasure of knowing Karoline Leavitt personally, I can say with absolute certainty that no one works harder for President Donald J. Trump than she does. In the first 100 days of Trump's triumphant return to the White House, Karoline, as White House Press Secretary, has proven herself a force of nature--a beacon of strength, clarity, and unapologetic patriotism. In a sea of exceptional talent within Trump's cabinet and staff, Karoline stands second to none, delivering unparalleled performance, undeniable results, and a steely resolve against the mainstream media's relentless onslaught of lies and deception.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..1DBuozmioyJ_f0z9NfvAgJmXqMLMrlKBKfgOXmIRSLI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=162769017)
From the moment she stepped into the press room, Karoline has been a warrior for the America First movement. She doesn't just hold the line--she advances it, fearlessly confronting a press corps determined to distort the truth. The mainstream media, with their billionaire puppet masters pulling the strings, have made it their mission to demonize President Trump and his agenda. But Karoline Leavitt is their worst nightmare: a sharp, principled, and unflappable communicator who refuses to let their narratives go unchallenged.
Take CNN's Kaitlan Collins, for example. Time and again, Collins storms into the briefing room, armed with loaded questions and a smug demeanor, ready to twist the Trump administration's actions into something sinister. She interrupts, she badgers, she contorts--all in service of her network's agenda to mislead its audience and undermine the will of the American people. But Karoline doesn't flinch. With poise and precision, she dismantles Collins' falsehoods, exposing the reporter's bias and leaving her floundering. Collins may think she's clever, but she's no match for Karoline's command of the facts and her unshakable loyalty to the truth. Each briefing is a masterclass in how to handle a hostile press, and Karoline is the professor.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Did RFK Jr really just say THIS to the FDA?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
RFK Jr just gave a scathing address to the FDA... And he was NOT holding back.
He said to their faces what countless politicians before him were too scared to admit...And the FDA Deep State is TERRIFIED.
For the first time ever, he made clear that their corrupt alliance with Big Pharma is OVER. And now he's poised to EXPOSE **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
It's a secret that could cost them hundreds-of-billions in profit and dark money political donations... Which is why they'll do everything in their power to stop you from hearing **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. And they may just succeed...
So we're not taking any chances, we're revealing TODAY everything in **[this short video](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**[Watch it here now](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while it's still available.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. It's not every day the US Secretary of Health and Human Services calls the FDA a "sock puppet" for Big Pharma. But that's exactly what RFK Jr just did. You can find out exactly why he thinks that by learning **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/af97248e-4667-4cc0-aca3-33e4f3c46edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** today.
* * *
**(Continued)**
What makes Karoline so remarkable is not just her skill but her heart. She represents the new generation of Americans--young, bold, and fiercely dedicated to defending this nation from enemies foreign and domestic. At a time when our country faces unprecedented challenges, from globalist elites eroding our sovereignty to domestic radicals pushing division, Karoline is a shining example of what our future holds. She brings energy, conviction, and an unwavering commitment to the principles that make America great. Her work ethic is unmatched, her loyalty to President Trump unquestionable, and her ability to cut through the media's noise nothing short of extraordinary.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/effa53c9-3bc6-400c-9a67-f6e68a7d55b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Karoline Leavitt/Instagram
In these first 100 days, we've seen Trump's vision take shape: a booming economy, secure borders, and a foreign policy that puts America first. Karoline has been the voice of that vision, ensuring the American people hear the truth about this administration's achievements. Whether she's touting historic job growth, debunking lies about immigration policy, or exposing the hypocrisy of the left, Karoline delivers with clarity and courage. She's not just a press secretary--she's a patriot who understands the stakes of this fight.
I've seen a lot of talent in my years in public service, but Karoline Leavitt is in a league of her own. She's a reminder that the America First movement isn't just about one man--it's about a new generation rising to reclaim our nation's greatness. As President Trump leads us forward, Karoline will continue to be his fiercest advocate, a tireless defender of truth, and an inspiration to millions. To Karoline, I say: Keep fighting. America is watching, and we're proud.
* * *

body:

**FBI REPORT WARNS:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. POWER GRID** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18362341/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI5LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNscExQdWQ3QQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MDk0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MDMmX25saWQ9czdWM0RjVXNNayZfbmhpZHM9bmNiZ0F1M3BMYzhkZ29scw/gaBaJCg/s2qf65b2aea) **National Security Reports China's Attacks On Critical U.S. Electric Grid, Food Supply and Water Systems** FBI Director Wray warns China has successfully attacked companies throughout the U.S. in energy, telecommunications, water and has targeted 23 pipeline operators. Another shocking report reveals there have already been more than 70 attacks on America's power grid in a single year. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own[solar powered generator.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18362341/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI5LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNscExQdWQ3QQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MDk0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MDMmX25saWQ9azUyUE41UjRwUiZfbmhpZHM9bmNiZ0F1M3BMYzhkZ29scw/gaBaJCg/s0vab7d7599)** Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18362341/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI5LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNscExQdWQ3QQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MDk0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MDMmX25saWQ9eGNUS0V4S0QyWCZfbmhpZHM9bmNiZ0F1M3BMYzhkZ29scw/gaBaJCg/sct1f322ef4). THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. **And Right Now Is The Best
Time To Get Your Patriot
Power Generator With This _Exclusive_ FREE Generator
Offer (Save $2,001.75)!** After offering this deal last year, these generators sold like hotcakes. So we told our warehouse manager Matt, "Hey, make all the solar generators you can." And oh boy, did he. But thanks to a supply chain crisis, the NEW batch recently arrived, all at once. Oooops! Our warehouse is now bursting at the seams! So our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. AND you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some serious warehousing costs. We'll gladly pass those savings on to you by giving you an incredible BOGO deal! **Introducing the BRAND NEW...** **Patriot Power Generator 2500X Exclusive BOGO Deal (Save $2,001.75)!** [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18362341/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI5LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNscExQdWQ3QQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MDk0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MDMmX25saWQ9VVVFQUtFdFRjeCZfbmhpZHM9bmNiZ0F1M3BMYzhkZ29scw/gaBaJCg/sdj71d5b082) Order today and you'll get
these 12 FREE bonuses
worth $2,001.75:
* FREE 100-Watt Solar Panel
* FREE Patriot Power Sidekick Package
* FREE 3-Year Extended Warranty
* FREE 25-Foot Solar Panel Cord
* FREE LIVE Online Training
* FREE Solar Power Digital Guide
* FREE Blackout-Survival Digital Library
* FREE Lifetime Technical Support
* FREE Private VIP Phone Line
* FREE $25 Certificate
* FREE Shipping
* **Total Savings of $2,001.75!**

And YES! There's an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! [**YES! I Want to Protect My
Family & Get 12 FREE Gifts
Worth $2,001.75!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18362341/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI5LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNscExQdWQ3QQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MDk0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MDMmX25saWQ9eUJSYktwWkFTcSZfbmhpZHM9bmNiZ0F1M3BMYzhkZ29scw/gaBaJCg/s7tccd34a38) The **Patriot Power Generator 2500X** is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.
2. Plug in the solar panel.
3. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun!

Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. [**YES! I Want to Protect My
Family & Get 12 FREE Gifts
Worth $2,001.75!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18362341/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI5LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNscExQdWQ3QQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MDk0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MDMmX25saWQ9bmN5Q25WTmRFbSZfbmhpZHM9bmNiZ0F1M3BMYzhkZ29scw/gaBaJCg/s1q26e5fcbc) **Customers Love Their
Patriot Power Generators!** **_Rita L._**_
"This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price."_ _**Steve G.**
"Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable."_ _**Thomas B.**
"Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning."_ _**Jana H.**
"Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it."_ _**Allan D.**
"Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!"_ _**Chris S.**
"Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!"_ [**YES! I Want to Protect My
Family & Get 12 FREE Gifts
Worth $2,001.75!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e18362341/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI5LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA1MDM/LbmNscExQdWQ3QQ/qP3RydmlkPTE0MDk0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTIwMTgtMjAyNTA1MDMmX25saWQ9TXRKMkNXc1hNOSZfbmhpZHM9bmNiZ0F1M3BMYzhkZ29scw/gaBaJCg/savfe629e22)

Don't worry, Peter, there's still time before I put together the final report for him. ** **** \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: JD Vance Subject: Fraud alert! To: The most important thing DOGE does? I don't even think it's the cost savings. It's making the bureaucracy responsive to the elected president, DONALD J. TRUMP. DOGE stopped grants that would've violated President Trump's historic executive orders - before a single dollar was wired. Promises made = PROMISES KEPT! But the disgraced "journalists" in the fake news media and the so-called "experts" are trying to diminish our accomplishments. And they'll keep pumping out fake stories with "anonymous sources" attacking our incredible progress, all to drive down the poll numbers of President Trump's initiative. But here's what they're not counting on: millions of patriotic Americans like yourself rising up and declaring "I STAND WITH DOGE AND TRUMP." **** I've set a goal of collecting ONE MILLION RESPONSES and dropping the list of respondents directly onto President Trump's desk. **We need to respond RIGHT NOW:****[Sign on _now_ to tell us you support NPR and PBS!](https://go.dscc.org/go/21375?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=20198%2E9716520%2E4bXyod)**
