This is _dark_ , team: **Donald Trump just signed an executive order to _defund_ NPR and PBS.**

A free, independent press is _essential_ for our democracy, but Trump insists on attacking -- or even _threatening the very existence of_ \-- any outlet that reports on him truthfully! First it was MSNBC, then it was Voice of America, and now it's NPR and PBS.

**We can't stay silent.**

We launched a Live Petition to prove Democrats support NPR and PBS in the face of Trump's escalating threats. _Signing it may be the most important thing you do today._ **We don't have a moment to waste, so add your name right now:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21375?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=20198%2E9716520%2E4bXyod)
**[Sign on _now_ to tell us you support NPR and PBS!](https://go.dscc.org/go/21375?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=20198%2E9716520%2E4bXyod)**
| [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21375?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250503-NewsAlert-TrumpDefundNPRPBSSignOn-Pros-sl1&akid=20198%2E9716520%2E4bXyod)

Team DSCC

name: NPR + PBS Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: PBS CEO: "There is no Plan B"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

🚨🚨Trump’s war on our public media went nuclear as he signed a terrifying
Executive Order demanding the Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB)
"cease federal funding for NPR and PBS." 🚨🚨

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26539?source=email-20250503&t=1011&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Headline: Trump signs executive order to stop federal funding for NPR
and PBS.

PBS’s CEO is sounding the alarm. She recently warned that "There is no
Plan B" if Trump succeeds in his dangerous demand for Congress to zero out
funding for public broadcasting.

Make no mistake: Defunding PBS and NPR will force countless local stations
to close. And many of the most vulnerable stations are in rural and
underserved areas, with populations that don’t have access to or can’t
afford cable or satellite.

Congress is feeling the heat and even a few Republicans recently expressed
concern. NOW is the moment to keep up the pressure and show Trump that his
ruthless attempt to kill public media won’t work.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26540?source=email-20250503&t=1012&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Will you urgently stand with PBS and NPR and tell Congress to step in
and tell Trump to keep his hands off our public media?

For years, Trump has been hell bent on destroying NPR and PBS. He detests
the fact he can’t control the stories they publish – and without
independent media he’s free to spread whatever lies and disinformation he
likes.

He’s on a warpath to defund them and is using his latest Executive Order
to try to circumvent Congress. But he’s not stopping there. Last week, he
ALSO removed three of the five CPB board members. CPB is fighting back,
filing a lawsuit to stop this unprecedented attack on its editorial
independence. And we’re going to stand with them.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26539?source=email-20250503&t=1013&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Headline: Corporation for Public Broadcasting sues to block Trump from
firing 3 board members.

We WILL NOT allow Trump’s reckless political interference to undermine our
democracy's most trusted independent media sources. Congress works for
us—not Donald Trump, not special interests—and they need to know clearly
where we stand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26540?source=email-20250503&t=1014&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Will you urgently add your name to show Congress that the public stands
with NPR and PBS and WILL NOT SUPPORT attempts to silence and defund our
public media?

This fight isn't simply about television and radio – it's about protecting
our democracy's cornerstone institutions from partisan attacks. It's about
standing with independent journalism that prioritizes truth over profits,
children's development over corporate advertisers, and transparency over
political agendas.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Citizen Action Team

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20250503.wSfi2T&t=1007&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20250503.xaZLdE&t=1008&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20250503.i-E4og&t=1009&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20250503.jG1Qxn&t=1010&akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8399%2E5885482%2EHhvE7a

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a

name: Deb Haaland
subject: A broken leg and 3 options
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a bit of a tumble.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)
A few years ago while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took a _bit_ of a tumble.
I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it! But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options:
* Get airlifted down in a helicopter,
* take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down,
* or hike down myself.

**I chose to walk back down the mountain** because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours. It turns out I hiked down all that way with a broken leg. I’ll be honest, I didn’t think my leg was actually broken at the time.
The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations. **Donald Trump and Elon Musk have made it clear they intend to auction off our lands to extractive industries like Big Oil. They’ve attempted to fire our dedicated National Parks and National Forests workers en masse.**
As Governor of New Mexico, I will be a fierce defender of our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our communities. **[If you’re with me, will you donate $5 to support our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250503_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250503-1696&refcode2=1696_400544_3EZStw&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250503_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250503-1696&refcode2=1696_400544_3EZStw&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)**
As a former Secretary of the Interior, it breaks my heart to see what this administration is doing to exploit our lands and those who care for them.
**But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and do right by the workers who proudly serve our nation.**
**[New Mexicans need a governor who isn’t afraid of the tough fights that lie ahead. I can’t win this campaign without you, so please chip in $5 if you can afford it today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250503_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250503-1696&refcode2=1696_400544_3EZStw&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)**
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. In case you’re wondering, not even a broken left fibula could keep me away from our beautiful parks for long. Here’s a photo of me from one of my favorite places to visit, Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250503_2_brokenleg?amount=5&refcode=em20250503-1696&refcode2=1696_400544_3EZStw&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250503-2&t=2&refcode2=1696_400544_3EZStw&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1696%2E400544%2E3EZStw)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Free Summer Programs for Philly Students
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169933.172676.453&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169933.172676.453&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169933.172676.453&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14304)
# **Free Summer Programs for Philly Students**
**_The School District of Philadelphia is offering free, full-day summer programs for students entering Kindergarten through 12th grade._** [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169933.172676.453&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14305) Senator Hughes is excited to share an exciting opportunity from the **School District of Philadelphia** that could make a real difference for families this summer. From June 24 through August 1, 2025, the District will offer free, [full-day summer programs](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169933.172676.453&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14305) for Kindergarten through 12th grade students. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169933.172676.453&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14306) These programs aim to keep students academically engaged, expose students to new interests and career paths, support social and emotional development, and bridge opportunity gaps, all in a safe and enriching environment. Here are just a few highlights:
* Summer Achievers (grades 1-8) offers reading, math, arts, and weekly field trips.
* Career & Technical Education camps give middle schoolers a chance to explore hands-on trades and technical fields.
* High schoolers can gain real-world experience through paid internships or build their own business ideas in StartUp EDU.
* Students with a love for music can join the All-City Orchestra or Drumline to hone their talents and perform with peers.

For more information and to register, please visit: [philasd.org/academics/summerprograms](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169933.172676.453&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14305)
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

clean_body: If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can . | Share On | ---|--- Free Summer Programs for Philly Students The School District of Philadelphia is offering free, full-day summer programs for students entering Kindergarten through 12th grade. Senator Hughes is excited to share an exciting opportunity from the School District of Philadelphia that could make a real difference for families this summer. From June 24 through August 1, 2025, the District will offer free, for Kindergarten through 12th grade students. These programs aim to keep students academically engaged, expose students to new interests and career paths, support social and emotional development, and bridge opportunity gaps, all in a safe and enriching environment. Here are just a few highlights: Summer Achievers (grades 1-8) offers reading, math, arts, and weekly field trips. Career & Technical Education camps give middle schoolers a chance to explore hands-on trades and technical fields. High schoolers can gain real-world experience through paid internships or build their own business ideas in StartUp EDU. Students with a love for music can join the All-City Orchestra or Drumline to hone their talents and perform with peers. For more information and to register, please visit: | Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes | | | District Office 2401 North 54th Street Philadelphia, PA 19131 Phone: 215.879.7777 Fax: 215.879.7778 | | Harrisburg Office Senate Box 203007 Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007 Phone: 717.787.7112 Fax: 717.772.0579 | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | \- \-

name: History Facts
subject: Why sailors wore bell-bottoms
body:
The Best of History Facts: Bell-bottoms have long been synonymous with sailors in the U.S. Navy: Just picture Sailor Jack, the patriotic mascot who first appeared on boxes of Cracker Jack in 1918, or Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly dancing and singing in the 1945 musical Anchors Aweigh. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=qwos1a6m2qp8t57xkmk94aoc2xib6ss06m50gqpjsfb8xgnbqn5ube3l26lsvo20und41a0xeyw9uoflgpbvtxwrkj5n21m70y38sunph4mrs6poks92w8kmz92n5klwclo74khatuut29pbqjclo4sdnbwd3h4t5qagzh2xhl4c6b41qtmu8ua3cvb78jyrra9rkew3ntnk3kzovt5zd9w0k8h0q3eiu2tuf21h78f7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svpi7h&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Why Did Sailors Wear Bell-Bottom Pants?](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svpi7h&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svpi7h&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=svpi7h&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| B ell-bottoms have long been synonymous with sailors in the U.S. Navy: Just picture Sailor Jack, the patriotic mascot who first appeared on boxes of Cracker Jack in 1918, or Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly dancing and singing in the 1945 musical _Anchors Aweigh_. The classic image of the bell-bottom-wearing seaman lives on today — but why did sailors start wearing this style in the first place?

name: Democrats.org
subject: We’re investing more than $1 million a month in state parties →
body:
---
Derek, we know you get a lot of donation requests from campaigns and organizations like ours. But if you have a minute, we’d like to explain exactly what we’ll do with your $3 contribution if you pitch in to the DNC today. Here we go: The DNC and Association of State Democratic Committees recently announced a historic "organize everywhere, win anywhere” strategy – a four-year agreement to deliver more resources than ever before to Democratic state and territory parties. _Each state party_ will receive a baseline of $17,500 a month, a $5,000 per month increase over the last agreement, and Republican-controlled states will receive an additional investment of $5,000 a month through the DNC’s Red State Fund, putting their total at $22,500 every month. Every state party will benefit: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250503_3327_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3327_22930333_Kpc66v&akid=3327%2E22930333%2EKpc66v) **The combined investments total a monthly transfer of more than $1 million from the DNC to state parties — the committee’s largest investment into Democratic state parties in history.** Strategic investments like these don’t just matter in presidential or statewide races. They have a powerful **multiplier effect** _(nested opportunities, as we like to call it)_ for Democrats down the ballot, too — which is absolutely essential as we work to elect more leaders who will check Trump’s power. These investments will allow state parties to build critical infrastructure and hire more staff, strengthen their data and tech operations, strengthen their on-the-ground organizing programs, and better prepare for upcoming election cycles — not just in the months ahead, but in the years to come. [**When you chip in $3 to support the DNC, your contribution goes directly toward funding work like this. Can we count on you to make a $3 donation now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250503_3327_fr&refcode2=3327_22930333_Kpc66v&akid=3327%2E22930333%2EKpc66v) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250503_3327_fr&refcode2=3327_22930333_Kpc66v&akid=3327%2E22930333%2EKpc66v)**

Biden sent a FBI SWAT TEAM to bustdown my front door. My wife and kids were terrified. Prison was going to be my home now. I wore my cross necklace every day in Biden’s Gulag. It reminded me that I can’t give up on life, give up on my family, or give up on my country. ____________________________________ President Trump OFFICIALLY PARDONED ME on January 20th, 2025. It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back.______________________________________ I will never take my freedom for granted again. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate – something I NEVER imagined doing. Where I’m from in West Virginia, we don’t trust politicians. And for good reason. The D.C. elites have sold us out —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. Hard-working families are gettingCRUSHED in all 50 states. I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. My campaign is 100% powered bypatriots like you. If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way? $10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump. THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Derrick Evans Former Biden Regime PrisonerRepublican for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | |
